In a recent discussion about a state legislator, a comment was made that they are a "walking contradiction".
This comment made me reflect on the legislators I've known over my past 8 years in the Mississippi House of Representatives. I've grown to see many of these men and women as dishonest people who refuse to stand up and fight for the principles and values of our Republican party.
Thanks for reading! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and to stay informed about Mississippi politics.
[Subscribe](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGFuYWNyaXN3ZWxsLmNvbS9hY2NvdW50IiwicCI6MTEzNzQ5NjU5LCJzIjoxNTI2NzgxLCJmIjp0cnVlLCJ1Ijo5MDUwMTE5MiwiaWF0IjoxNjgxMTMzNDcwLCJleHAiOjE2ODM3MjU0NzAsImlzcyI6InB1Yi0wIiwic3ViIjoibGluay1yZWRpcmVjdCJ9.vqtfBz68lFxQKOlHNMezTuZZG3ZeOiHNBSnBS3gUrNc?)
When asked to describe an ordinary legislator, I often say they are incompetent, immoral and self-centered. My impression of many of them is not very flattering or positive, and certainly many are indeed walking contradictions.
But it's made me think about how these same legislators are seen by others, and even how they see themselves.
The legislator that the comment was made about sees himself, as many of them do, as a conservative fighter for the people of Mississippi. But as I've watched their actions and especially their voting record, they very often vote opposite the Republican party platform.
One example was House Bill 401, often referred to as the "Tesla Bill". This bill was clearly in opposition to the Republican principle of open and free-markets. But the bill sponsor went on state-wide radio championing the bill, saying the government must provide protection for this industry. Another example was House Bill 603 that spent hundreds of millions on "member projects" that can only be characterized as pork spending, only two legislators voted against this pork bill in the entire legislature, myself and Joel Bomgar.
These legislators say one thing and do another, but somehow believe they are upholding the principles and values on which they campaigned under the banner of Republicans.
So what are they? Why the contradictions? Are they a freedom fighter? A self-serving, incompetent politician? Or is it something else?
I've come to the conclusion that some are just dishonest people and simply say whatever it takes to get elected, always intending to do whatever serves themselves. Others are simply incompetent and don't have the ability to discern if a bill upholds or violates their principles. And yet another group rationalizes their behavior.
This last group is where many fall. You will hear statements made like, "You have to play the game." or "I have to get along with everyone", or "my single vote can't stop this bill, so why make leadership upset". I've heard statements like, "I know this is wrong but everyone else is getting money for projects back home, so I might as well get some too."
All of these are rationalizations to excuse themselves from standing up for the principles and values on which they campaigned. If you hear any of these statements made by your elected representative, you can bet they are not voting and upholding the principles on which you elected them to uphold.
Examining their voting record is one way to objectively measure if a politician is in contradiction to the principles you asked them to uphold.
As a conservative, I look for bills that affect the size of government, taxes, and how much control government is given over our lives. I also consider adherence to the values laid out in our constitution. If a legislator campaigns on reducing the size of government, but continually votes on bills that increase spending year over year, then I know they are not doing what I elected them to do.
Several conservative organizations track votes of legislators and compare their record to basic conservative principles. The [American Conservative Union ](https://substack.com/redirect/4fb0d4c1-d9cb-4127-bb72-b9b13d789842?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)is one of the best I've found.
If a politician runs on a platform of reducing taxes but continually votes on bills that raise taxes for parks, tourism, or museums, then they are voting in contradiction to what they claim to be.
If they campaign against "corporate welfare" but vote to give tax breaks to large corporations that are not available to local mom and pop shops, then they are legislating in contradiction to their campaign promises.
Citizens must pay attention and hold their representatives in government accountable. Don't accept excuses. Don't let them campaign on one set of principles but govern on a different principle.
One last bit of advice. It is often difficult to hold a friend accountable. Never consider a politician a friend. Keep them at a distance, they work for you and you must be ready to fire them at any moment.
* * *
**Help elect politicians who are not walking contradictions.**
The [Conservative Candidate Fund ](https://substack.com/redirect/69b75824-45c0-4b0f-a022-c7b7cd76bf37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)was created to support conservative Republicans who have proven they will uphold our principles and values.
[Donate Today!](https://substack.com/redirect/015694d0-8beb-406b-9e89-db67b7bb18b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zetju6211jt5fe0tuv2hdklavrdgidusfefrtk3o_rp22sh2s8i66o74chgmeo74c5h2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgt7pq0bcp8q8s8m9jqmmrq1ivvqecsdv892f5r0_rp22sh2s8i66o74chgmeo74c5h2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrnko99ghcptqbf55e28llvu0husqkaq0eduj828_rp22sh2s8i66o74chgmeo74c5h2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8f0oopv8hjaa7726d4ifvr7gus7h8asruck5mng_rp22sh2s8i66o74chgmeo74c5h2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8ldrqj0mnl67dnqo75j7vq3crghatpc9t4thqs8_rp22sh2s8i66o74chgmeo74c5h2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7esk7305qal14rk3gqqc667kuu87kc1vtg1qgu0_rp22sh2s8i66o74chgmeo74c5h2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zehrsfcjjbmrc3m42cd2blrb8g5ija0lqfop1uh0_rp22sh2s8i66o74chgmeo74c5h2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z36715h9baft7h91bo88to2022fh0cft63lrhne8_rp22sh2s8i66o74chgmeo74c5h2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze2kai60us97kkoq3ukl01vho3k9kss6guag8do8_rp22sh2s8i66o74chgmeo74c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztakgpk213u2m2m681u7q83hoe7ha1gltuc4r2eo_rp22sh2s8i66o74chgmeo74c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhlpia9p2cuinukcodag9e4e1ho3q12peq800iio_rp22sh2s8i66o74chgmeo74c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z13j3nuljg51rb0ojsoavh2q487i5511rhbeo22o_rp22sh2s8i66o74chgmeo74c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrh0klhku6cdk5d4vufu3uff1p403b5of7c9l8mg_rp22sh2s8i66o74chgmeo74c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z517gnvkttlt5lqs3qcdn5ktuchpdldrb36gv4tg_rp22sh2s8i66o74chgmeo74c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znieattp7n0k5akpodi6rg842cbc94g9dql9fa70_rp22sh2s8i66o74chgmeo74c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr4759vr7olp313gmvrmhicbu60qdtnt18pbhdb0_rp22sh2s8i66o74chgmeo74c5h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhj7iot03f97jil7spui8pm7ove7agllq1tg4348_rp22sh2s8i66o74chgmeo74c5h2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl7rtjiea82j1krmsh94rqptdmi7g06po1qb4b20_rp22sh2s8i66o74chgmeo74c5h2bs)

And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. Now, I've been at this politics ‘business' for a loooong time and I can safely say this:
**There's no state quite like Pennsylvania.**
Just last year, Pennsylvania was home to one of the closest (and most expensive) Senate races I've seen. You had snake oil salesman Dr. Oz backed by super PACs, spending heaps of cash to flood the airwaves with nasty attack ads.
**And now the GOP is at it again.** The National Republican Senate Committee doesn't even have a candidate in this race yet but they're already spending a fortune on false ads attacking Bob. They'll do anything they can to win this seat and snatch the Senate majority away from us.
**That's why today we can't just make a big splash.**
We've gotta deliver a damn _tsunami_ of grassroots donations for Bob to show everyone just how serious we are about defending this seat and our Senate majority. That's why we need at least 350 Founding Donors to step up today.

Okay — let's talk about my friend, Bob Casey. That's right, this guy. = Bob just launched his reelection campaign TODAY and folks are already saying this will be the most important race of 2024 — seriously!! I'll explain a bit more in a moment, but if you're already on board to help Bob hit the ground running: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, we'll process your donation to Bob Casey immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Now, I've been at this politics ‘business' for a loooong time and I can safely say this: There's no state quite like Pennsylvania. Just last year, Pennsylvania was home to one of the closest (and most expensive) Senate races I've seen. You had snake oil salesman Dr. Oz backed by super PACs, spending heaps of cash to flood the airwaves with nasty attack ads. And now the GOP is at it again. The National Republican Senate Committee doesn't even have a candidate in this race yet but they're already spending a fortune on false ads attacking Bob. They'll do anything they can to win this seat and snatch the Senate majority away from us. That's why today we can't just make a big splash. We've gotta deliver a damn tsunami of grassroots donations for Bob to show everyone just how serious we are about defending this seat and our Senate majority. body:
Last week, an activist judge in Texas ruled to restrict Arizonans’ access — and women nationally — to the most common and safe way to perform an abortion: with a pill.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61559079/400482910/754863273?refcode=em_header&refcode2=f555d87f-a5d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&contactdata=xAGVgRFGBjPbbbWxAUeTvfYuu0FNdSsV+cNevUtqDnlKwbmaAH4kCf+XLEmpVeBoKJwZmaHQ8+jjGkUmPtj9Xg==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODQzNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTU1ZDg3Zi1hNWQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mwl1oslSHZHwUuxHGdipjS1azyqtpP-D9gC1ox_WlRA=)
Peter -
Last Friday night, an activist judge in Texas ruled to restrict Arizonans’ access — and women nationally — to the most common and safe way to perform an abortion: with a pill.
It didn't have to get to this point.
Senator Sinema prioritized protecting a Senate procedure, over protecting women’s access to safe and legal abortions.
That was a choice.
Not one I will make if I am elected to the Senate, I think it’s much more important to protect women’s health than some rule, the filibuster, that Mitch McConnell will unquestionably abuse when back in power.
This is one of the big issues in this race, and a meaningful difference you — and all Americans — will feel if I am in the Senate.
But I cannot get there alone:
[**Can you please contribute $3 or whatever you can afford to my campaign today? We will put it right to work making sure we have the resources to run a winning race. I can’t do it without these donations.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61559080/400482911/-110998342?refcode2=f555d87f-a5d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&refcode=em230410-1-ngp&contactdata=xAGVgRFGBjPbbbWxAUeTvfYuu0FNdSsV+cNevUtqDnlKwbmaAH4kCf+XLEmpVeBoKJwZmaHQ8+jjGkUmPtj9Xg==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODQzNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTU1ZDg3Zi1hNWQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mwl1oslSHZHwUuxHGdipjS1azyqtpP-D9gC1ox_WlRA=)

name: Jessica Anderson, Heritage Action
subject: Our plan to secure the border
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
Americans should no longer suffer the burden and consequences of Biden’s border crisis.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15996%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AlhhpY1jWivY%2brQzH4pBYA&sysid=1)
---
| | Hey Friend, it’s Jessica Anderson from Heritage Action. The day President Joe Biden was inaugurated, **he halted the construction of the border wall** and began enacting a series of policies to incentivize historically massive levels of illegal immigration. **Since January 20, 2021, **
* Over _**6 million**_ illegal migrants have crossed into our nation’s borders from over 160 countries, including at least
* _**1.2 million**_ known “got-aways”
* _182_ individuals on the terror watch list and counting.

---
[**SECURE OUR BORDER: ADD YOUR NAME >>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15997%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kSZBLNPCx55tM0eY%2b%2fT9cw&sysid=1)
---
Our open southern border also acts as a freeway for fentanyl into American cities and towns. According to the NIH, 70,601 Americans died from fentanyl poisoning in 2021 alone.
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15998%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=THOo54WgvUsqbbrl2iwIeg&sysid=1)
---
[**PROTECT AMERICANS: SECURE THE BORDER >>>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15999%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zgdMKzqF5UToxWJ4kbonfw&sysid=1)
---
Americans should no longer suffer the burden and consequences of Biden’s border crisis. Heritage Action is working with conservatives in the House and activating grassroots activists nationwide to demand a robust border security package. **Congress must put forth and vote on legislation that will:**
1. **End Asylum Fraud**
2. **End “catch and release”**
3. **Finish the Border Wall**
4. **Increase Border Patrol resources in conjunction with closing loopholes in the immigration system**

In addition, the legislation **MUST** prioritize securing the border, **NOT **providing amnesty and encouraging more illegal immigration. [**I AGREE >>>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15990%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HQCy4tjM%2fliseH%2biSFVyfw&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15998%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=THOo54WgvUsqbbrl2iwIeg&sysid=1)
---
During the last election cycle, the American people sent conservatives to Washington with a mandate to secure the border and curb illegal immigration. **Anything less would be a dereliction of duty.**
Heritage Action is leading the fight to ensure that Congress follows through on their border promises to the American people. [**Will you help us in our grassroots mission?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15991%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FcvYo02%2fHyBdrRF1yTmW%2fw&sysid=1)
---
[**SECURE OUR BORDER: ADD YOUR NAME >>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15997%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kSZBLNPCx55tM0eY%2b%2fT9cw&sysid=1)
---
Thank you, Jessica Anderson Executive Director | Heritage Action
---
|
---
Heritage Action is proud to be _the most effective_ grassroots conservative organization around. We turn conservative rhetoric into meaningful action and campaigns. ****

Americans should no longer suffer the burden and consequences of Biden’s border crisis. Heritage Action is working with conservatives in the House and activating grassroots activists nationwide to demand a robust border security package. Congress must put forth and vote on legislation that will: 1. End Asylum Fraud 2. End “catch and release” 3. Finish the Border Wall 4. Increase Border Patrol resources in conjunction with closing loopholes in the immigration system In addition, the legislation MUST prioritize securing the border, NOT providing amnesty and encouraging more illegal immigration. During the last election cycle, the American people sent conservatives to Washington with a mandate to secure the border and curb illegal immigration. Anything less would be a dereliction of duty. Heritage Action is leading the fight to ensure that Congress follows through on their border promises to the American people. Thank you, Jessica Anderson Executive Director | Heritage Action | Heritage Action is proud to be the most effective grassroots conservative organization around. name: =?utf-8?q?=E2=9C=8D_sign_the_letter_now!_=28via_VPP=29?=
subject: Thank DA Bragg for Holding Trump Accountable >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
we’re OVERJOYED by this news
| **Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg Convinces Grand Jury to Bring Criminal Charges Against Donald Trump** **Listen, this is a HUGE victory for our democracy, so we’re sending Bragg a letter from our top grassroots supporters to thank him for his hard work!** [**We’re sending this letter to his office at 8AM tomorrow – so we only have 105 more signature spots available! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43180?t=6&akid=7034%2E878179%2E2Meeqy) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43180?t=7&akid=7034%2E878179%2E2Meeqy)
---

TO: DA Alvin Bragg
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you! **_Dear DA Bragg — you’re a HERO!_**

**We cannot begin to tell you the immense sense of relief we felt when we saw Trump had been indicted and arrested for his crimes!**

Donald Trump has been free to spout his hateful, treasonous rhetoric for years. _Now, he could FINALLY go to jail where he belongs!_

**We know fighting against MAGA extremist threats wasn’t easy — but you still did everything in your power to defend our democracy and hold traitor Trump accountable.**

**So we just wanted to show our thanks!** [**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the country that stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to thank you for holding Trump accountable and to elect Democrats who will stand up for our democracy »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43180?t=8&akid=7034%2E878179%2E2Meeqy) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43180?t=9&akid=7034%2E878179%2E2Meeqy)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7034%2E878179%2E2Meeqy). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7034%2E878179%2E2Meeqy).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=7034%2E878179%2E2Meeqy) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=7034%2E878179%2E2Meeqy). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=7034%2E878179%2E2Meeqy)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=7034%2E878179%2E2Meeqy)

subject: [[New Message] We’ve emailed you TWICE about Mark Levin shredding the corrupt Trump indictment:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Trump is fighting for his freedom as you're reading this email

| |

---
| | | Friend - we’ve emailed you TWICE about Mark Levin SOUNDING OFF on the corrupt Witch Hunt against President Trump.

**Trump is fighting for his freedom as you're reading this email so we need to hear from you right away. **

Don’t legitimize the Radical Left's unprecedented prosecution by staying silent.
_**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654469%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=on2jsrHUqEiHb5hIm%2f9XmQ&sysid=1 "BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the
petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**_

* * *

_*** BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE ***_

---
**Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt indictment against Trump:**
_"The Democrat Party wants a one-party country, it wants a one-party system... And it's not an accident that this happens in Democrat cities, with Democrat judges, with Democrat prosecutors, with Democrat grand juries, and that's the way it's going to work."_
Levin hit the nail on the head.

This is not some even-handed, unbiased prosecution. This Manhattan DA is a hyperpartisan zealot rushing to throw Donald J. Trump behind bars, stop him from running for president, smear his supporters, and cement TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL...

We're PLEADING with every Patriot in America to speak out right now. Here's how you can help:
_**[ADD YOUR NAME: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654460%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C%2f5YfTKh6T%2blesSVdn1tPA&sysid=1 "Sign the petition
demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt ")**_
We need 1,000,000 signatures BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so the Radical Left knows they don't speak for the will of the American People.

Unfortunately, we can't make that case without YOU.

**As of this morning, nearly EVERY Patriot we've asked has agreed to sign our petition - we're just waiting on a few more holdouts who haven't signed. Including you.**
**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654461%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tjsCcJI0Qvqxo8C4ZwmvAg&sysid=1 "SIGN ON: Demand Trump's
freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**
We'll be on the lookout for your name.

Thank you,

House GOP

name: John Fetterman
subject: Our next big fight in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
My senior Senator and friend Bob Casey JUST announced he’s running for reelection!!!
#
Hey Derek, I’ve got some biiiig news.
**🚨 My friend + senior Senator Bob Casey is *officially* running for re-election! 🚨**
**[Donate to Re-Elect Bob Casey »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230410-1?refcode=em20230410-8327&refcode2=8327_434096_rZpL99&akid=8327%2E434096%2ErZpL99)**
If you saw us on the campaign trail in 2022, then you probably saw Bob Casey too. No one knows PA like Bob Casey, and no one stands up for PA’s families like him, either.
He’s spent his LIFE fighting the ultra-wealthy and special interests that threaten PA’s hardworking people — and that’s *exactly* why we need to send him back to DC to keep fighting for us.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230410-1?refcode=em20230410-1-8327&refcode2=8327_434096_rZpL99&akid=8327%2E434096%2ErZpL99)
_^Like seriously, we gotta keep this dude in the U.S. Senate._
Bob’s campaign is already being attacked by the Republicans, and we’re going to do EVERYthing we can to keep him in the Senate and fighting for working Pennsylvanians.
**[Do me a favor and chip in a few bucks to help him out? Let’s keep PA🔵 \+ our Senate out of Mitch McConnell’s hands — just like we did in 2022.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230410-1?refcode=em20230410-1-8327&refcode2=8327_434096_rZpL99&akid=8327%2E434096%2ErZpL99)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230410-1?refcode=em20230410-8327&refcode2=8327_434096_rZpL99&akid=8327%2E434096%2ErZpL99)**
Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU!
—John 💛
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230410-8327-footer&t=1&refcode2=8327_434096_rZpL99&akid=8327%2E434096%2ErZpL99)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8327%2E434096%2ErZpL99)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8327%2E434096%2ErZpL99)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdek7jd2a6atfhc7s48io4pujvmge771g9j9lbbg_rp22sh2s8i66o74chim0oj0sjh2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9b0hifr2vc0i80g39ge3u7fu1n4ngns3e7n42cg_rp22sh2s8i66o74chim0oj0sjh2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd6vpmjup34g19d6f47qrantaeh1e0tg3bkbqjt8_rp22sh2s8i66o74chim0oj0sjh2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6nen2jv61a7t5gpgsg7ke3dim99a68kkldqafvo_rp22sh2s8i66o74chim0oj0sjh2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2enegfpf4incs3a7v7qgkd05o4o0d8vqokpvar0_rp22sh2s8i66o74chim0oj0sjh2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1kifmck5o2c7mlagrsc8os0rvahlhtqde7ajig0_rp22sh2s8i66o74chim0oj0sjh2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7g5eqqc7n7hmfpkiffc8tn9snhjhsamch6ehee0_rp22sh2s8i66o74chim0oj0sjh2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3gcm09nrdjkt1omqret3bhjg9to566stc6eldf8_rp22sh2s8i66o74chim0oj0sjh2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlila3m2fupthkqagtitqmnq4dum3nnippt12rs8_rp22sh2s8i66o74chim0oj0sjh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs1r6rmukcco53gh07if8mba39hffa796lj4rg90_rp22sh2s8i66o74chim0oj0sjh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zp533331fs8r0qo6m3bbi2d906idtacf6nhpn8po_rp22sh2s8i66o74chim0oj0sjh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0mpjcp383tum7iolc15na9dejaegbbc3req9bl0_rp22sh2s8i66o74chim0oj0sjh2bs)

clean_body: Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Pro Life Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Applications are open for Democracy Summer Fellows

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61568115/400498485/-1844931500?refcode=em_eng_2023.04.10_b1_gs_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODJiYWJmMmQtYWJkNy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=543ep2KGL0Hrm3TEuz3zi5HbiKJHmwHHwKibcVGVGuQ=) Friends –

I am proud to announce that my campaign will be participating as a partner in the **2023 National Democracy Summer School!** This one-of-a-kind Democratic Fellowship program – founded by Congressman Jamie Raskin and expanded across the country in a historic partnership with the DCCC – is dedicated to training the next generation of political activists and visionary leaders.

**[As part of this initiative, I am looking for dedicated high school and college students to join me as Stanton for Congress Fellows!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61568118/400498486/907520766?utm_source=Greg_Stanton_Email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODJiYWJmMmQtYWJkNy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=543ep2KGL0Hrm3TEuz3zi5HbiKJHmwHHwKibcVGVGuQ=&emci=a8d6031f-a5d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=82babf2d-abd7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=7718777)**

This six-week program will take place from Monday, June 26, 2023 - Monday, August 7, 2023 and requires a commitment of 10-15 hours per week. Fellows will participate in exciting online seminars and a special curriculum designed by Congressman Jamie Raskin, while also organizing on the ground with my reelection campaign here in AZ-04.

Throughout the academic portion, Fellows will learn from academic luminaries, political leaders, policy experts, issue advocates, and top community organizers from across the country. Past Democracy Summer speakers have included House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Professor Laurence Tribe, Senator Elizabeth Warren, Rep. Alexandria Ocasio Cortez, Rep. John Lewis, and Civil Rights leaders Bob Moses and Rev. William J. Barber II.

Not to mention, Fellows will also learn state-of-the-art skills in phone banking, text-banking, canvassing, fundraising, and voter registration — all the necessary ingredients for a thriving field operation!

[**Take a look at the additional information on the application for the Fellowship.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61568120/400498487/907520766?utm_source=Greg_Stanton_Email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODJiYWJmMmQtYWJkNy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=543ep2KGL0Hrm3TEuz3zi5HbiKJHmwHHwKibcVGVGuQ=&emci=a8d6031f-a5d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=82babf2d-abd7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=7718777) The priority deadline to apply is April 14th, 2023. If you know a student who may be interested in this life-changing program, please forward them this email and remind them to select our campaign on the application — they won’t want to miss out! | [APPLY NOW →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61568121/400498488/907520766?utm_source=Greg_Stanton_Email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODJiYWJmMmQtYWJkNy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=543ep2KGL0Hrm3TEuz3zi5HbiKJHmwHHwKibcVGVGuQ=&emci=a8d6031f-a5d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=82babf2d-abd7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=7718777)

Thank you for your support,

\- Greg

Friend,
---
There’s no way to sugarcoat it: _Tuesday night we experienced a devastating setback for Wisconsin._
---
**But that won’t stop us from ALWAYS fighting for conservative values here in our great state.**
---
As we look ahead at our state’s critical elections in 2024 – which could ultimately decide the fate of the White House for the next 4 years – information from voters like you is extremely valuable, Friend.
---
That’s why we’re sending you this brief survey so we can fine-tune our strategies before 2024 and help conservatives win up and down the ballot.
---

name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: Tennessee Voter Projet Endorses Cameron Brooks for Knoxville City Council
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
April 10, 2023
Dear friend,
TVP is pleased to endorse Cameron Brooks for Knoxville City Council At Large Seat A.
Cameron has long been a champion for working families, having spent a decade serving as an Organizer with the United Campus Workers. Cameron is running to expand affordable housing, bring in more jobs that pay a living wage, and continue investment in public schools.
JOIN TVP IN SUPPORT OF CAMERON BROOKS FOR KNOXVILLE CITY COUNCIL [bit.ly/tvpforbrooks]
Cameron has a long history of public service at the grassroots level, as an Election Commissioner and animal-rights advocate. We're confident that he will bring the same commitment to his community to the Knoxville City Council. We hope you'll consider supporting the election of more progressives throughout the state, starting with Cameron Brooks for Knoxville City Council.
Will you help TVP support Cameron's campaign and help boost progressive work in East Tennessee? [bit.ly/tvpforbrooks] Half of what you contribute will go directly to Cameron's campaign and the other half will go to turning out voters in the election this Fall.
You can learn more about Cameron at www.votecameronbrooks.com [http://www.votecameronbrooks.com] .
Thanks for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: This unprecedented judicial sneak attack on abortion access must be answered, and we need to stand with the women who are directly at risk, right now.
body:
Huge abortion rights setback
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T93d03693-6702-4706-9ab8-bbed9db25bb4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Utter treachery and terrible policy.** _That's what we've gotten from an anti-choice zealot masquerading as a judge. We warned for months that Matthew J. Kacsmarkyk was a Republican in robe, a Trump-appointed nut forcing his personal set of superstitions and obsessions on all of us._ **_So, in a ruling that surprised nobody, with no legal, moral or health-based justification, he overturned the FDA's approval of the abortion pill, mifepristone, which has a record of overwhelming safety here and abroad. _** _Ruth Marcus of the Washington Post put it well:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T68503910-a0f8-44aa-b897-a47a17b5b73c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thankfully, a Washington State judge issued a competing decision to halt this lunacy from taking effect right away (we hope). _**_Yet, we need to fight this anti-democratic attack by a small man on the bodies of women across the country--yes, in blue states too._** [**_Will you please join us in donating $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the National Network of Abortion Funds to fund travel, childcare, shelter and more for women who will otherwise be emotionally and physically harmed by this decision._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5ec4452a-b4a0-4094-9dd7-e09a9b7a7b26/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting every day for full equality in this country. Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0293aaeb-fbb8-4329-8960-e51b409f0c1c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/kacsmarykdecisionmifepristonefdaapproval2-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0ead3323-5200-450d-94af-ac8c03b1c55d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

body:

**[IS PRESIDENT TRUMP GUILTY OR INNOCENT?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62540731:JM2cUSGNZ:m:1:3331421248:E0FA8792EA8345287BB11BB5FDD39069:r)**

******************************************************[TAKE THE POLL NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62540731:JM2cUSGNZ:m:1:3331421248:E0FA8792EA8345287BB11BB5FDD39069:r)******************************************************
Peter,

_**President Trump, the America First Movement, and patriots like you are under attack.**_

The Democrats claim they're prosecuting Trump to "preserve democracy." But we know the truth - they want to CONVICT him with the help of a BIASED, Left-wing judge to discredit ALL freedom-loving Conservatives.

Our team wants to know what patriots LIKE YOU think about President Trump's arrest in our **[Official NRSC Snap Poll.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62540731:JM2cUSGNZ:m:1:3331421248:E0FA8792EA8345287BB11BB5FDD39069:r)**
_**You have until MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to respond.**_
**[Provide your input in the Official NRSC Snap Poll by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to ensure your response is reviewed.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62540731:JM2cUSGNZ:m:1:3331421248:E0FA8792EA8345287BB11BB5FDD39069:r)**

name: Bob Casey
subject: I'm running for re-election to the United States Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi folks,

I have exciting news to share with you: **I’m running for re-election to the United States Senate.**

The work ahead won’t be easy. Election experts say my seat is one of the most likely to flip next year, and Republicans are already putting a spotlight on Pennsylvania.

But I know firsthand how important it is to keep my seat and the Senate blue. **[And that’s why I’m asking you to split $5 between my campaign and the DSCC.](https://go.dscc.org/go/12724?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230410-BobCasey-CaseyTandem2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230410-BobCasey-CaseyTandem2-ETG-sl1&akid=10408%2E9716520%2EORdWi9)**

In 2010, I fought to pass the Affordable Care Act. And in 2017, when Trump and McConnell tried to take it away, I joined a bipartisan effort to make sure Americans stayed protected.

Both times, we didn’t have a _single_ vote to spare.

But it was my cancer diagnosis last year that _truly_ brought home what those votes meant. Because of world-class health care, my cancer was detected early enough to safely remove it – but if Republicans had their way, millions of Americans would lose access to care.

**I’m running for re-election to fight for a future where every American has access to the same level of affordable medical care that I had, from birth through their golden years.**

Our work isn’t over, but together, we can make that dream a reality.

**[So please, will you split a $5 donation between my campaign and the DSCC before midnight? Your support will help keep Pennsylvania – and the Senate – blue.](https://go.dscc.org/go/12724?amount=5&t=5&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230410-BobCasey-CaseyTandem2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230410-BobCasey-CaseyTandem2-ETG-sl1&akid=10408%2E9716520%2EORdWi9)**

Thank you for your support,

Bob

Bob Casey
U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12724?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230410-BobCasey-CaseyTandem2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230410-BobCasey-CaseyTandem2-ETG-sl1&akid=10408%2E9716520%2EORdWi9)

| Bob Casey is running for re-election in Pennsylvania to take on the powerful special interests and deliver real results for working families and communities.

_**[Chip in now to help keep Pennsylvania’s seat blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/12724?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230410-BobCasey-CaseyTandem2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230410-BobCasey-CaseyTandem2-ETG-sl1&akid=10408%2E9716520%2EORdWi9)**_
| | [Donate](https://go.dscc.org/go/12724?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230410-BobCasey-CaseyTandem2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230410-BobCasey-CaseyTandem2-ETG-sl1&akid=10408%2E9716520%2EORdWi9)

name: James Comer (Chairman, House Oversight Committee)
subject: every Tom, Dick, and Harry is coming after me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
When I became the Chairman of the Oversight Committee, everyone warned me not to step in the ring if I can’t take any punches.

| |

---
| | | When I became Chairman of the House Oversight Committee, everyone warned me not to step in the ring if I couldn't take any punches. Well, I took their advice and stepped in anyway.

As the GOP's top investigator, I've made a LOT of enemies looking into:
- Internal communications of the **Manhattan DA** targeting the former president
- Suspect **payments to the Biden family** from a Chinese company
- **Hunter Biden** and his shady business dealings
- The **origins of COVID-19** and any potential cover-ups
- The Biden Administration's failed response to the **baby formula shortage**
- Joe Biden's widespread use of **catch-and-release** for illegal immigrants
_The blowback from the Liberal Mob was swift and severe:_ The Biden Administration said my bombshell report was full of lies. Vox said my investigations were "flopping." Jennifer Rubin said I was focused on "phony scandals." And the Manhattan DA is refusing to cooperate in our oversight investigation.

Every Tom, Dick, and Harry is coming after me but our House Majority will never stop fighting for you, the American People. However, we can't take on the Liberal Mob - and keep fighting for accountability - without YOU.

_**[If you're with us, I urge you in the STRONGEST POSSIBLE TERMS to help defend our House Majority by chipping in a few dollars right now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgf7d2vehbmvrtddp5udjcujmomrqv04ojqvsst8_rp22sh2s8i66o74chim4pj6c9h2bs "If you’re with us, I urge you in the STRONGEST POSSIBLE TERMS to help defend our House Majority by chipping in a few dollars right now.")**_

Any amount you can spare enables us to keep fighting for what's right - even in the face of enormous blowback from the Liberal Mob.
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z33ovsukggtq9lqj3m1he7g89nj5n8n6n7ja8f40_rp22sh2s8i66o74chim4pj6c9h2bs "James Comer")
---
| | | [STAND WITH ME](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z39diho089i27oi92h189khm9gq3ge8vt5nsjdtg_rp22sh2s8i66o74chim4pj6c9h2bs "STAND WITH ME")
---
Your support makes a huge difference. I hope I can count on you in this pressing time.

Together, we'll take back our country.

Thank you,
**James Comer** | _Chairman, House Oversight Committee_

---

name: Barbara Lee
subject: [photos enclosed] The experiences that fueled my fight for justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8cTlaixZuZv4I-ArcEz5r3rYjvG7ISZd7Vyr3yPqLgx9lSvUXfEhMeB4CT9-Rnh9qBpnAsM60p-tj88fdp340cVkkX3ZFV7g3TtMwXLbWdt-JBs__Bh20cSCsWeWDDKBij-pE_mu1SyOVCeFnU1Sc7kdkHx5pKXd8mN4Tg3oLApsuDCjYc6mpGLTUZaUYL9VmpM9Omi3d2V0OFEJB8qn-f-3BOqIJ8I5rwZ9B6oQB1imQuHavTAgvbXIe60Tn3buv-h3dGjacfHlIDOOiPcoRkKXinHenZfcnlEelC4gQlzSpii8XElxfnVK4yCEEXf61aJzGX4w8FYk9KQOISAodTsEFWQoVPCOSbPOFqrYVF0xYCahhhFEHS_ClSHjYkk0Iw/3v8/2HQZgu41RbyUDPlmysWegA/h0/bkpV4zqn-brjU3tQ7Blwds8rB5oyAtOHs-lHutI0hqc) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x8Bdi3DJx_tI_BkDTloM8ojNLW3Zfjzelbu2Y4K6WvKtgULVJFF-FTrpswhwq-vJwgTgHOt9omDP8odZP7HU7hxTpB0S70q3PqvlsZ7D8xpZQ4vOhMLj3Wnl7CEc7iyQJ-SMsFN8z-BiuRFW_phtTTN_XiIV9YL0iCkoRsspedCke_2eRrLDgB4JyJlNno_VfVYN4F_9_017r2b0j2jfp-d6bx9z0E05rMYz6zCOieCinXWpiwxLUpmg-qLe_UcN563PWJeTDOL9EYAOtNYWwQUv9rf4jVDc_yItYS_AI36Vnk-maiT99S_IXTFixWVoh-NdQY367AfX2D0lxuvbBEjpcpf9cyRwOWpSCkPnE0O1OuC_4kBadaQ583fZRfQ_VFIlSmi8nUvYSWFFqiOTVg6Z_UvJArobfbbrtrY8EIcJBwlktSrznk0nXn6PG8CPTgJNyUfLwbDiTZKNtovbFF/3v8/2HQZgu41RbyUDPlmysWegA/h1/mDCMLGdof5wJF83iNBC5eX5ItFPxpgAVtJccEyqhh8Y) Peter, long before I was one of the highest-ranking Black women in Congress and running a historic campaign for U.S. Senate, I was the little girl that you see in this picture:
[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x8Bdi3DJx_tI_BkDTloM8ojNLW3Zfjzelbu2Y4K6WvKtgULVJFF-FTrpswhwq-vJwgTgHOt9omDP8odZP7HU7hxTpB0S70q3PqvlsZ7D8xpZQ4vOhMLj3Wnl7CEc7iyQJ-SMsFN8z-BiuRFW_phtTTN_XiIV9YL0iCkoRsspedClVwqfTf3GFdmh2g6IBxR1i8q6bMVKFOOYMcr5JnQaVV_wmE0JrVXCLY7BUDa2MpR-0SaBM4IW9TEc620QoQmqUNpmKXUH-jGNqAgYF2rBmpJ1LihDLUdPbjqpnmUf2Vwts7UvkPvt3ErLHeRbsgpwMa_8xmN6hX5sfZ7H_Xca_-Jph0LJl8DnT6AdE4Uhbjq9kPy9Z8avfmg1LPR4Agv2cm_h1133NYOaC8ozDq0NTtFYG4xM0QXDuRCb74_2mana3fc6w0RNfcUI-qJREhloHOzjMxvtYA8hWddpbnH51h/3v8/2HQZgu41RbyUDPlmysWegA/h2/LYa1H1OZErQN4TQMwv3_w8oXdF-4R2PNLkcFbaC6M8s) I've faced some incredible hardships in my life. Growing up in the segregated South, I couldn't drink from the same water fountain as my white peers. And as a teenager with no access to the reproductive health care I needed in the U.S., I had to travel from my home in California to Mexico to receive a back-alley abortion in the middle of the night.

But these are the experiences that fueled my fight for justice early on. So when there were no Black cheerleaders at my high school, I worked with the NAACP and earned my spot as the school’s first Black cheerleader.
[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x8Bdi3DJx_tI_BkDTloM8ojNLW3Zfjzelbu2Y4K6WvKtgULVJFF-FTrpswhwq-vJwgTgHOt9omDP8odZP7HU7hxTpB0S70q3PqvlsZ7D8xpZQ4vOhMLj3Wnl7CEc7iyQJ-SMsFN8z-BiuRFW_phtTTN_XiIV9YL0iCkoRsspedCt_eVFoDPVSmwt_I2og_4cuUg-x9kTNBVirb-SOezYse0HHkYwQIy7trQB4O_PKle_sr4mSWsXXzRU8cK3PnjeL1P0-sCPsht_lxpXmB_esdK4haeG_ZSEQHrvlPXaxOGujt7r-hX4w1lEPR1e2rzAu1cnEh3c_jZVZ54zJt2xdEAKM9TTeKS252t5QgQJakDckOdpPmOlgaNPLQ4HO-hdf1Am9ai7NhvjuQ0m3AL6TkyKh0G80jxxaXdONCsG-ofc5N-0REExp8mMenQ9ARqTpEasZ5q4ca8w0-u9bMDfmi/3v8/2HQZgu41RbyUDPlmysWegA/h3/JTkt34qLNnUyLIEnQ-qsIxPcZBsPy20H154rpiSVvxo) I went on to become the first Black woman elected to the State Senate from Northern California. And in Congress, I've championed the voices of marginalized communities – from fighting injustices against people of color to addressing LGBTQ+ inequality to combating violence against women.
[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x8Bdi3DJx_tI_BkDTloM8ojNLW3Zfjzelbu2Y4K6WvKtgULVJFF-FTrpswhwq-vJwgTgHOt9omDP8odZP7HU7hxTpB0S70q3PqvlsZ7D8xpZQ4vOhMLj3Wnl7CEc7iyQJ-SMsFN8z-BiuRFW_phtTTN_XiIV9YL0iCkoRsspedCiC77J0Ljvn6HhdtHwOqFs24SgBzI1VympWaw2oaSRTHth0hZV8HPsIKc6pTfhJ6lOYJmEAj7qj_A2oROGWSanOfT-FGr07F_7CCCu4Ftux5HuLB5lrY18nt9AIZyJCBebblsF3u9yFuppjj5J1tcpwV7lE4s7SvDtIVkJ2l7qFobPOZTgWeFNov20LSAhiaho7LvzSZblkWyUr8dt0ZzKC60TDvauK6VSsjb03WyAJH5CcvRi9qL--7uFGh6c0AifHBG_MjPj44LgpiInHlq6YhrAdqtlV9c4R24nH2fJVr/3v8/2HQZgu41RbyUDPlmysWegA/h4/c1o3SeAcOpNBG0XWaMNzQojt24HvavB0JwwrfUbhBMM) Now, I'm running to become just the third Black woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate, where there are no Black women serving today – but we have an uphill climb ahead of us:

**The Washington Post is reporting that I'm at a serious fundraising disadvantage compared to others in this race, which is shaping up to be the most expensive Senate primary in history.

But I know that with your grassroots support, we can pull ahead and win. That's why I'm personally asking, Peter:** [Will you split $10 or more between my campaign and The Collective PAC to power our progressive movement to victory and build a country that works for all of us? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x8Bdi3DJx_tI_BkDTloM8ojNLW3Zfjzelbu2Y4K6WvKtgULVJFF-FTrpswhwq-vJwgTgHOt9omDP8odZP7HU7hxTpB0S70q3PqvlsZ7D8xpZQ4vOhMLj3Wnl7CEc7iyQJ-SMsFN8z-BiuRFW_phtTTN_XiIV9YL0iCkoRsspedCqKSnKR0h21rdjZd27UpxYfkK40xYDckfZl9IwIWQuFtidUzf6-pvwDmRORE7VlE3dWUkZ56qKZN_YLI8vdQfvdXMxNhnkOwTF53895svgap4gSZV3VHQF0Bj-fGftv0Prh57AxXUYBJXyHhkCGpeS3d6g_S5Cwka5X26hhE8F3Tik8Wnlys8jWLB2yxw7SgehhiJ3kMJ4-GlRctFwlHbNdLijH893VKhEkqs56DZVUcdWD2UD2I-0UtMiLSy2GFShtsuEOR4tV4zer3_76v7RZfWyr-Lt4uGa8AvNsWyuzP/3v8/2HQZgu41RbyUDPlmysWegA/h5/MHvZUSGX2yozkgNgCzInS62Rw662SD_0eAa5kSfGV5M) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Barbara Lee and The Collective PAC.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, long before I was one of the highest-ranking Black women in Congress and running a historic campaign for U.S. Senate, I was the little girl that you see in this picture: I've faced some incredible hardships in my life. Growing up in the segregated South, I couldn't drink from the same water fountain as my white peers. And as a teenager with no access to the reproductive health care I needed in the U.S., I had to travel from my home in California to Mexico to receive a back-alley abortion in the middle of the night. But these are the experiences that fueled my fight for justice early on. So when there were no Black cheerleaders at my high school, I worked with the NAACP and earned my spot as the school’s first Black cheerleader. I went on to become the first Black woman elected to the State Senate from Northern California. And in Congress, I've championed the voices of marginalized communities – from fighting injustices against people of color to addressing LGBTQ+ inequality to combating violence against women. Now, I'm running to become just the third Black woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate, where there are no Black women serving today – but we have an uphill climb ahead of us: The Washington Post is reporting that I'm at a serious fundraising disadvantage compared to others in this race, which is shaping up to be the most expensive Senate primary in history. But I know that with your grassroots support, we can pull ahead and win. That's why I'm personally asking, Peter: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Barbara Lee and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thank you for reading my story, and for being part of our progressive movement. – Barbara Lee The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Re: Reviving American Energy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Help us restore domestic production so we can END Biden’s energy crisis
| [](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=7ab0aa30a2dd4a9e9e3ee996dff0d0b4&_e=SOyE-Bin4yL6nDSMjAwDUTmfB8YV2pRVuOAM5STkQhFt37Lg209yF4XW3LRGhRGBxA6H0_sCvqkuiByXVNU4tEIt3vNAaXa68kDAbc5Yj-J3mZEtxk8p0VmnVWbVtx2rrUiRApej9BzLEgLm14WEsutepGd9DjNGaY3gJYR1pl5AF6hg0oOLc2cZ3f9FvfwDfBooZ7k1orQM0uK0ZAZvu1YSd-czlRXRV9J_o1mg3IjWAmShXfpdS4sfQ-kWo_NBOAcQ-iWzK6xkUBDhFLUc9kvuxxhJldfUrM_P9E56xoP3HJjyhzfmfCLoG7r1b8ojaIr3z05f2vuKg5uJO6zvlpOFblw6zw8NbiLvynZh1Ps%3D)
---
Peter,
---
Since Joe Biden became President, his administration has _**TANKED**_ the American energy sector while citizens like **YOU** struggle with skyrocketing energy prices.
---
**House Republicans pass marquee energy bill in rebuke of Biden**
---
_Source: Politico_
---
_But with conservative leaders like me back in the House majority, we have every intention of**RESTORING** our country’s energy independence and lowering costs for the American people._
---
Americans are SICK of bearing the burdens of Joe Biden’s _**FAILED**_ energy agenda.
---
So my colleagues and I are taking action to accomplish the following:
---
* **INCREASE the amount of energy being produced right here in the U.S.**
* **PREVENT Joe Biden from interfering with domestic energy production**
* **REVERSE poor decisions that damaged the American energy industry**
* **LIMIT regulations on our energy exports to promote industrial growth**
* **SUPPORT our energy workers and protect them from liberal policies**

---
So, Peter, will you make your voice heard and stand with us as we fight to restore America’s energy independence?
---
[**Please add your name to my PETITION and urge the Senate to RESTORE America’s energy independence by increasing domestic production here in the United States.**](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=7ab0aa30a2dd4a9e9e3ee996dff0d0b4&_e=SOyE-Bin4yL6nDSMjAwDUTmfB8YV2pRVuOAM5STkQhFt37Lg209yF4XW3LRGhRGBxA6H0_sCvqkuiByXVNU4tEIt3vNAaXa68kDAbc5Yj-J3mZEtxk8p0VmnVWbVtx2rrUiRApej9BzLEgLm14WEsutepGd9DjNGaY3gJYR1pl5AF6hg0oOLc2cZ3f9FvfwDfBooZ7k1orQM0uK0ZAZvu72Dh9QkJxEKdIpYRTvcuk8m7nohYl8v5cP86zlZams8WmbqNRnoX4P_EESIgGg8y03vuW_pJaLZZ-s8DYs-inK2XS95Dz8np0snrZRCEZsm-pz82OTQPRRmtNbTpm7clSmnJeqwb2TznzcbxLas6gg%3D)

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zp1bpf2a8s2m2610kr7vc05ietl6fhrds712lu7o_rp22sh2s8i66o74chimcoj4cjh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zttj63lkrb7n57si3fo497vatldgon90ootpfkgg_rp22sh2s8i66o74chimcoj4cjh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zppkcmlljejrdtb4npmq1fi5ogmdlt5n2kenqr58_rp22sh2s8i66o74chimcoj4cjh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
