clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. In 2022, Pennsylvania’s Senate race gave Democrats our slim, 51-seat majority. That means next year, our opponents are going to do everything they can to flip Pennsylvania red.
Republicans are already targeting this Senate seat and running attack ads. To defeat them, we’re going to earn support from Pennsylvanians from Erie to Scranton.
**I’m no stranger to hard fights.** I’ve been standing up for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities for my whole career, and I won’t stop now. There’s still more work to do to cut through the gridlock, take on the powerful special interests, and deliver real results for working families and children across our commonwealth.
But it’s going to take all of us. The first 24 hours of fundraising are critical to the success of this campaign.
[_**Become a Founding Donor and join our team by splitting a donation between our campaign and**the DLCC’s Grassroots Victory PAC to build strong Democratic power in state legislatures today.** **_](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y2CBT8js4ujmjQ41rqDdfwXonOLRP3FOL2sK2SdviacU74jCzQAGlwOEdRN2C1OEAbLuEduQF5If_OopZESKB6WATri_16NulGARmX9hFE9AUGQOPfiO8-nJabK1Qm7nsHYpVtTJ9xbwDOUtIGXdAgx69502g3JygvO2jYsjgMoREwzxaJOSKBLvfqH04xBO_XZ3SrFTvzOQuoO7z6YPGgbMTKTGHiISbHomWdY30rS_nKiA31RuDKShYtHbQpMvkPGbf1Qe63QACciJ6YdxMRM6RoJjPVKuh-OUATW-3Ltp7h9c_0X9JdDLuU4Xsml99hoTewO_XXH17AFH7P4NHtwKHJgRdW3sZHp7DbB0UtJNXS9ZKzCVT4HMgb_xqD4GbU_SaYGnFOAOl0MGyfzZw9rnkK2sP36pEETyJ2amoBXA/3v8/98nCZEj_RaqE9l02w-LA2Q/h6/l9mgdbSAwFDiwBrXfHMM8y1wfHM4WI8l9dq9HFhjmsM)
In a race as important as this one, people like you make all the difference.
Thank you,
Bob Casey

We already know which way the wind's blowing, and need to be ready for the storms ahead.

Good morning! We hope it's a beautiful one — it's supposed to be 69° and sunny in Minnesota's 5th district today. 🌤️ 😎
Whatever the weather, wherever you may be, we do know [**it's a beautiful morning to make your first $3 contribution to stand with Ilhan Omar and our campaign. What do you say?](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-apr23.QUZUGP&refcode=em230410-1-t1r&t=3&akid=61%2E791427%2EkxfXuF)**
Here's why:
* After removing her from the Foreign Affairs Committee earlier this year, the GOP has already made it crystal clear that Ilhan is one of their top-priority targets in 2024.

* Right-wing super PACs and dark money groups are going to pour millions upon millions of dollars into Minnesota to try and defeat her. You can guarantee it.

* We fund our campaign a different way — _the right way_ — **together.** The vast majority of our fundraising comes from small-dollar, grassroots contributions, often to emails just like this one.

**In short, we already know which way the wind's blowing, and need to be ready for the storms ahead.**

name: Fairness Project
subject: INSIDE: Our roadmap to safeguarding abortion access >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project
body:
After the Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization ruling last summer, SCOTUS’ devastating ruling opened the door for extremist legislators across the country to attack reproductive rights. Now, less than a year since Roe fell — 12 states have active abortion bans on the books.

[[U.S. MAP shows all the states where abortion is banned]]

In November 2022, 5 states ran ballot measure campaigns to preserve abortion access — including 2 backed by Fairness Project. Each and every one of these campaigns won and safeguarded abortion in their states for good.

[[U.S. MAP shows all the states where abortion is protected + emphasizes California, Vermont, Michigan, Kentucky, Montana]]

NOW → 10 states remain where we could use ballot measures to restore access to abortion. Some even, are states where a voter-driven ballot measure could cancel out an active abortion ban!

[[U.S. MAP highlighting Arizona, Arkansas, Florida, Missouri, Montana, Nebraska, North Dakota, Ohio, Oklahoma and South Dakota.]]

Will you help us protect abortion access everywhere possible?

[[DONATE NOW]]

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: Official Endorsement by VCDL Founder Paul Moog
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
VCDL Founder Endorses Senator Amanda Chase
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| ENDORSEMENT ALERT
---
| PAUL MOOG FOUNDER OF VCDL Personal Endorsement
---
| | |
---
| |
---|---
|

"As the founder of VCDL I wholeheartedly endorse Amanda Chase for re-election."

"It's sad but not surprising to see the do-nothing establishment hacks lining up behind Glen 'Red Flag' Sturtevant as Amanda's outspoken leadership has exposed their milquetoast caucus time and time again," said Paul Moog.

"I'm honored to receive the endorsement of Paul Moog who is the founder of the Virginia Citizens Defense League. Thanks for his vision and leadership."

"Sturtevant has already demonstrated that he will compromise on gun rights. Even during the VCDL debate he was waffling on whether a locality or the Constitution takes precedence."

"When it comes to ensuring our kids aren't sitting in gun free zones that make them prime targets for school shootings and senseless gun violence, I'm the only one you can 100 percent count on," said Senator Amanda Chase.

Senator Chase has an 8 year lifetime voting record of 100% all years she's been in office. Former Senator Sturtevant voted for un-American red flag laws and scored 80% in 2018 and 88% in 2019.

This is a personal endorsement of Paul Moog and does not represent VCDL as an organization.

**As of this morning, nearly EVERY Patriot we've asked has agreed to sign our petition - we're just waiting on a few more holdouts who haven't signed. Including you.**

name: Yazmin at United We Dream Action
subject: The golden ticket
body:
The organizing power of our immigrant youth-led movement has made our demands for citizenship undeniable. | | | As an undocumented immigrant who moved to the US from Mexico when I was 3, I never thought I’d get to share my story with the Vice President of the United States, Peter. Let me tell you how I got there: After the victory at the Supreme Court reinstated DACA in 2020, I filled out my application without hesitation. I felt like I had won the golden ticket when my application was accepted. **But when Judge Hanen shut down the DACA program for new applicants a short time later, I couldn’t help but think of the 80,000 first-time applicants whose applications weren’t accepted and whose lives were put on hold.** While I was grateful for the protection from deportation, work permit, and access to higher education that came with my DACA status, it was a bittersweet feeling knowing the same relief and protections were taken away from thousands of other eligible immigrants. As long as 80,000 other immigrant youth who had their applications frozen — and the millions of other undocumented people who don’t qualify for DACA — are left without protections, we must fight for a pathway to citizenship. That is what I told Vice President Kamala Harris, when I was part of a group of activists who were invited to the White House to honor the 10th anniversary of DACA. With 9 Republican-led states trying to end DACA for good, I told VP Harris that we _NEED_ her administration to act urgently to deliver citizenship and protect immigrants. **As an undocumented immigrant, I never imagined I would speak face-to-face with the Vice President or attend a meeting at the White House. But the organizing power of our immigrant youth-led movement has made our demands for citizenship undeniable.** United We Dream Action has been leading the fight for permanent protections for immigrant youth and all undocumented people, and our fight is reaching a critical point as Republicans continue to pass anti-immigrant policies and wage attacks against our communities. **Peter, we need your help to keep up our fight. Will you make a $10 donation to help UWDA win protections for DACA recipients, immigrant youth, and all undocumented people?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8mx_5ABkFHmeFViL7NEeBD_AogMf18kAB-piHwjkW8FG9nBC5uvuvNDOEr2T2tpdxZtPQ3sKaeFNG19wyqU_Npzo41reDwVtPzAESgLDyHZDa_Ie9r-m_zltcLcvLlmX3LgLUycJLYFtRYVbJHARhu4V0QTQOyo4vi2ZT20m-YwZEE_oj4NAtpXGu4eRXwC5B-R4tVIQfwjhrM87OpAOT116Umn0LRQppkTCttGr4gMXmwCA62Ch8TZ4raH-kpK_Oai91jJaXhrY3qWyHrqhUllx7cVosXDSPcQ0JTUPCI5Z8OyUrOx9ArJGwML-FgFd8oLDHuUaduHmM9STH4OAbyBlg7cvVZy4sZQQOGO7dbsY/3v8/L5bXr6f3RNiHW4CZVLAOgA/h0/KRqDJtmqrh7MiGBtfmW95XMKdisafCRAEt8drJmmyLk)

name: American Briefing
subject: Don’t let them “cancel” American history
body:
I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hillsdale College campus.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztj25e3uj81afliikv70dd526va967ort9n2eqc0_rp22sh2s8i66o74chim6o76cdh2bs) Friend of Liberty, I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hillsdale College campus. These beautiful cards include _George Washington_ and _Thomas Jefferson_ ... _Abraham Lincoln_ and _Frederick Douglass_ ... _Winston Churchill_ , _Margaret Thatcher_ , and _Ronald Reagan_. _All of these statues stand proudly on Hillsdale’s Michigan campus_ —one of the only institutions of higher learning that refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. You can view the cards at this secure link: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgps3ki8tfe9nt0eir8r66414dvqf7ahlq2vbje8_rp22sh2s8i66o74chim6o76cdh2bs) Let the cards serve as a reminder to you of the vigilance and commitment needed to defend liberty—especially right now, a critical time for our country. **Sadly, several polls and events around the country show that increasing numbers of young Americans are being drawn to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty.** And the unrest in communities nationwide, where statues of our Founding Fathers are being vandalized or torn down, is another symptom of this underlying disease. What explains this development? As an educator and president of Hillsdale, I’ve been thinking about this for a long time. Here’s one primary reason... For decades, the “progressive” leftist academics who became dominant in most of America’s colleges and universities after the 1960s have been teaching a **biased** and **distorted** view of American history. _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project” is a prime example. According to the “1619 Project,” the key to understanding America is not freedom, but slavery—and the Project’s main goal is to inject this false teaching into the curricula of America’s K–12 schools. Imagine young minds in classrooms all over American learning this. Does it make you as concerned as it does me? And given this trend in American education, is it any wonder that our young people feel less of a patriotic attachment to our nation and are increasingly attracted—out of ignorance—to failed ideas such as socialism, ideas that are destructive of liberty? Another sign of the “progressive” Left’s influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of “political correctness.” The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of “progress” until it has “canceled” patriotism and hallowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past—many of whom are depicted on the cards I’d like to send you. **This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away.** After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. **With the support of citizens like you—citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty—we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation’s youth.** It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project” that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America’s great heritage of liberty. **Your generous support today will...**
* **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of _Imprimis_ ...for life).

* **Send** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution.

* **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale’s free online courses such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”

* **Launch** and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens.

One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding—even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. **With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our “Liberty Walk.” The cards are a thank you for your support.** Supplies are limited, so please make your best tax-deductible gift right away. **You can view the cards and give your best tax-deductible gift of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more by following the secure link below:** [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4cec6p20rhl2069kuo8n0d1r6j5cs2snijcvjj0_rp22sh2s8i66o74chim6o76cdh2bs) After receiving your notecards, I hope you’ll send one to a young person you know, encouraging them to learn more about the Constitution and American history. You can even recommend that they take advantage of Hillsdale’s many free educational resources. The Left is going all out, as illustrated by _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” It is urgent that we engage forcefully on the battlefield of education ... which is why your support is needed today. **Because as always, our only sure defense is an educated citizenry prepared to defend liberty—no matter the cost.** Warm regards, Bill Gray Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

American Briefing
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zi3g79i0kbau52oojdjfn7flblfj8g2d09lj4vro_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c1ge8pr3c5h238h1e8he4933c3i68pb3c3j66oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1bmfa4k3drhfkk4qjjlg1ivubrhbojnge3t7r9o_rp22sh2s8i66o74chim6o76cdh2bs)_

[**CONTRIBUTE $10 NOW AND GET A STICKER**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wVFdxc8dxQBK2Eydyd-AdRfVBwTKhnDKRJzXxSTpEZa1lmpvPm14k_l2o2PiSJRHnCrG3Mhu1eJAsPNKGswEDfw9XZ2VuiiJZD7NZKaEeAsqXIz6szYuC0JQRCXJG764Bl41tRK_fW5x0FLeObQgZxNgIeLQnEvBgGn3uIQRajYDMTFIUH4GUt8Dr4h8x3-yvN4MwzLCrBg_6fP_1KquFJY13hasfWSvzE95HsPFwZt7fXD9Ogc3xMkaa9nZvyiJVDjbZVCHctrPRm1Yz1UnJUxF_Csyuf-9GpQo-yPa_4VvXk8qvYLddz6nymEEmrkV9HbkLpZZZQ1GzwY0a4Tf7VECr7xC4QdTAqTroUZln02dHhgBKF80CTq7KiSZHKHKnhrLSVwgNZEs4nZglrnxNJmZRQlUp_gzlSq9bWFqOHvQ/3v8/nshadgXtRMq18ZLqheWo6Q/h1/0EIoKlt5UA8XRxhNpCbP_ueu1t1vVAa46JygmbSuWYs) Does our new logo remind you of anything? [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wVFdxc8dxQBK2Eydyd-AdRfVBwTKhnDKRJzXxSTpEZa0_f41-TecrQ1k6wtXmdTfdjYzxZjGwsLJ6MBBlyaIQQquhPseuCQlEUPTKyyM1dEA775KO89gtV6ZB_WM2qP0iC7DZfZupW7vQHMdbwzPrfsRbUEEJd3YR2GDyPwt5XvdOKrYnXV71EnuqMp7PRiFvnm6pGpPLn3n5AsmuuyoIJwpQQw8d0Y4dBxniWjYsayB7X_eNnc4V5PhGrF3s9iuJmFOfLKj2mvrfuTSpaave3vlWyYI3knsAF0eLF0RclMXUWxZH1ZlEZ93N_rdfGJ_gBDuGQhhCze8DhI59Q0WL7PVwQIdefRsorHg0yqzgvi3_kO4RfVSodZN9rkFLuEF_Jc2sR36Pd9D5-hqkj7PCS4SS_9p6MymyenP5CobTlbA/3v8/nshadgXtRMq18ZLqheWo6Q/h2/FwWHapa0T1bAeLYu4ztcCj7j8d1U90ex9VirbNUQVzg) Sinema’s infamous “thumbs down curtsy” on raising the minimum wage helped spur us to launch this PAC, and it continues to remind us how important it is that we replace her with someone who will put Arizonans first. When we began this PAC as ‘Primary Sinema’ when Sinema still called herself a Democrat, our goal was to educate voters about the ways Kyrsten Sinema has let down Arizonans and caved to special interests. Now, we’re dedicated to defeating her in a three-way general election and replacing her with a real Senator that will work for their constituents, not corporate donors and special interests.

We’ve received **thousands of small-dollar donations from grassroots donors** just like you, generated a ton of news stories about Sinema’s horrible record, launched ads, and organized an advisory council made up of a broad coalition of Arizonans committed to holding Kyrsten Sinema accountable.
We’ve been able to do all this and more with your help–but the fight has just begun. **Sinema has an $8 million war chest, a potential big dark-money backer No Labels waiting in the wings, and nothing to lose.**

Hi Derek,

I want you to be the first to know:******I’m running for ****re-election.**
It’s an honor to represent my fellow Pennsylvanians in the Senate, and it is their trust that drives me to get up every day and fight for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities.
**But know this: Mitch McConnell and the GOP are already coming for this seat. I won’t be able to win this re-election fight alone.**
**[_If you’re with me, will you split a donation between Chrissy Houlahan and our campaign today? This is poised to be one of the most competitive elections in the country, so your support will make a huge impact on the start of this race._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61579159/400523226/-1222011784?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk812-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODBkMThkNC1iYWQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XSBDogmcYMbSOAObE_loYRX96o30YGJodhDwXL1EJZs=)**

In 2022, Pennsylvania’s Senate race gave Democrats our slim, 51-seat majority. That means next year, our opponents are going to do everything they can to flip Pennsylvania red.

Republicans are already targeting this Senate seat and running attack ads. To defeat them, we’re going to earn support from Pennsylvanians from Erie to Scranton.
**Derek****, I’m no stranger to hard fights.** I’ve been standing up for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities for my whole career, and I won’t stop now. There’s still more work to do to cut through the gridlock, take on the powerful special interests, and deliver real results for working families and children across our commonwealth.

But it’s going to take all of us. The first 24 hours of fundraising are critical to the success of this campaign.
**[_Become a Founding Donor and join our team by splitting a donation between our campaign and Chrissy Houlahan's today._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61579161/400523228/-1222011784?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk812-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODBkMThkNC1iYWQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XSBDogmcYMbSOAObE_loYRX96o30YGJodhDwXL1EJZs=)**
In a race as important as this one, people like you make all the difference.
Thank you,

Bob Casey
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333

name: Bob Casey
subject: I won’t be able to win this fight alone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
I want you to be the first to know.
#
Hi Peter,
I want you to be the first to know: **I’m running for re-election.**
It’s an honor to represent my fellow Pennsylvanians in the Senate, and it is their trust that drives me to get up every day and fight for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities.
**But know this: Mitch McConnell and the GOP are already coming for this seat. I won’t be able to win this re-election fight alone.**
**[If you’re with me, will you split a donation between Dick Durbin and our campaign today? This is poised to be one of the most competitive elections in the country, so your support will make a huge impact on the start of this race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61579232/400523750/1659806966?refcode=dd_em_230410_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjQxZTI1ZC1iYmQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UP5oal5YRTbuJwwqou479mx2uLOQec225KcN0G2X9i4=)**
********[Chip in $5>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61579233/400523751/1659806966?refcode=dd_em_230410_1_t1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjQxZTI1ZC1iYmQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UP5oal5YRTbuJwwqou479mx2uLOQec225KcN0G2X9i4=)********
In 2022, Pennsylvania’s Senate race gave Democrats our slim, 51-seat majority. That means next year, our opponents are going to do everything they can to flip Pennsylvania red.
Republicans are already targeting this Senate seat and running attack ads. To defeat them, we’re going to earn support from Pennsylvanians from Erie to Scranton.
**Peter,I’m no stranger to hard fights.** I’ve been standing up for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities for my whole career, and I won’t stop now. There’s still more work to do to cut through the gridlock, take on the powerful special interests, and deliver real results for working families and children across our commonwealth.
But it’s going to take all of us. The first 24 hours of fundraising are critical to the success of this campaign.
**[Become a Founding Donor and join our team by splitting a donation between our campaign and Dick Durbin’s today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61579234/400523752/1659806966?refcode=dd_em_230410_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjQxZTI1ZC1iYmQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UP5oal5YRTbuJwwqou479mx2uLOQec225KcN0G2X9i4=)**
In a race as important as this one, people like you make all the difference.
Thank you,
Bob Casey
**** ******** ****
********[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61579235/400523753/1659806966?refcode=dd_em_230410_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjQxZTI1ZC1iYmQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UP5oal5YRTbuJwwqou479mx2uLOQec225KcN0G2X9i4=)********

**In 2024, Pennsylvania is going to be just as critical – and we already know that Republicans are going to spend millions to try to defeat Bob Casey and turn Pennsylvania red.**

But I know Bob Casey has what it takes to win. I know because I’ve seen him in action. He’s a man of great principle who’s never forgotten his Scranton roots, and he fights every day to protect the hardworking people of Pennsylvania.

I’m so grateful for the support you showed me during our race for Governor last year. Now, I need you to fight just as hard to send my friend Bob Casey back to the Senate.

body:
The Republican-controlled Tennessee House of Representatives voted on Thursday to expel two young Black lawmakers – Justin Jones and Justin Pearson. | | | Hey Peter, just wanted to make sure you saw the email from Lizzy over the weekend. Last week, two young, Black Tennessee state legislators — Justin Jones and Justin Pearson — were expelled after they held a nonviolent protest for gun reform. While Justin Jones is expected to be reinstated today, and another vote will be held on Wednesday to hopefully reinstate Justin Pearson as well, **both Justin Jones and Justin Pearson will need to win a special election to reclaim their seats in the next few weeks or months.** They'll need all the support they can get to fight back against undemocratic attacks from the Republican Party. **[Read more about what took place in Nashville below, then split a donation between Justin Jones and Justin Pearson to re-elect them back to their rightfully held seats in the TN legislature.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xCHQEvWYTePJ9CnOdxXMAdylBgEUA3Qyiy-9hcy0jvqpj9igQTqONkfMmE-VGU4AEZPJDZk4RCt6Jk_cHPsFjjU-RX-9evbcCgbeluL3CS2Jzl5M2lNMY7y7vtsx1znnjFotmaq4BQWyM84epsJcjAEAsmzBnBx3-h-PKtdMoovDKcBeIOGGF3u1gUFxBO3r08RcI5Bu4s8Yy6aokZu-NsecTAtpUZkuKhMlw0J1ZBjmrz225ZpVL2AVbIRowW7yCNH3cbNMXFq-GbCuwKIpLtt2w1pLxZNzUNHYcKr_HW9hs5BkV1x9JX71DBD1VqhCiaC6_snSeWJKH_gxG9dBvwOG4OC_7UpA8_6C5uzX5jJg/3v8/4cjVLDrYR_iRWro43CYVuw/h0/l646v2Xd4J1eZvBiDATrcy-STI3uwwgNulpKAb4a2Q8)** —Team WFP \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Lizzy Thomas, Working Families Party**
Date: Saturday, April 8, 2023
Subject: Tennessee Peter, Ten days after a mass-shooting in a Nashville school, and one week after three Tennessee lawmakers led a peaceful protest for gun reform in the legislature, **the Republican-controlled Tennessee House of Representatives voted on Thursday to expel two young Black lawmakers — Justin Jones and Justin Pearson.** 1 It’s worth noting, Peter, that of the three lawmakers who protested, only the two Black lawmakers were expelled. Let us be clear — this was intentional. And harkens back to the Jim Crow era. In the state where Nathan Bedford Forrest founded the Ku Klux Klan, we can’t ignore the racist overtones of this wholly undemocratic action. As a resident of Nashville, I am outraged by this massive violation of our democracy. But I am also filled with hope. Because as lawmakers voted to expel the two youngest Black representatives in the state legislature, hundreds of young people filled the halls of the state capital in protest. These protests were organized and led by Gen Z activists, with many staying for over 12 hours, staging die-ins, dropping banners, and supporting one another as the House voted. **The Tennessee Republican Party may have expelled these two lawmakers, but they can’t expel this movement.** Now that State Reps. Jones and Pearson have been expelled, special elections will be held. Both Jones and Pearson come from the movement, and it will be the movement that re-elects them to the state legislature. **[Will you split a donation between Reps. Justin Pearson and Justin Jones to re-elect them to their rightfully-held seats in the state legislature?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xCHQEvWYTePJ9CnOdxXMAdylBgEUA3Qyiy-9hcy0jvqpj9igQTqONkfMmE-VGU4AEZPJDZk4RCt6Jk_cHPsFjjUpD5yW7necEKqknmY2OcwKgFmNS5n2e6nxP0--12HeWfRKtvIhKuKD0dpQvSvzxspyFFHw3p95iQaOClhtkBY0WTM0sfGrmgZ1VlQyYhkS2xk1fi0uloygH3niMbmsSxqhtncQc3ieGUhoT2MJ7F-97aYAztd2s-zLgOlQytwYdXneR_I2vexsM12y2L28_P-87tdZ9yfoqKlN30zqrVyXh-mZI-6xtLfHov3FIuEGoSSIHf_ag8imbuamT8j6BAk1RUfcOoBpyedVc43PF3Kg/3v8/4cjVLDrYR_iRWro43CYVuw/h1/g4l-KRd6_o9CiklUxINaTwfCB2zfGqIRPNdK0Lezj-E)** **[Split a donation »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xCHQEvWYTePJ9CnOdxXMAdylBgEUA3Qyiy-9hcy0jvqpj9igQTqONkfMmE-VGU4AEZPJDZk4RCt6Jk_cHPsFjjoSj0I8EO3Bo7oF7DFADEmGUCDImVlgTfGvGCO8LVPlPNCJD-d7Y5-2eTE_qSJuEs1h05TZeNRGId5kQTD9NeostcKhIpya2KYVyEVogyZZMY0qrI8ipzyqWrZGXTx4yNMffddGiM9eyj_SbnUfiNfmcfnyzRB5rrRWf2h4X-11enz7KqU0wY3ofZT2FLoNiTYyOogW28cb5wIQ8OKUUjMVDcYK0fnIpFQNt45G1dvw5ZRSUbmCdp0JHXSKWksOLWm85WFx80VEqNvgmyj95fJw/3v8/4cjVLDrYR_iRWro43CYVuw/h2/QM0uYZTYL3q-a5Dw4N1IP2uN54GR-Ef6Po6RKyq5x2E)** Thursday’s expulsions didn’t happen in a vacuum. I’ve called Nashville home for seven years, and in that time, I have seen my state creep closer and closer to fascism. We’ve seen abortion banned outright in our state, and we’ve also seen the right-wing try to ban healthcare for trans youth, and weaken our gun control laws. During a speech in the House, Rep. Justin Jones said “what the nation is seeing is that we don’t have a democracy in Tennessee.” **But make no mistake, Tennessee is far from alone.** All around the country, we are seeing the Republican Party violate democratic norms from refusing to accept election results in Arizona, to gerrymandering themselves into supermajorities in Wisconsin, to attempting to nullify local ordinances in blue cities in Texas, and expanding police power in Jackson, Mississippi.2 As Rep. Justin Pearson said Thursday night, “we can never normalize the ending of democracy.” **Which is why we must forcefully fight back against this assault on our democracy by re-electing Reps. Justin Pearson and Justin Jones and commit to fighting anti-democratic forces across the country.** [**Will you split a donation between Reps. Justin Pearson and Justin Jones to re-elect them to their rightfully-held seats in the state legislature?**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xCHQEvWYTePJ9CnOdxXMAdylBgEUA3Qyiy-9hcy0jvqpj9igQTqONkfMmE-VGU4AEZPJDZk4RCt6Jk_cHPsFjjDdTxAoAaeislgpyW8vX-d1grk5crUaZoLnTceUfJNkif1Om-JqXZAaie5i-wwoTmSDnHvx__RGdECvuKB0ZhiS8prCBDwrScY8IcmEwR7cg5JQAccUI9IllsNZvPoySHRLGNtVtDt-GX7lKF4p1kR2zvUxg3Q8hMhv362WtNv7q2k4gF1FIAwr_IfaDolE8jjn7Si4ibsnZYI63e-zBr14bR3Vv27o3WP6r7OFLUuPdxCozqP6_i31jEiEJLFe9kGNzCAYslmMtJ6BuB0tRShQ/3v8/4cjVLDrYR_iRWro43CYVuw/h3/UD_9vKA2meUTI2hi-1U-zdz4-APhWLeg4ivy6iwZehM) **[Split a donation »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xCHQEvWYTePJ9CnOdxXMAdylBgEUA3Qyiy-9hcy0jvqpj9igQTqONkfMmE-VGU4AEZPJDZk4RCt6Jk_cHPsFjjzciHfXkvqvKzD0ylNkdRIpDGCtUb-Inhf1nIUwT3nsWU0NGuS0o8Pr0FA1zNrFc21EtzyrRedDCTew5-3VJwoybHI8fVkGuAfji5g5YnhYcp01qqDADOxjoGtmLK-TodlCsE3sEJTk-c35vN9N7_zNJl6qRpBshwxtkvMFL3og7BkqLjMSzC2lx7vEXglzQivUpWEsSUaUls2rAIxkSjLdZ1h3inZRuJ0oJPcIBJAeinJbGXHPPXEkysJkZNnzArPjpckfFN8bNydUIEcutnvw/3v8/4cjVLDrYR_iRWro43CYVuw/h4/D8b_WvfSy6BeCtombDixXQ71GVZQxmV23C3HhyhZuUg)** In solidarity, Lizzy Thomas

clean_body: The Republican-controlled Tennessee House of Representatives voted on Thursday to expel two young Black lawmakers – Justin Jones and Justin Pearson. | | | Hey Peter, just wanted to make sure you saw the email from Lizzy over the weekend. Last week, two young, Black Tennessee state legislators — Justin Jones and Justin Pearson — were expelled after they held a nonviolent protest for gun reform. While Justin Jones is expected to be reinstated today, and another vote will be held on Wednesday to hopefully reinstate Justin Pearson as well, both Justin Jones and Justin Pearson will need to win a special election to reclaim their seats in the next few weeks or months. They'll need all the support they can get to fight back against undemocratic attacks from the Republican Party. —Team WFP \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Lizzy Thomas, Working Families Party Date: Saturday, April 8, 2023 Subject: Tennessee Peter, Ten days after a mass-shooting in a Nashville school, and one week after three Tennessee lawmakers led a peaceful protest for gun reform in the legislature, the Republican-controlled Tennessee House of Representatives voted on Thursday to expel two young Black lawmakers — Justin Jones and Justin Pearson. 1 It’s worth noting, Peter, that of the three lawmakers who protested, only the two Black lawmakers were expelled. Let us be clear — this was intentional. And harkens back to the Jim Crow era. In the state where Nathan Bedford Forrest founded the Ku Klux Klan, we can’t ignore the racist overtones of this wholly undemocratic action. As a resident of Nashville, I am outraged by this massive violation of our democracy. But I am also filled with hope. Because as lawmakers voted to expel the two youngest Black representatives in the state legislature, hundreds of young people filled the halls of the state capital in protest. These protests were organized and led by Gen Z activists, with many staying for over 12 hours, staging die-ins, dropping banners, and supporting one another as the House voted. The Tennessee Republican Party may have expelled these two lawmakers, but they can’t expel this movement. Now that State Reps. Jones and Pearson have been expelled, special elections will be held. Both Jones and Pearson come from the movement, and it will be the movement that re-elects them to the state legislature. Thursday’s expulsions didn’t happen in a vacuum. I’ve called Nashville home for seven years, and in that time, I have seen my state creep closer and closer to fascism. We’ve seen abortion banned outright in our state, and we’ve also seen the right-wing try to ban healthcare for trans youth, and weaken our gun control laws. During a speech in the House, Rep. Justin Jones said “what the nation is seeing is that we don’t have a democracy in Tennessee.” But make no mistake, Tennessee is far from alone. All around the country, we are seeing the Republican Party violate democratic norms from refusing to accept election results in Arizona, to gerrymandering themselves into supermajorities in Wisconsin, to attempting to nullify local ordinances in blue cities in Texas, and expanding police power in Jackson, Mississippi.2 As Rep. Justin Pearson said Thursday night, “we can never normalize the ending of democracy.” Which is why we must forcefully fight back against this assault on our democracy by re-electing Reps. Justin Pearson and Justin Jones and commit to fighting anti-democratic forces across the country. In solidarity, Lizzy Thomas Digital Organizer Working Families Party Source: 1\. , CNN, Thu April 6, 2023 2\. , The Hill , Fri April 7, 2023 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. name: Karl Marx
subject: Don’t make me get a real job
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62542795:J0r_gSGGN:m:1:3365131770:7FC6B621EE8A33DBE8C435CA81B0310D:r)

Peter,

I have some terrible news.

**Because of the Foundation for Economics in Education (FEE), I 'm losing influence with Gen Z!**

The Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) is an educational foundation that teaches the value of liberty and free markets. FEE has been home to some of communism's greatest enemies, _including Leonard Read, Henry Hazlitt, and Ludwig von Mises_ , who dared to go against the popularity of socialism during their time.

And they have been a problem for me since 1946.

When others teach students about socialism, they conveniently leave out the parts about food shortages, secret police, propaganda, and the other horrors it brings to a country.

But FEE doesn't do that, and it's affecting me _personally._

Now they are trying to raise $10,000 in the next 48 hours to share the importance of liberty and free markets with the next generation.

If I can't get impressionable students to buy my book, my friend will force me to get off his couch and get a real job. I'm begging you. Please don't [_**click here to support FEE 's fight against communism by donating with any gift >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62542795:J0r_gSGGN:m:1:3365131770:7FC6B621EE8A33DBE8C435CA81B0310D:r)

It was bad enough when I had to compete against their books. Now FEE is challenging communism everywhere Gen Z gets their information, online and in the classroom.

In 2022, FEE reached over 146 MILLION Gen Z online! Their videos alone received over 23 MILLION views, and they gained nearly 70,000 followers across social media platforms.

**FEE broke the world record for the largest online economics lecture! **

_**How am I supposed to compete with that? **_

To make matters worse, FEE is raising funds to reach more young people with their online content. I was hoping to see the rise of socialism in America. But if FEE achieves its fundraising goal in the next 48 hours, I am terrified that I never will!

[_**Clicking here spreads FEE 's pro-liberty message to more of today's youth and turns them against socialism. Any gift would do it >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62542795:J0r_gSGGN:m:1:3365131770:7FC6B621EE8A33DBE8C435CA81B0310D:r)

Let me tell you about FEE's program that is doing the most to discredit socialism, **FEE in the Classroom. **

This unique program, held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country, teaches young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government. Students engage with FEE's faculty of acclaimed instructors through compelling lectures, exciting economic experiments, engaging group discussions, and Q&As.

**Students who complete FEE in the Classroom walk away with a new appreciation for the freedom they have in this country. **

Afterward, there is no way they will take anything I have to say seriously!

If FEE in the Classroom continues to bring its pro-liberty and pro-free market message directly to students, then who can I fool into buying my books or pictures of me on a t-shirt?

**Clicking below and giving a generous gift will ruin socialism 's influence on the next generation of American students. **

In 2022, Pennsylvania’s Senate race gave Democrats our slim, 51-seat majority. That means next year, our opponents are going to do everything they can to flip Pennsylvania red.
Republicans are already targeting this Senate seat and running attack ads. To defeat them, we’re going to earn support from Pennsylvanians from Erie to Scranton.
**I’m no stranger to hard fights.** I’ve been standing up for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities for my whole career, and I won’t stop now. There’s still more work to do to cut through the gridlock, take on the powerful special interests, and deliver real results for working families and children across our commonwealth.
But it’s going to take all of us. The first 24 hours of fundraising are critical to the success of this campaign.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Do you support Donald Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62541721:6H6SgSGiN:m:1:3331421248:3DB8806F9B69E7A57DD9A8BD8987F8EC:r)
|

Peter,

For the first time in American history, we are witnessing the arrest of a former president of the United States. Again, this has NEVER happened before in American history. NEVER.

**President Trump's arrest all but guarantees politics in America will never be the same again.**

I'm sending this to you now because President Trump and Republicans in Congress need your help, now more than EVER before. The Witch hunt continues with no signs of slowing down. They're going to continue to try and destroy Donald Trump forever! **[Please, send an urgent gift that we'll use to come to President Trump's defense.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62541721:6H6SgSGiN:m:1:3331421248:3DB8806F9B69E7A57DD9A8BD8987F8EC:r)**

[**STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP
STOP THE WITCH HUNT ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62541721:6H6SgSGiN:m:1:3331421248:3DB8806F9B69E7A57DD9A8BD8987F8EC:r)
For nearly eight years, Democrat politicians at every level of government have tried and failed to **SILENCE Donald J. Trump**. They hate everything he stands for, the people he speaks for; they hate the man himself. The fact of the matter is: DEMOCRATS are scared that President TRUMP will be the Republican nominee for president in 2024, something which they just cannot allow to happen.

_**So, what do they do?**_

They resurrect a case brought against the President 7 years ago - which the Department of Justice declined to prosecute with the hope that they can make the charges stick this time.

**This is as political as it gets.** President Trump's indictment perfectly encapsulates why he ran for the White House in the first place: Power is concentrated in the hands of too few individuals who do not believe every American deserves equal protection under the law.

So much for a case that in March 2022, the _New York Times_ reported had "_unraveled_."

We need to stand with President Trump today. We need to show him that we have his back. We need to send a message to all the lunatic leftists that we're united against them in their quest to destroy him. **[Chip in right now, and let's send a message to Democrats: This will backfire on you, BIGLY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62541721:6H6SgSGiN:m:1:3331421248:3DB8806F9B69E7A57DD9A8BD8987F8EC:r)**.

[**CHIP IN
STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62541721:6H6SgSGiN:m:1:3331421248:3DB8806F9B69E7A57DD9A8BD8987F8EC:r)
Democrats have promulgated false narratives against President Trump since before he was elected. They've spent millions of YOUR tax dollars on bogus investigations that have all been debunked. **Now, their political theater has reached a dangerous new low.**

If the arrest of former President Trump infuriates you as much as it does me, **[I'm asking you to chip in any amount right now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62541721:6H6SgSGiN:m:1:3331421248:3DB8806F9B69E7A57DD9A8BD8987F8EC:r)**.

God Bless,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62541720:6H6SgSGiN:m:1:3331421248:3DB8806F9B69E7A57DD9A8BD8987F8EC:r)
Jim Jordan

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [ ** JOIN JIM **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62541721:6H6SgSGiN:m:1:3331421248:3DB8806F9B69E7A57DD9A8BD8987F8EC:r)

---

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

Delaware, OH 43015

Friend, **With Israel’s recent bombings on Gaza, it’s more urgent than ever to use our power in the U.S. to stop funding massacres and apartheid.** **Right now, I want to lift up Adalah Justice Project, a Palestinian-led, U.S-based organization that’s been a critical ally in our fight for true justice for Palestinians.** Adalah Justice Project is building a movement to shift U.S. policy and discourse on Palestine, building solidarity and humanizing Palestinians. Among their campaigns to build solidarity is “Gaza is Palestine,” a vital project exposing Israel’s ongoing siege of 2 million refugees who are trapped in the world’s largest open air prison. clean_body: Support Palestinian-led organizing today. | | | Friend, With Israel’s recent bombings on Gaza, it’s more urgent than ever to use our power in the U.S. to stop funding massacres and apartheid. Right now, I want to lift up Adalah Justice Project, a Palestinian-led, U.S-based organization that’s been a critical ally in our fight for true justice for Palestinians. Adalah Justice Project is building a movement to shift U.S. policy and discourse on Palestine, building solidarity and humanizing Palestinians. Among their campaigns to build solidarity is “Gaza is Palestine,” a vital project exposing Israel’s ongoing siege of 2 million refugees who are trapped in the world’s largest open air prison. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to Aladah Justice Project | | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much for acting in solidarity with Palestinians. Please feel free to read our prior email for more information about the recent attacks by Israeli forces. \- Rashida Tlaib \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Apr 8, 2023 Subject: Responding to attacks on Gaza, the world’s largest open air prison: To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Israel’s military just bombed Gaza, damaging a children’s hospital while patients were inside. This bombing came after the apartheid government of Israel brutally beat worshippers at Al Aqsa mosque, destroying the on-site medical clinic and then blocking medical aid for wounded Palestinians. We cannot allow the U.S. to keep funding the violent attacks on Palestinians. One of the crucial movement partners I work with to push for changes to U.S. policy in Palestine is the Palestinian-led, U.S.-based Adalah Justice Project. Adalah Justice Project has been building the U.S. movement for Palestinian rights and expanding solidarity for Palestine. With the latest attacks on Gaza, I want to lift up their campaign “Gaza is Palestine,” which is exposing Israel’s ongoing siege of 2 million refugees who are trapped in the world’s largest open air prison. We must urgently stop the oppression committed by Israel’s apartheid government -- and Adalah Justice Project is helping to build a powerful movement to push back against Israel’s racist policies. I am grateful to Adalah Justice Project for their analysis, messaging, and support during my time in Congress on the issues facing the Palestinian people. Adalah Justice Project’s work has been crucial in shifting hearts and minds, while deepening ties between Palestine solidarity and the interlocking network of struggles for justice in the U.S. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to Aladah Justice Project | | | | | | | | | I am proud to work alongside you and Adalah Justice Project to build toward true justice for the Palestinian people. name: Chloe Cole
subject: I’m one of the girls who was deceived by the transgender movement
body:
You don't know me but I'm hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson.

| |
---
| |
# FROM THE DESK OF CHLOE COLE
---
|
---
Dear Friend, My name is Chloe.
---
| | You don't know me but I'm hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson. There are lots of powerful people who don't want my story to get out, so I'm so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest.

| | [**Even though we don 't know each other, I'm writing you today hoping you'll help me stop the** **horror of what happened to me, from happening to other children and their parents.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=58ae1136c34a4f3691fb2a3443704d01&_e=uayiQv3A6zIHvyF0SdhltTTGrQrJ6diXCZm5Eymoi2dVKP48ZSFi-yxhGNse1oaWflwYLS15b86H-7znpfhkAKpQWI5kCRh-CQXqudc3yb_b5l5QTyyeE6nfS1lH1lwy5q4bQcFkKZYFr8GRkqrP81mUSOtXTS3FOzYIbvEvZ0uWXKZ2M9QhaXoRuQSf44YMWZ2DQ2k0MV54I7nuDUCyDJgbatwY7HXw7QR3M4qJy1x2Fk8CIiF5AvVWIalu3VsM3-WTvBj4_r-HazSCBhXx9xa5G9S06dIdkY3tGufUSWtYHcWlIP14UbKHynbo9bFdCfcF9pl8tsbQfazEn4ZFik6pzKJK_gudW45JIL1GVooqotqQNgnVlgKmkmI8Rfrk) It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. But I found 'friends' on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body. And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me. I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I'd be valued and loved even more. Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender. They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to "experts" who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide. **The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: "Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?" ** Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant "saving" me. When they signed those forms, it wasn't informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress. And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. [**Will you help me fight so these radical doctors and hospitals can 't prey on another scared, confused, lonely child like they did me?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=58ae1136c34a4f3691fb2a3443704d01&_e=uayiQv3A6zIHvyF0SdhltTTGrQrJ6diXCZm5Eymoi2dVKP48ZSFi-yxhGNse1oaWflwYLS15b86H-7znpfhkAKpQWI5kCRh-CQXqudc3yb_b5l5QTyyeE6nfS1lH1lwy5q4bQcFkKZYFr8GRkqrP81mUSOtXTS3FOzYIbvEvZ0uWXKZ2M9QhaXoRuQSf44YMWZ2DQ2k0MV54I7nuDUCyDJgbatwY7HXw7QR3M4qJy1wyVs4RvK9gejzSQmOqwqvpj3G2QjzB68D2YeYskvZErtFAyNoz38y4pQevVdpPSrfU1_WD9lti2dwwhsivxOTF8IFq-pkSDnXErGQRFMchwvkb6Vi9jJ2WydrPkbBSrDVM4kcYNZGA8TA4DrFaFPbl) The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders... ...and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy. I was fifteen years old. And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused. If you're like most people I tell my story to... right about now you're probably thinking, "HOW did it ever get this far?" And the answer is simple. The "experts" lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way. They claimed I would never get "better" unless I medically transitioned - when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they're transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body... ...while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks. They never told us that there isn't one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts. When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars. At age 18, I'm just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I'll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man's, my body will look like a boy's, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner. And my parents feel like they've failed me on every level imaginable. I can't go back. I can't change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical "experts." The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what's right and matches them with people like me who would have had nowhere else to turn. Right now, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going like: Brach v. Newsom \-- to stop California from shutting down private and religious schools... Ngo v. Roce City Antifa \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING... O 'Handley v. Padilla \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with... And now my case... Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente. The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. They have big cases but that doesn't mean they have the big money that their opponents have. There are big forces at work who want to get rich no matter who they hurt. Alone we're no match for them. , we can beat these monsters who are using scared, confused and lonely children to make a buck. For exposing them, I've been called a "liar." I've even been told de-transitioners like me don't exist. But when we beat them in court and stop them from hurting any more children with their lies and mutilations,I will be proud to face them and say: " You may have taken away my childhood, and forever changed my future -- but I exist. I exist." Thank you for reading this letter from a complete stranger. I hope I can call you a friend now. And thank you for whatever help you can send to the Center for American Liberty. every bit moves us closer to stopping these monsters. | | Thank you, Chloe Cole | | | P.S. This is a photo of me now. It's been a long, painful road but I'm finding happiness and purpose as I fight to make sure what happened to me NEVER happens to another child. Thank you so much for your help. --Chloe | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. (C) The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 | Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

From now through November 2024, we have a long road ahead of us in the fight to give our district the leadership we deserve, and it’s important that your voice is front and center of this grassroots campaign. name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Conservatives Debunk the Big Lie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
One of the Big Lies the Washington Establishment has always told is that Republicans can't walk and chew gum at the same time.

| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: One of the Big Lies the Washington Establishment has always told is that Republicans can't walk and chew gum at the same time. Conservatives, they said, have to choose between standing on principle and legislating -- you can't do both.
But the truth is, the Establishment never wanted to try.
They didn't want to defend our culture from woke attacks -- because they did not care about those issues. They didn't want to shine a light on government corruption -- because they profited from it. And they didn't want to push conservative policy because they preferred cutting deals with the Left.
---
---
U.S. Rep. Lauren Boebert (R-CO) / _Photo by Gage Skidmore_
---
**This year, conservatives have been in the driver 's seat -- and the results speak for themselves.**
Conservative-led House committees are investigating every crime and coverup of the Biden Administration -- from the border crisis to Covid censorship. Rep. Jim Jordan's subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government may prove to be the most effective oversight panel in decades.
Meanwhile, the House is passing conservative legislation, too. In just a few short months, House Republicans have passed the following: ✓ A bill to end Biden's War on Energy and boost domestic oil, natural gas, and nuclear power production. ✓ A "Parents Bill of Rights" to ensure moms and dads know what is going on in their children's classrooms and school libraries.

✓ Legislation rolling back Biden's plan to let woke Wall Street firms invest Americans' money according to political rather than financial goals.

✓ A bill to rescind Washington, D.C.'s efforts to free criminals and ease punishment for violent crimes.
Contrary to Establishment warnings, the last of these passed the Senate and was even signed into law by President Biden!
The choice conservatives face is not between fighting and winning -- _**it 's fighting that makes winning possible**_. Yes, the strategy makes it harder for insiders and lobbyists to broker the bipartisan deals they want -- but that's the point!
The GOP establishment led the party for decades -- and led it into a ditch. Conservatives have the numbers to set strategy and policy in Congress, and for the first time in memory, they are using them.
It's a huge win -- for the country, conservatives, and the House Freedom Fund. Our candidates and our allies are leading the charge. **[Please help us continue to advance the principles and values that make our country great by supporting the House Freedom Fund and our priority candidates.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=755d757304144558b937507d2eae28ab&_e=_0CPSdx1EmVU5VyhpjVMVSfsqE0ro753xGqHjtnWbtcwcpNEjInL7M8D3HOkewUFlOnfXXveTTV79ITSdX9IXxmH4gVLZetVlouA4RK0EVXb8qTx_cEgLDEHx4B0vw6wI9HJA-sj7HLmL5_NOTrjXXRZ36FwcF_TsPd_Vc0NuyqDF6RyRSsq1G_nEVSp60nwvoLu1P5N0GeqqxcTH8W-9cob8cKsV2hIrgy-9Nds36OWNCaHJ_YM4Jg586ooaHQQ)** _When you support candidates through HFF, we pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donations to their campaigns._
Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**SUPPORT THE HOUSE FREEDOM CAUCUS**

---

Lauren Boebert (R-CO) / Photo by Gage Skidmore This year, conservatives have been in the driver 's seat -- and the results speak for themselves. Conservative-led House committees are investigating every crime and coverup of the Biden Administration -- from the border crisis to Covid censorship. Rep. Jim Jordan's subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government may prove to be the most effective oversight panel in decades. Meanwhile, the House is passing conservative legislation, too. In just a few short months, House Republicans have passed the following: ✓ A bill to end Biden's War on Energy and boost domestic oil, natural gas, and nuclear power production. ✓ A "Parents Bill of Rights" to ensure moms and dads know what is going on in their children's classrooms and school libraries. ✓ Legislation rolling back Biden's plan to let woke Wall Street firms invest Americans' money according to political rather than financial goals. ✓ A bill to rescind Washington, D.C.'s efforts to free criminals and ease punishment for violent crimes. Contrary to Establishment warnings, the last of these passed the Senate and was even signed into law by President Biden! The choice conservatives face is not between fighting and winning -- it 's fighting that makes winning possible. Yes, the strategy makes it harder for insiders and lobbyists to broker the bipartisan deals they want -- but that's the point! The GOP establishment led the party for decades -- and led it into a ditch. Conservatives have the numbers to set strategy and policy in Congress, and for the first time in memory, they are using them. It's a huge win -- for the country, conservatives, and the House Freedom Fund. Our candidates and our allies are leading the charge. When you support candidates through HFF, we pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donations to their campaigns. Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future. Sincerely, Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund | | SUPPORT THE HOUSE FREEDOM CAUCUS The House Freedom Fund is the only political group in America that is exclusively dedicated to defending and expanding the House Freedom Caucus. Please support our conservative mission by making a one-time or monthly donation today! | "The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." - Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH) | House Freedom Fund 300 Independence Ave SE Washington, DC 20003 House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans. Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. PAID FOR BY HOUSE FREEDOM FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. HOUSEFREEDOMFUND.COM Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Most hateful organization in America
body:
Now, I know what you’re thinking...

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvrlh4fbfmonuite2n5bj4kmmn71me5cdrj5bb1o_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm0ob6cth2bs)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmlpm8nk9113nuf1799otkkkja8v2719nolrntqo_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm0ob6cth2bs)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2vl9adhqi2jcgdr9791moaujto1k06io19kco58_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm0ob6cth2bs)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhlo1ie443dnb4btncmtl218tia3sqvr8h96kqco_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm0ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztu1601dn0umb3of8vo3ve4mvhnkmrkum5ifmmcg_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm0ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl153lgle14vmp7r7o4bv82ii03sr68bjii84qag_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm0ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgcpltbirkrticitgm7ihq0kghqotu5cdgqtm7qo_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm0ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjb97qfsfvd12ajqmqnbm2apf8mull8umvjdcmb0_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm0ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zeqivd10tc1s1u4fe7kun6a5feon84h7v1265bfg_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm0ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zur25l2f10sekd2p4v0pk9c28r6linqk3j8344sg_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm0ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgdt4e88pra8cq43jfgqmcrickmgn3jioknekdl8_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm0ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z22dk3s55fhot54snd1pvpjss1l7n8un55jassvg_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm0ob6cth2bs)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5k6ohbnovh2ie9210echoamjo4tu6djso1c93eo_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm0ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuslcbvqndehh941cihubn2pleqbio58ih1nll80_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm0ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpnt2qbbi9qkj0qtpmjg6svi2iamff8g3rvelc88_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm0ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zksndmqoacmmn675o9aeo25lu5jbvhqgsd8fe1eg_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm0ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj6hq0da1l5v05gbaqkl4nkm2mode5llljlrsgt0_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm0ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqbqo1islrf5d45q4v84gguilue5ecbgvv2oogug_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm0ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zciud619j3h8u9f1qspgm39ca8j9sq0pk16ua408_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm0ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbd7832tctcq4t1omjiv25jp5re0farus76u47q8_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm0ob6cth2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zea2rdmc0f7q460mobd43cncpqgibsm1t03778i8_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm0ob6cth2bs)

People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?"

It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us.

_" If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens_

We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end.

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum
Co-Founder
BLEXIT Foundation

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo7kobq1s9rg1m5pkcngcoa7kcbt707k84gtul18_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8o30shge4pb246h22sh2s8i66o74chhm0ob6cth2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp3h8ref4jps12ilrnl6cfafregtab4dqikqsrm8_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm0ob6cth2bs)_

name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: "Abortion pill access in jeopardy after judges issue conflicting rulings"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Mifepristone is still legal and accessible. But it's clear that conservative lawmakers and judges won't stop attacking reproductive rights. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61581257/400531517/-1888718630?refcode=em23_230410_pill_fnd_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230410_pill_fnd_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=2e0da166-c1d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTBkYTE2Ni1jMWQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5iNtXuGWtq06zLcyg-1IxNY103vRo9dTj7UmH88odQ=)
**Abortion pill access in jeopardy after judges issue conflicting rulings**

"A federal judge in Texas stayed the FDA's approval of the drug mifepristone, while a federal judge in Washington state blocked any FDA change in access." Peter,

On Friday, a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas reversed a longstanding approval by the FDA for this commonly-used abortion drug.

Mifepristone was safe and effective when the FDA first approved it over two decades ago and still is. This disastrous ruling would halt the supply of this safe medication in _all_ states and make accessing abortion care even more difficult for millions of Americans.

However, a federal judge here in Washington issued a conflicting ruling and the Biden administration has appealed the Texas ruling.

**Right now, Mifepristone is still legal and accessible. But it's clear that conservative lawmakers and judges won't stop attacking reproductive rights.**

As a doctor and as a congresswoman, Kim will always work to ensure women have access to safe reproductive health care. That's why she's fighting back against extremist attacks on abortion access, but she needs to know you're with her.

**[If you're with Kim in the fight to defend abortion care for women in all 50 states, contribute today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61581258/400531518/-1888718630?refcode=em23_230410_pill_fnd_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230410_pill_fnd_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=2e0da166-c1d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTBkYTE2Ni1jMWQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5iNtXuGWtq06zLcyg-1IxNY103vRo9dTj7UmH88odQ=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61581259/400531519/-1888718630?refcode=em23_230410_pill_fnd_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230410_pill_fnd_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=2e0da166-c1d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTBkYTE2Ni1jMWQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5iNtXuGWtq06zLcyg-1IxNY103vRo9dTj7UmH88odQ=)

clean_body: Mifepristone is still legal and accessible. But it's clear that conservative lawmakers and judges won't stop attacking reproductive rights. = Abortion pill access in jeopardy after judges issue conflicting rulings "A federal judge in Texas stayed the FDA's approval of the drug mifepristone, while a federal judge in Washington state blocked any FDA change in access." Peter, On Friday, a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas reversed a longstanding approval by the FDA for this commonly-used abortion drug. Mifepristone was safe and effective when the FDA first approved it over two decades ago and still is. This disastrous ruling would halt the supply of this safe medication in all states and make accessing abortion care even more difficult for millions of Americans. However, a federal judge here in Washington issued a conflicting ruling and the Biden administration has appealed the Texas ruling. Right now, Mifepristone is still legal and accessible. But it's clear that conservative lawmakers and judges won't stop attacking reproductive rights. As a doctor and as a congresswoman, Kim will always work to ensure women have access to safe reproductive health care. That's why she's fighting back against extremist attacks on abortion access, but she needs to know you're with her. = | = Thanks, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

| | I won’t lie, Peter, **_I’m worried._**

When I was putting together the budget for the GA Dems for 2023, I knew we’d need to start talking to voters right now to win in 2024 so I budgeted a LOT of resources into our voter outreach program.

What I could never in a million years have expected was how much free airtime Donald Trump is getting out of this indictment!

**_CNN was covering Trump’s motorcade heading to the airport like it was the OJ Simpson white Bronco chase!_**

[**_If the news covers the Trump trial anywhere close to how they covered him in 2016, then we’re going to really need to up our budget for voter outreach.
