subject: Join us at one of our exciting Heart of the Party events near you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join us in the fight to move Washington State in the RIGHT direction!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I am running as an outsider
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
It’s going to take an outsider in the White House to deliver the results we need to put America back on track.

| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15945%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kzurevjZ8tRAXYvPgAy7hQ&sysid=1)
Fellow American,

A professional politician can't make the changes we need to deliver for America.

We need an outsider with the courage to GUT the managerial bureaucracy that has grown so toxic and corrupt that it undermines American values.

Fellow American, I am that outsider.

I've never held public office. I haven't spent years dialing for dollars from big donors - so I am not beholden to them. I am not beholden to ANYONE.

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15945%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kzurevjZ8tRAXYvPgAy7hQ&sysid=1)
We must change how things are done in Washington - I am ready to take on this fight. I am investing my own money, but I can't do this alone.

I am not asking for a lot - _**[just $1 or even $5 before midnight.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15946%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Xy%2bgJil4Z6ELfu6slQ5Y3g&sysid=1)**_

My goal is to boost our number of unique donors in this race, so a little bit from conservatives like you across the country will help us fuel this movement.

Let's do this together, Fellow American.

I am counting on you,

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15945%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kzurevjZ8tRAXYvPgAy7hQ&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW → **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15947%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ARegQVWFh8tU2ivDmB7ZUQ&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15948%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wyim14g9pZLrZKv%2f7YpQCA&sysid=1)

---

| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15949%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6PlSvS2pwctE%2frf4r8%2fvzQ&sysid=1) | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15940%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BbI3uWkj3FU8RpKKgKNi%2bw&sysid=1) | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15941%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PcDsbUW%2b0GrmqyyIWU78Wg&sysid=1)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e10037be42141d69700afcd28d7edc8&_e=ZqduFJBAnEeuuOhNeHQIdDuIcQt7jAxpothmQPprbXnMl5kH2QWAq_24SIUsJJiPapZg9p0HheiqeyNl-U6W_hlFg8kLSizJepxc8Rsr0ObnA2GuElep9eeiIT47Cj88trWLfvuUgW2Q5Fe0-e-wPWcmYq0Tyl8C_3yyzNFiLBgRN6CKtpszN5vmq1EyHJ2uRlKmFPdAKzbDWUE8QV6h4l6oGOILqDATgkXVccjvN2GRfL1VA6_6l8gg2LCQ-9VZ4TY1ThdiCyDF3I0KQjmmdQ%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e10037be42141d69700afcd28d7edc8&_e=ZqduFJBAnEeuuOhNeHQIdDuIcQt7jAxpothmQPprbXnMl5kH2QWAq_24SIUsJJiPapZg9p0HheiqeyNl-U6W_hlFg8kLSizJepxc8Rsr0ObnA2GuElep9eeiIT47Cj88oAF4JzcpoJrrv587kRMVj2w2FxkJdNb1U-Bn1HRctJI4O4Pc38uvL5kT33NWl3D5bybu24-BGRlc-LQI7wmYlbr5CBfMcnztY97kjh_bzEja28-thUs7bGhAdhGguubcv2RVxK0PZ2TTQqxEMRe03g%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e10037be42141d69700afcd28d7edc8&_e=ZqduFJBAnEeuuOhNeHQIdDuIcQt7jAxpothmQPprbXnMl5kH2QWAq_24SIUsJJiPapZg9p0HheiqeyNl-U6W_hlFg8kLSizJepxc8Rsr0ObnA2GuElep9eeiIT47Cj88-TmedTzYaFHGh--C5LbBtPu2d2OedI9RtOITz7_SSA6oRQ3olVaD7APnGl5RJ4jBbe3FAnpPzrkDlhI7lJ0L6O5-nV38Ao_M66CvIqxiwQcdGlrk9TgSb9JPkzJPKxxmulI71B1JPwzPcmPqPoJ5Ow%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e10037be42141d69700afcd28d7edc8&_e=ZqduFJBAnEeuuOhNeHQIdDuIcQt7jAxpothmQPprbXnMl5kH2QWAq_24SIUsJJiPapZg9p0HheiqeyNl-U6W_hlFg8kLSizJepxc8Rsr0ObnA2GuElep9eeiIT47Cj88XZ8YWKwYHMLLgJpo7y-MWWh4Rw0DzXWfw2bNB9BbWsk6_45wmkNKrzI3pk06CnlUteKzgEpIGT3iiGiEJKDn3tdQ2UFEfso2NHoi6FxvzSr-znj11XKkM3dywmlFDj9HG2Aiwp-CtlnJQ26qOi4kMA%3D%3D)

clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. name: Bob Casey
subject: I'm making a big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
I want you to be the first to know.
| | |
---
Hi folks,
I want you to be the first to know: **I’m running for reelection.**
It’s an honor to represent my fellow Pennsylvanians in the Senate, and it is their trust that drives me to get up every day and fight for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities.
**But know this: Mitch McConnell and the GOP are already coming for this seat. I won’t be able to win this reelection fight alone.**
**[If you’re with me, will you split a donation between Maggie Hassan and our campaign today? This is poised to be one of the most competitive elections in the country, so your support will make a huge impact on the start of this race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61582332/400536059/298941548?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2252-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODQ5ZTQ5Yi1jNGQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vu2dAaUjWqRHUuzpy0fFcA15SMYcjvwo8x8DgL3MytU=)**
| | [Chip in $3 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61582333/400536060/298941548?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2252-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODQ5ZTQ5Yi1jNGQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vu2dAaUjWqRHUuzpy0fFcA15SMYcjvwo8x8DgL3MytU=)
---
In 2022, Pennsylvania’s Senate race gave Democrats our slim, 51-seat majority. That means next year, our opponents are going to do everything they can to flip Pennsylvania red.
Republicans are already targeting this Senate seat and running attack ads. To defeat them, we’re going to earn support from Pennsylvanians from Erie to Scranton.
**Folks, I’m no stranger to hard fights.** I’ve been standing up for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities for my whole career, and I won’t stop now. There’s still more work to do to cut through the gridlock, take on the powerful special interests, and deliver real results for working families and children across our commonwealth.
But it’s going to take all of us. The first 24 hours of fundraising are critical to the success of this campaign.
**[Become a Founding Donor and join our team by splitting a donation between our campaign and Maggie Hassan’s today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61582334/400536061/298941548?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2252-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODQ5ZTQ5Yi1jNGQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vu2dAaUjWqRHUuzpy0fFcA15SMYcjvwo8x8DgL3MytU=)**
In a race as important as this one, people like you make all the difference.
Thank you,
Bob Casey
| If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, **[donate now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61582335/400536062/-1829049351?refcode=email-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODQ5ZTQ5Yi1jNGQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vu2dAaUjWqRHUuzpy0fFcA15SMYcjvwo8x8DgL3MytU=)**. clean_body: I want you to be the first to know. | | | Hi folks, I want you to be the first to know: I’m running for reelection. It’s an honor to represent my fellow Pennsylvanians in the Senate, and it is their trust that drives me to get up every day and fight for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities. But know this: Mitch McConnell and the GOP are already coming for this seat. I won’t be able to win this reelection fight alone. = | | = In 2022, Pennsylvania’s Senate race gave Democrats our slim, 51-seat majority. That means next year, our opponents are going to do everything they can to flip Pennsylvania red. Republicans are already targeting this Senate seat and running attack ads. To defeat them, we’re going to earn support from Pennsylvanians from Erie to Scranton. Folks, I’m no stranger to hard fights. I’ve been standing up for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities for my whole career, and I won’t stop now. There’s still more work to do to cut through the gridlock, take on the powerful special interests, and deliver real results for working families and children across our commonwealth. But it’s going to take all of us. The first 24 hours of fundraising are critical to the success of this campaign. = In a race as important as this one, people like you make all the difference. Thank you, Bob Casey | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Our hearts are with the Louisville community
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This should not be a typical Monday morning in America
#

Friends -
As we began our days today, we were shaken by the news of yet another mass shooting—this time in Louisville, Kentucky.
This morning, a shooter opened fire at a bank in downtown Louisville. At least four people were killed, and eight more have been taken to the hospital for their injuries—including two law enforcement officers.
This should not be a typical Monday morning in America. Yet this is a situation we have seen unfold time and time again.
My heart aches for the Louisville community. Four families have now lost a loved one to a senseless act of violence. Eight more are now waiting with bated breath, hoping that their loved one will survive their injuries.
Our country is in a constant cycle of violence and mourning. When will enough be enough?
There are real, commonsense solutions to end America’s gun violence epidemic, but our elected officials must choose to have the courage to act.
Nobody should have to live their life in fear of getting shot while running routine errands like going to the bank. I will not rest until we see a future where we can go about our daily lives without the fear of gunfire in our communities.
Please, keep standing with me in this crucial fight.
Sincerely,
Gabby Giffords
* * *

**GIFFORDS PAC works to end gun violence by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. A contribution to GIFFORDS PAC goes directly towards our work to save lives.**
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr23.fjJHm6&refcode=em230410-1-60&t=1&akid=4903%2E3935704%2EohsbPU)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=4903%2E3935704%2EohsbPU) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

subject: What’s Wrong with ERIC? Judicial Watch Study Details Left-Leaning Roots, Data Security Concerns, Possible Violations of Federal Law at the Electronic Registration Information Center
body:
Republican-leaning states are bailing out of the reputedly non-partisan Electronic Registration Information Center (ERIC) and the media are in an uproar. National Public Radio declares that ERIC is a victim of a “far right...disinformation campaign.” The New York Times warns that ERIC is under attack from “election deniers.” The very “backbone of American elections is being upended,” says Politico.

| | |

clean_body: Republican-leaning states are bailing out of the reputedly non-partisan Electronic Registration Information Center (ERIC) and the media are in an uproar. National Public Radio declares that ERIC is a victim of a “far right...disinformation campaign.” The New York Times warns that ERIC is under attack from “election deniers.” The very “backbone of American elections is being upended,” says Politico. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Apr 10, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Republican-leaning states are bailing out of the reputedly non-partisan Electronic Registration Information Center (ERIC) and the media are in an uproar. National Public Radio declares that ERIC is a victim of a “far right...disinformation campaign.” The New York Times warns that ERIC is under attack from “election deniers.” The very “backbone of American elections is being upended,” says Politico. ---|--- | | | | | The Secret Service acknowledged receipt of the request and wrote in a January 20. 2023, letter that it had found responsive records and was processing them. At the time of the complaint, however, it had not produced any of the records. ---|--- | | | | | In the Biden administration’s latest move to accommodate the transgender population, the Homeland Security agency that oversees lawful immigration will accept the gender selection of foreign nationals on official forms even if it does not match supporting documentation. Additionally, foreigners requesting immigration benefits do not need to submit proof of gender identity when submitting a request to change genders. ---|--- | | | | | In testimony before the “House Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government” Taibbi reported extensive collusion between Big Tech and government, at all levels – including the Biden White House, the Democratic National Committee, and federal, state and local law enforcement – all meant to stifle free speech and withhold information from the American people. ---|--- | | | Fox News On Twitter, critics of the Vice President slammed for getting this “loud” and several mocked her for defending the intimidating Tennessee capitol protests, when Democrats have linked conservative calls to protest to incitement of violence. Echoing Democratic Party rhetoric about Republicans who encourage protest, Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton asked, “Incitement to insurrection?” Washington Examiner Judicial Watch did not come out and say that it knew of any dog-biting by Commander. But President Tom Fitton strongly suggested it. “Judicial Watch already caught the Biden White House lying about their family dog attacking and injuring Secret Service and White House employees,” he said. “Now it seems their new dog is also out of control and the Secret Service is hiding records about the issue.” CNS News In an Apr. 4 statement, Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said, “What a sad day for America. And what a blow to the rule of law and our republican form of government. Today, President Trump and the American people were abused and victimized by New York Democrat politician Alvin Bragg, who abused his office to try to jail a man he must know to be innocent.” | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved |

body:
This is where we are in the fight to protect access to abortion. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61582582/400536870/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230410_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTIxMTc3OTYtYzVkNy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GCAbh42N39AlP7QBiFFzmHexWWAHnilZsApUfcQJ_78=)
---
Peter, Late Friday night, a federal judge in Texas issued a ruling that reversed FDA approval of mifepristone, one step of the two-pill medication abortion regimen — the most common form of abortion in the United States. Less than an hour later, another federal judge in Washington issued a contradictory ruling saying the FDA should not restrict access to mifepristone in any state where abortion remains legal. On top of that, the Justice Department has already appealed the Texas judge’s ruling, and the case is expected to work its way through the appeals court, possibly all the way to the Supreme Court. Right now, the fate of this drug is in limbo, and even legal experts are unsure of what comes next. [_**We’re fighting back with everything in our arsenal to preserve access to mifepristone, but we need your help. Can you pitch in any amount today to our Rapid Response Mifepristone Fund? name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: No more professional politicians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
It’s going to take an outsider in the White House to deliver the results we need to put America back on track.

| [](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79716%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7Lzv0IJO3%2fUEkQBkpqjfoQ&sysid=1)
Fellow American,

A professional politician can't make the changes we need to deliver for America.

We need an outsider with the courage to GUT the managerial bureaucracy that has grown so toxic and corrupt that it undermines American values.

Fellow American, I am that outsider.

I've never held public office. I haven't spent years dialing for dollars from big donors - so I am not beholden to them. I am not beholden to ANYONE.

[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79716%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7Lzv0IJO3%2fUEkQBkpqjfoQ&sysid=1)
We must change how things are done in Washington - I am ready to take on this fight. I am investing my own money, but I can't do this alone.

I am not asking for a lot - _**[just $1 or even $5 before midnight.](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79717%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gu5%2fF7HQ%2fHMiEpwCHG6aHA&sysid=1)**_

My goal is to boost our number of unique donors in this race, so a little bit from conservatives like you across the country will help us fuel this movement.

Let's do this together, Fellow American.

I am counting on you,

[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79716%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7Lzv0IJO3%2fUEkQBkpqjfoQ&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW → **](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79718%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U14lrb8pZDmmxIo90rzteg&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79719%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KbXN3hHxJyJbt5LiSb7cXw&sysid=1)

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: BLM vs Blexit
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5lmml141oro1badvvgbj9ufod166jgpjs4j6km0_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm4oj2clh2bs)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlg85c79ikteoa8chnkshhdhvhkdbft4hnnlsnd0_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm4oj2clh2bs)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2cd6jrk9ll6e2jtt1a5lqpe530sehfepcj2cu38_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm4oj2clh2bs)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhqlcsn25885nib712i20n94f3oo8jdga0g4bmq8_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm4oj2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkn437ks6kck0rjbdlrp5m59n9po4psvos3h4k20_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm4oj2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztnf13dri3rnsha69h341d6p77t66b41tqkfg2b0_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm4oj2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4amu7jefdr3mq9rs2pn6du2d1hgombbfnrsfpug_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm4oj2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z629io3b50osno2sbsqiviedpr24o7u0bsge38v8_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm4oj2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgqr986jmfhntuucapegpmn56g1msd1987uh48k8_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm4oj2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlq6qglu91fvo6nu8284f3f66kokrp1rv8dm3mu0_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm4oj2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z397qg059c583i33eng92lfmgpviod78cimml1bo_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm4oj2clh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zodjcmlibpnni16tsq6lds91s6iv7ismib5ub2c0_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm4oj2clh2bs)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmsq3pjj7aq6m08ans0deqmqvfl9ln532kmsbusg_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm4oj2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4plj0htjs74g7s06a9r1019arn0kernf8etbtlo_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm4oj2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvu14evo2023loharll8mhho1c58tdncd3ah3pog_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm4oj2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdfqtsttbokvl5dja0nmhodnbd4kkkglmo27g1fo_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm4oj2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1cvtes31s03j35cumh8l0d82qa51j17p20b4nuo_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm4oj2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl7cr1id7326pdjhdaiciij03amk32166rkuaf78_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm4oj2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmemrku69c1rsabeobcdo06iv7m6iipb4inta47g_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm4oj2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztu924sorg66e8g6g6kcd3uqtrd1s8ec7aeic7d8_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm4oj2clh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo1ecdiom4kasae9nca2tkmt3jpanqnenj1o6jq0_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm4oj2clh2bs)

People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?"

It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us.

_" If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens_

We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end.

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum
Co-Founder
BLEXIT Foundation

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb8vjhk8i98sg17rsg953gd6augpsmmachjb6uvo_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm4oj2clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp30c3i61pb4s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0ltplicsbmva6hrg8s864nq7g04flp64rtcol4g_rp22sh2s8i66o74chhm4oj2clh2bs)_

body:
Justice Thomas’s million-dollar ‘gifts’
| | | | |

| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6cf18e9f-5e74-48ac-959a-a77f6d62a678/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Clarence Thomas is morally, intellectually and emotionally unfit to be a Supreme Court Justice.** __It's long been clear, from accusations of sexual harassment during and since Anita Hill to his cozy retreats with the Kochs, lack of understanding of our Constitution, statements to clerks that his mission was to "make liberals miserable" and refusal to recuse from cases involving sedition by his wife, Ginni.__ _Yet, it gets...worse. _**Harlan Crow, Texas billionaire who finances Republicans, has been taking Clarence & Ginni on extravagant yacht excursions and ultra-luxurious trips for years. One trip to Indonesia--one trip!--cost Crow $500,000! None of this was EVER reported in Thomas' financial disclosures, while Crow and affiliated orgs have had cases before the Supreme Court.** **_Also, I almost forgot, Crow has a Hitler fetish.__He owns two of The Fuhrer's paintings, a signed copy of Mein Kampf, Hitler's teapot with his engraved initials and a set of Nazi table linen. Crow proudly shows off these items._** _So, to be clear,_** Thomas has taken millions of dollars in undisclosed trips from a Nazi lover who has business before his court. Ya know, normal stuff!** **_Thomas must be impeached._**_ But, we don't have the numbers in Congress right now._ [**_So, Demand Justice is fighting to add members to The Court to dilute his power._** **_Will you join us in fighting a corrupt extremist bought & paid for by a Hitler fetishist by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Demand Justice?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te26f9b66-9b22-4f7b-88ec-a6a51759dbd8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting to take corruption and hate out of our courts._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. Peter,

There is a disturbing trend on the left-- Transgender activists are increasingly emboldened to attack those who oppose them. Time after time, we watch the left enable the rhetoric and justify the violence-- **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!** I was ambushed and assaulted by a transgender activist after speaking to a group of students at San Francisco State University. Students gathered wanting to hear the pro-woman side of the sports debate but were impeded by transgender activists, shouting, cursing, and threatening. This left-wing intimidation campaign won't work! This is only more evidence that I'm fighting the good fight, and proof that women need sex-protected spaces! I know what I'm doing is right. When they want you silent, speak louder. I'm on the frontlines fighting for women and girls and speaking TRUTH to all, even those who refuse to hear it. [**Will you step up and stand with me in this fight? Donate to NinePAC and help me continue to speak TRUTH where it's not welcome and FIGHT to protect the future of women's sports!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62541724:673NQqGlN:m:1:3331421248:9112226E89FF8A50AEEE85B6162DBABA:r)

name: STOP ADAM SCHIFF
subject: He’s trying to become a Senator!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stop Adam PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee
body:
We are officially launching STOP ADAM SCHIFF PAC to oppose Lying Adam Schiff and hold him accountable for his power grabbing and radical agenda. | [](http://links.stopschiff.com/u/click?_t=7a69a2ad3aaa47be8a239bad1d321978&_m=03bc1b9a69694877886b15dc40a90465&_e=kiWahfXfSYimUZLalGlt8hCd-YEIG1w-4HHsl7jeLdlS3VMTr_A7PonYA2WU9lv4CtYsk6CDg__RNhwwUv100nYtIXrNx6KG7l4z6IzAtcySDwsZGQDC4ZunQ20oX9O-jVg52_oW20ztNsUh6Fc80jkWpayEJw30r0a43lRfb1LSzbAxoQIKery8qlAse9pcTSZtsapnU2-dhAghqaUWUX8PQX5Cb5Y9Ye9xUCn1NBdi_k0g8V1hQHDPJu5rpKDs8tL78GqjNQvqh7QxgIctooaZRsDBKTd-JH1VUueie-uMLhPwVMFk2HB5rhSUyw5uhjwVZ7eEiuoOTtVfMj66he5uwT_IoUNxOMnt9Wfufi7gkJ_PZKtNPEzYCX_mdN3mDgV3_Q0fR0rRO0yS6Zvm_A%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

**FIRST** , Adam Schiff led House Democrats’ 2-year-long, taxpayer-funded, politically motivated, bogus “investigation” against President Trump.

**THEN** , he used that witch hunt against President Trump to enhance his own political profile and raise millions of dollars.

**NOW** , Adam Schiff is leveraging his fame among the Left into a campaign for U.S. Senate in California.

Peter,

As LGBTQ+ Americans face a wave of hateful and dangerous legislation in Congress and in state houses across the country, we must stand together to defend the LGBTQ+ community.

Seth firmly believes that every American should have the right to be who they are, love who they love, and live authentically every day. In Congress, he will always push back on hateful legislation that attacks LGBTQ+ Americans.

name: Josh Harder
subject: I’m being attacked by Kevin McCarthy!
body:

The worst kept secret in the state of Florida is that Governor Ron DeSantis is running for President in 2024, and will be primarying President Donald J Trump for the GOP nomination. And after seeing how successful Big Tech executives were in influencing the 2020 Presidential election, Big Tech isn't skipping a beat ahead of 2024 to stop President Trump from being the Republican Party nominee. They are doing this by supporting Governor Ron DeSantis, with help from Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy, his son Connor McCarthy, and Kevin's favorite Congressional attack dog, Marjorie Taylor Greene who exists for the sake of helping protect Kevin McCarthy's pro-Trump facade while he is secretly plotting against President Trump and the MAGA movement with his best friend, former Speaker of the House, and DeSantis supporter Paul Ryan.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fc4c4bce-252d-4a86-914a-888b17aeb139?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

They say if you want loyalty, you should buy a dog, but it seems like Washington is full of rabid animals and dirty rats who don't think twice before biting the hand that has fed them and supported their bloated political careers.
If you haven't noticed, Governor DeSantis is now an absentee Governor ever since launching his shadow Presidential campaign that has indiscreetly been disguised as a "book tour" following the release of DeSantis's new multi million dollar book deal via the Rupert Murdoch owned Harper Collins publishing company, as I have reported on extensively.

He is expected to officially file for President in May 2023 at the end of the Florida legislative session when the Florida legislature [changes Florida's "Resign to Run" law, so that DeSantis doesn't have to resign his position as Governor when he files to run for President.](https://substack.com/redirect/45278dc3-7d48-470c-b7aa-561b808d2a3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

But, that isn't stopping DeSantis from illegally running a shadow Presidential campaign and raising campaign cash in violation of FEC laws, and state election laws. Nor does it stop DeSantis's many plutocrat supporters from (Legally) paying off the Governor with a check written out for "bulk book sales". Everyone knows a "book deal" is the easiest way to launder political cash.
So, where exactly is DeSantis getting funding? Well, he's having "book events" and "speaking events", aka campaign fundraisers, out of state as he continues to travel the country campaigning for President on Florida Taxpayer dime.
In March of this year,[ President Trump's PAC filed an officials complaint ](https://substack.com/redirect/111a096e-bc63-48b4-a16b-da8d255e6671?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)with the Florida Commission on Ethics accusing Gov. Ron DeSantis of violating campaign finance and ethics rules with a "shadow" run for the White House.
I have learned that on April 22, Governor DeSantis will be the keynote speaker at the Utah Republican Party Convention, which is taking place at Utah Valley University Center.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..zWCMTw2zHf_9Sx-Fda1fc8Jmy-PLrDPbTHJwpR2Dako?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=113527253)
I have also learned that directly following his speech in Utah, DeSantis will be flying to Austin, Texas where he will attend a private, and elite high dollar fundraiser for his shadow Presidential campaign at the home of tech investor and known Kevin McCarthy advisor and donor, Joe Lonsdale, who conveniently hates President Trump and worked against his election efforts in 2016.
Kevin McCarthy has still not endorsed President Trump's 2024 re-election campaign, even though he received President Trump's endorsement for his bid for Speaker of the House, despite being rejected in 14 separate vote proceedings by his peers in the House GOP (you're welcome, Kevin).
As McCarthy pretends to support President Trump by doing the bare minimum to keep himself from being ousted via a motion to vacate, and by attaching himself to self proclaimed Trump ally and opportunist Marjorie Taylor Greene, Kevin has been privately working with his allies in Big Tech, including Lonsdale, as well as his top advisor, Jeff Miller who is known for his lobbying efforts on behalf of several Big Tech companies.
Kevin McCarthy's son, Connor, has been working for Joe Lonsdale for several years, and even used his father's status as a way to secure meetings in the Trump White House with former Trump White House Chief of Staff, Mick Mulvaney, who was FIRED by President Trump in March 2020. [White House records I have obtained from Mulvaney's official Calendar ](https://substack.com/redirect/45407db8-9e39-45e4-866a-590f786c0b7f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)reveals that on January 23, 2018, he had dinner, while working for President Trump, with Connor McCarthy and Joe Lonsdale in Washington DC at the swanky Ocean Prime restaurant.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/512f4254-85fb-4975-abcb-a34f3574be47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Joe Lonsdale is a venture capitalist whose financial and technological endeavors are known to be backed by Chinese and [Emirati cash. ](https://substack.com/redirect/0a55676a-f089-4452-8fad-f7755759a70a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Lonsadle's wife Tayler will also be at the shadow fundraiser for DeSantis. Tayler Lonsdale is a board officer at the Cicero Institute (her husband is Chairman of the board). Tayler has worked at Palantir, and co-founded Esper, where Kevin McCarthy's son served as Chief of Staff. According to Tayler's bio on the Cicero Institute's website,
> "Tayler also worked with New Oriental co-founder, Xu Xiaoping, to build Zhen Fund, now a leading early-stage investment group in China."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0712e571-fad2-4a67-9148-2c0c98640154?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Joe Lonsdale is also [a longtime donor to Kevin McCarthy](https://substack.com/redirect/4a6ece3d-2cd6-4de9-8069-97d796ac4500?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Lonsdale founded a company called Palantir (where his Chinese tied also works), which created a product called "Gotham" for the sake of wiping out right wing political movements in Europe. In a video I posted on Twitter in January, Alex Karp, a co-founder of Palantir, says their product, known as Gotham, which he calls PG, "single handedly stopped the rise of the far right in Europe." [Karp is a self admitted progressive who voted for Hillary Clinton in 2016, and has expressed hostilities toward Donald Trump. ](https://substack.com/redirect/b74d6981-4a5b-47eb-b890-71564c36862d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Karp told The New York Times that his greatest fear is "the rise of fascism", and as we all know, the progressive movement's political talking points in the United States revolves around their lie that President Trump is "a fascist".
You have to ask yourself... why is the "Republican" Speaker of the House advising with an anti-Trump tech investor who creates surveillance technologies with progressive Trump haters to wipe out right wing political movements in Western nations? And why is the founder of this company hosting an event at his home with other tech millionaires and billionaires for Governor Ron DeSantis as he carries out his shadow Presidential campaign?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/df6bf3e6-dc01-492f-9afd-e77758b65725?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8e30c684-25fc-4591-be04-711402280593?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
They say if you want to know what someone's agenda is, all you need to do is FOLLOW THE MONEY. Along with donating to Kevin McCarthy, and hosting an upcoming April 22 event for Governor DeSantis, Lonsdale has also donated to Democrat California Governor Gavin Newsom, Trump hater Mitt Romney, he donated to Chris Christie over President Trump in 2016, suspected Chinese Communist Party asset and Democrat Congresswoman Stephanie Murphy, anti-Trump Congressman Dan Crenshaw, and pro-impeachment Republican Representatives Jaime Herrera Beutler, Fred Upton, Anthony Gonzalez, and GOP Senator Ben Sasse, all of whom voted to impeach President Trump.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8ce3eec2-5614-4303-88fc-6c552c1fa909?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

---|---|---
In 2019, Lonsdale donated $1,000 to radical Leftist Pete Buttigieg, who currently serves as the United States Secretary of Transportation in Joe Biden's administration.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/94f93060-d72a-4606-b783-142dd132080b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/06b77737-facc-4be4-8a3f-834331badffe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In January 2020, Lonsdale donated $5,000 to the Koch backed Americans for Prosperity PAC. Americans For Prosperity (AFP) is financed by conservative billionaire [Charles Koch](https://substack.com/redirect/06aa54a7-0cb3-4ce1-9543-705f82e1d65f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). An AFP spokesperson [recently told CBS News ](https://substack.com/redirect/d28e027f-9bdd-4b31-9abd-3583ea4c02c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)that AFP plans to oppose the [2024 presidential candidacy of former President Donald Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/1f389cfa-bc1e-4948-ae49-29bd3fb9344a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -- and will actively support an alternative during the Republican presidential primary. It's really telling when one looks at Lonsdale's political giving history knowing that he is one of Kevin McCarthy's trusted tech advisors.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/09ee35b4-ddb3-412d-9922-62cb49d3b41d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

What Kevin McCarthy doesn't want anyone knowing is that his son, Connor, works for anti-Trump Joe Lonsdale. Kevin and Connor have been public about their close relationship, and how Connor aspires to follow in his father's footsteps. I[n 2015, Kevin McCarthy bragged to the media about how he "rewarded" his son Connor for doing his homework by taking him to Japan's State Dinner at the White House during the administration of Barrack Hussein Obama and Joe Biden.](https://substack.com/redirect/fc96a570-6921-4bd5-bd5f-225782cbf58c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5a2beafd-5f91-48bf-a2a9-2ad74015f6a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It's rather odd that McCarthy would consider it a "reward" to take his son to an event hosted by a communist President who we now know spied on then candidate Trump during the Presidential election season between 2015-2016.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/90a01286-b4ce-4653-a5ab-cd7483d19b11?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

Connor McCarthy's employment with Kevin McCarthy donor Joe Lonsdale is clearly a matter of political access, as opposed to merit. It is unknown how Connor McCarthy's educational background qualifies him to be an advisor to Joe Lonsdale at the Cicero Institute, which describes itself as a "think tank". It is also unknown how he is qualified to work for 8VC, a venture fund where Lonsdale is the managing partner. According to his bio on the Cicero Institute's website, which has s[ince been scrubbed](https://substack.com/redirect/41e5634a-76ab-4bd2-b08d-68f027fe2098?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (see screenshot below which proves their attempt to cover it up) following my Twitter battle with Lonsdale, Connor McCarthy's degree is in African American Studies and Philosophy, from Georgetown University. It is worth noting that [Governor DeSantis recently came under fire for trying to ban African American studies in the state of Florida. How ironic! ](https://substack.com/redirect/df8b70c6-f321-4e96-b059-13cf0c9f7a24?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9e517f56-3a01-4979-ad2b-83f3ade705f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

---|---|---
Connor McCarthy's business profile also shows that he still works as the "Chief of Staff" for Lonsdale-backed Esper Technologies (cofounded by Lonsdale) and as an advisor for Lonsdale's venture fund, 8VC. The African-American studies major was also a partner at Andreessen Horowitz, which is seen in the above screenshot of Connor McCarthy's bio on the Cicero Institute website.

The funding will be used to deploy uBiome's new testing kit, SmartGut, a sequencing-based clinical microbiome screening test.
> With an at-home collection kit, SmartGut aims to give individuals and their doctors access to a comprehensive screening test to weed out important microorganisms (which can only be detected through DNA sequencing) that could be causing health distress. The test, which is not yet available, requires users to swab a tiny amount of fecal matter with a cotton swab, and the material is sent directly to the UBiome laboratory for sequencing. Once the results are back, SmartGut will give users actionable information about their gut microbiome to share with their doctors."

However, insiders have told me an estimated 200 to 250 of Lonsdale's closest investor friends and business partners are coming for an intimate dinner reception with the Governor. | | ---|---|--- Why would tech investors have an interest in meeting Governor DeSantis unless they were looking to donate? And why is Governor DeSantis spending so much time out of state instead of doing his job as Governor of Florida? It's obvious that he is raising money for his Presidential Campaign and needs to build a war chest to prove that he is financially viable and able to compete with President Trump. Lonsdale played his hand when he called me, somebody who represents the pro- Trump MAGA base, "wacky Far Right". have been reports that Palantir's technology was used to track down Osama bin Laden during the Obama administration, and it is now currently used as a means to combat counterterrorism, "right wing extremism", and "fascism" by a number of countries. Given the fact that the US government has been working with Big Tech to weaponize itself against conservative Americans mand illegally interfere in US elections as they did in 2020, Kevin McCarthy and Ron DeSantis's cozy relationship with Palantir's cofounders is concerning, especially as we head into a Presidential Primary where Donald Trump has become the main target of the weaponized US Government. | | ---|---|--- When it comes to wacky ideas, is the master. He is notorious for burning millions of dollars of investor cash on Jessica Richman and Zachary Apte's fake poop testing company called "Ubiome". | | ---|---|--- They are wanted by t, and they are currently living at large in Germany. | | ---|---|--- According to a November 2016 San Francisco-based uBiome, which makes a direct-to-consumer microbial genomic testing kit, has closed on a $22 million Series B funding round, led by 8VC with additional funding from Slow Ventures, Stanford's StartX Fund and various angel investors. The funding will be used to deploy uBiome's new testing kit, SmartGut, a sequencing-based clinical microbiome screening test. With an at-home collection kit, SmartGut aims to give individuals and their doctors access to a comprehensive screening test to weed out important microorganisms (which can only be detected through DNA sequencing) that could be causing health distress. The test, which is not yet available, requires users to swab a tiny amount of fecal matter with a cotton swab, and the material is sent directly to the UBiome laboratory for sequencing. Once the results are back, SmartGut will give users actionable information about their gut microbiome to share with their doctors." Now that's what I call wacky! But, this isn't Lonsdale's only wacky investment. As noted above, 8VC is Lonsdale's Venture capital firm. Lonsdale has also invested in the Boring Company, which promises to rid us of "soul destroying traffic". Doesn't look like Boring's tunnels to nowhere are going anywhere anytime soon... When I publicly posted about Lonsdale's plan to host an event for DeSantis in Austin, Texas on April 22, 2023, he BLOCKED me on Twitter and then proceeded to accuse me and "the people around me" of being "verifiably wacky" and said I was "just attacking like crazy". | | ---|---|--- We are in a WAR to put President Trump back in the White House and to save Western Civilization. Foreign-tied Big tech investors like Joe Lonsdale, and ingrate neo-con career politicians like Governor DeSantis are the enemy to President Trump's America First agenda and the MAGA movement. To quote General George S. Patton, "Nobody ever defended anything successfully, there is only attack and attack and attack some more." As we learned from the 2020 election, foreign tied Big tech companies and Big Tech executives are the enemy to a free America, free and fair elections, free speech, and President Trump's America First agenda. And now, these enemies are rolling out a green carpet for Governor DeSantis ahead of the 2024 Presidential election, with assistance from Kevin McCarthy and his son Connor. Is this the kind of "innovation" we should expect from a DeSantis administration when DeSantis is forced to appease his Big Tech donors who funded his Presidential campaign against Donald Trump? Whatever you want to say about President Trump, he was always real with us. We knew exactly what Trump thought on all topics, his White House wasn't for sale to his donors, and Big Tech hated him os much, they deplaformed him from all social media sites in a coordinated takedown while he was still President. It's hard to imagine Donald Trump associating with a bullshitter and a bullshit investor (literally) like Joe Lonsdale. If one thing is clear, it's that Joe Lonsdale, UBiome's founders, Ron DeSantis, Kevin McCarthy and his son Connor have one thing in common. They are all full of shit. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | Read LOOMER UNLEASHED in the app Listen to posts, join subscriber chats, and never miss an update from Laura Loomer. (C) 2023 Laura Loomer Laura Loomer, PO Box 1038, Lady Lake, FL 32159 ? ?

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c83e0b000b184e8f82ca6e37620369d3&_e=h2vN_WLk0RvapF8K8NmX-zDcRQ7M_ae_nmKgKbfb7ZDQtWGizol9gz2A6f6Vbmwkmd0wEvfQCa6sqdVsZnIVc3_eqT0MoWr921ICVW0PjVXoGM6CsbIiMF4M0eHthvrBMNctbMLs_l7doTfGSwKgUJKBMvN4IeTLDyvdqc33un5qjIHmOu60ie9teLQWDJdnC4GkAWWR3wANh1Nbhpd_caJPFRzlr9SrZMSdI3fbkGhNs4slG_y5kmVPB_cPK7vaWkBypSxUi_UpEowehafhhvsxm3ssinO-gaXta_QcDQw%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c83e0b000b184e8f82ca6e37620369d3&_e=h2vN_WLk0RvapF8K8NmX-zDcRQ7M_ae_nmKgKbfb7ZDQtWGizol9gz2A6f6Vbmwkmd0wEvfQCa6sqdVsZnIVc3_eqT0MoWr921ICVW0PjVXoGM6CsbIiMF4M0eHthvrBMNctbMLs_l7doTfGSwKgUJkm1Zyl1h9S2Y2lV78zOMUAbj_ErS4MPbi0O3gdhl56VB2BFvowUw8Hy2rJFahpSMsdDOV1reZ3VhvEOMFvsiyvtjJ47Y54aj3Z0CIhGd_Z4bFirqViEpTRZcClvYJAv7MfMHyEsgikNUynReK88ZY%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c83e0b000b184e8f82ca6e37620369d3&_e=h2vN_WLk0RvapF8K8NmX-zDcRQ7M_ae_nmKgKbfb7ZDQtWGizol9gz2A6f6Vbmwkmd0wEvfQCa6sqdVsZnIVc3_eqT0MoWr921ICVW0PjVXoGM6CsbIiMF4M0eHthvrBMNctbMLs_l7doTfGSwKgUDLiMwdi9Nkk-6lcPDU8zniYMhonY2GS76jwpU_pWrBtYdIYtIKsrNACb-j41IBb7Zo37RQlJu3YJCIMeiS6Pq2bVLgcdMlWCCuw7u-DmGG-9g_n6R1PJXFlZeNpogY74tRSLTU4x5V-xZUA3lHLFLo%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c83e0b000b184e8f82ca6e37620369d3&_e=h2vN_WLk0RvapF8K8NmX-zDcRQ7M_ae_nmKgKbfb7ZDQtWGizol9gz2A6f6Vbmwkmd0wEvfQCa6sqdVsZnIVc3_eqT0MoWr921ICVW0PjVXoGM6CsbIiMF4M0eHthvrBMNctbMLs_l7doTfGSwKgUNst7wBU4onbW3S015QIYGkXaXdS8Z1a-gPKxjtmvTzypeYWTv-KBooIlASROELhZ7QoEOKATy4n0z1U136-HMB6p-1VKu6_4WAQNIEmNPAuT57u1yp9bCkgh5EBFeav6Z5GoCrnwu6WzfI1EitHxDk%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c83e0b000b184e8f82ca6e37620369d3&_e=h2vN_WLk0RvapF8K8NmX-zDcRQ7M_ae_nmKgKbfb7ZDQtWGizol9gz2A6f6Vbmwkmd0wEvfQCa6sqdVsZnIVc3_eqT0MoWr921ICVW0PjVXoGM6CsbIiMF4M0eHthvrBMNctbMLs_l7doTfGSwKgUMR-I2x3WYfKBw47VwvUpipCTHgYfpzUwswfVNhHPOKm5TuaUGyMOtXqOsWbvcRhmRJiLk9VjmUg7et0ZD05AwvDPSxTSZVu6yV-uZU1rY5RQRlkUnai8mAuU47Gzxh-VTrWentAkwLbLnFAFkKagiM%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c83e0b000b184e8f82ca6e37620369d3&_e=h2vN_WLk0RvapF8K8NmX-zDcRQ7M_ae_nmKgKbfb7ZDQtWGizol9gz2A6f6Vbmwkmd0wEvfQCa6sqdVsZnIVc3_eqT0MoWr921ICVW0PjVXoGM6CsbIiMF4M0eHthvrBMNctbMLs_l7doTfGSwKgUB4NO9500JZ9LMRitoDxeEI7LVvT0VRlhUwEuncaYo0Nl2_24AqMq8xA8BNJA89CZF0QyIYvmDnhvsVdYI7jKrLK5IOGaQaJ2frtSNwvr1LK7sy3KXtmlR7ozINyGUN-tVbOdTHGASd3J-idXoq3IVE%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c83e0b000b184e8f82ca6e37620369d3&_e=h2vN_WLk0RvapF8K8NmX-zDcRQ7M_ae_nmKgKbfb7ZDQtWGizol9gz2A6f6Vbmwkmd0wEvfQCa6sqdVsZnIVc3_eqT0MoWr921ICVW0PjVXoGM6CsbIiMF4M0eHthvrBMNctbMLs_l7doTfGSwKgUCzrQyuYLwgNAzZ8FQKLEyxYMMzFQRp2uoYslKfHjLi7ecAY9sO8diID_LXkUU4jiWDxDFXS4aClbnlUdoPqb4VGsNGyavpXs9dSOts1IooclgGdF55AsGBjmHOrfdpEuSJjVA56Y7vbj8tfm3QfL1w%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c83e0b000b184e8f82ca6e37620369d3&_e=h2vN_WLk0RvapF8K8NmX-zDcRQ7M_ae_nmKgKbfb7ZDQtWGizol9gz2A6f6Vbmwkmd0wEvfQCa6sqdVsZnIVc3_eqT0MoWr921ICVW0PjVXoGM6CsbIiMF4M0eHthvrBMNctbMLs_l7doTfGSwKgUFs-g_syD9J1VOxxnWaZEZvdciXbcgbfHOfx7snhLFgBSgU7vW3P9Erno-Jy6kC2pU04857OCyMwSoxG2zaoRiYtDwyplP89Cy0JDguRmQ_Ht6vRy2MEvBS7Z7BTaFDXrx3_PgO2ylb79AaI4GX0c_o%3D)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c83e0b000b184e8f82ca6e37620369d3&_e=h2vN_WLk0RvapF8K8NmX-zDcRQ7M_ae_nmKgKbfb7ZDQtWGizol9gz2A6f6Vbmwkmd0wEvfQCa6sqdVsZnIVc3_eqT0MoWr921ICVW0PjVXoGM6CsbIiMF4M0eHthvrBaoZnNmJN3ZARtbUDvXOXDrDsezBZSuEFbPY4Zz-SJW8XpyDuJ4qLyvXV6OY5Zp5xt4qz47IihToqFUYoLh0NLzn32MTgjxpEiBzv6o3N9hq4AeC4mEbPHvf75p1i5rClQpIB6yW3uJSIzLifT5yELP0gGq4XXJPcWyJbqFvKbGY%3D)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c83e0b000b184e8f82ca6e37620369d3&_e=h2vN_WLk0RvapF8K8NmX-zDcRQ7M_ae_nmKgKbfb7ZDQtWGizol9gz2A6f6Vbmwkmd0wEvfQCa6sqdVsZnIVc3_eqT0MoWr921ICVW0PjVXoGM6CsbIiMF4M0eHthvrBVUd8I2Hev2vEc0D90nh5OPqQ9EVPHOOtQuJF99TEVs1TcjsIGuF5aJsnY8vjG38GHmHOXTkWkYdeR0oL1Z0AwSs22g6uwLYlEhW_SXpHi4Q1XYbXrH4nFt4HbEaotDPdjFTpL0o6n0uIyMBQh0BsuA9pElH5Ljg9w4h58b6nUYU%3D)
