clean_body: But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Hi folks,
I want you to be the first to know: **I’m running for reelection.**
It’s an honor to represent my fellow Pennsylvanians in the Senate, and it is their trust that drives me to get up every day and fight for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities.
**But know this: Mitch McConnell and the GOP are already coming for this seat. I won’t be able to win this reelection fight alone.**
**[_If you’re with me, will you split a donation between Kirsten Gillibrand and our campaign today? In 2022, Pennsylvania’s Senate race gave Democrats our slim, 51-seat majority. That means next year, our opponents are going to do everything they can to flip Pennsylvania red.
Republicans are already targeting this Senate seat and running attack ads. To defeat them, we’re going to earn support from Pennsylvanians from Erie to Scranton.
**Folks****, I’m no stranger to hard fights.** I’ve been standing up for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities for my whole career, and I won’t stop now. There’s still more work to do to cut through the gridlock, take on the powerful special interests, and deliver real results for working families and children across our commonwealth.

clean_body: | | | Hi folks, I want you to be the first to know: I’m running for reelection. It’s an honor to represent my fellow Pennsylvanians in the Senate, and it is their trust that drives me to get up every day and fight for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities. But know this: Mitch McConnell and the GOP are already coming for this seat. I won’t be able to win this reelection fight alone. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Bob Casey and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = In 2022, Pennsylvania’s Senate race gave Democrats our slim, 51-seat majority. That means next year, our opponents are going to do everything they can to flip Pennsylvania red. Republicans are already targeting this Senate seat and running attack ads. To defeat them, we’re going to earn support from Pennsylvanians from Erie to Scranton. Folks, I’m no stranger to hard fights. I’ve been standing up for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities for my whole career, and I won’t stop now. There’s still more work to do to cut through the gridlock, take on the powerful special interests, and deliver real results for working families and children across our commonwealth. Friend, I've been in politics a _long_ time.

I got my start in local politics in Baton Rouge in the 1980s, worked my way up to Bill Clinton's 1992 presidential campaign, and since then I've worked on campaigns around the U.S. and the world. **But here's the thing:**
**I have never seen a political party as cuckoo as the GOP today.**
From extending Trump's tax breaks for the wealthy to chipping away at our fundamental rights like voting and accessing health care, **the GOP of today is threatening our very democracy.**
But, friend, it gets worse. Republicans took back the House last year, so a lot of what they're planning _could actually happen._

**That's why this is urgent.** **We NEED to take back the House and hold on to our Senate majority next year, and in order to do that, we have to start NOW.**

At American Bridge, our mission is to hold Republicans accountable and DEFEAT them at the ballot box. **But we can't do it without you, friend.****[That's why I set a goal to raise $10,000 by midnight, so I am asking personally: Please, can you rush $15 or more to American Bridge right now to build up our resources so we can stop Republicans like Donald Trump, Ron DeSantis and Kevin McCarthy in their tracks?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61586265/400550283/1983311359?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=15&refcode=jtk2442-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0ZmJkNDk2LWQyZDctZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=z7r4lHSK8k0pxQE5zcLbVF6EG5rs0wSJH6mW8NGwBqA=)**

clean_body: | | | = Friend, I've been in politics a long time. I got my start in local politics in Baton Rouge in the 1980s, worked my way up to Bill Clinton's 1992 presidential campaign, and since then I've worked on campaigns around the U.S. and the world. But here's the thing: I have never seen a political party as cuckoo as the GOP today. From extending Trump's tax breaks for the wealthy to chipping away at our fundamental rights like voting and accessing health care, the GOP of today is threatening our very democracy. But, friend, it gets worse. Republicans took back the House last year, so a lot of what they're planning could actually happen. That's why this is urgent. We NEED to take back the House and hold on to our Senate majority next year, and in order to do that, we have to start NOW. At American Bridge, our mission is to hold Republicans accountable and DEFEAT them at the ballot box. But we can't do it without you, friend.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I know I can count on you. – Carville | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by AB PAC. name: Indiana Dems
subject: FWD: Our mission for this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
A few days ago, we reached out to share why we believe the Republican Party is a danger to the people of Indiana, and why we’re committed to reversing their harmful policies. To those of you who signed our petition, we thank you for your commitment and continued support to building a stronger future for Indiana and our families. [**Take the next step in your support by making a donation to the Indiana Democratic Party and help us hit our first fundraising goal of the month. We need every dollar we can get to follow through on our promise of electing Democrats all across the state.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61586389/400550827/1643342139?refcode=230410-FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDg1NGYwMS1kM2Q3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hSFEwjoRRDrW-6k5RWRVPbNjkcAK-B8XlL6JHbVVR98=) And for those who haven’t had an opportunity to sign our petition yet, read our email below about the risks facing our state, and our plan to make sure Republicans cannot continue to harm the trajectory of our state. Thanks,
Indiana Democratic Party
_**\---Forwarded message---**_
Peter, After years of Republican control, we are putting our foot down and saying enough. Indiana has an F rated quality-of-life for families, a D- rated workforce, and our education system and maternal mortality rates are running far behind other states. We are consistently rated as having among the lowest quality of life in the categories that matter most. Republican leaders are consistently putting their own political and financial interests ahead of the people of Indiana, and Hoosiers deserve better.**It needs to end.** [**Sign our petition today and affirm your commitment to electing Democratic leaders who are determined to make Indiana a safer, healthier place to live.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61586390/400550828/751646702?refcode=230410-FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDg1NGYwMS1kM2Q3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hSFEwjoRRDrW-6k5RWRVPbNjkcAK-B8XlL6JHbVVR98=&emci=a65ef527-9dd7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=10854f01-d3d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) The simple reality is that we need to work harder than ever on behalf of workers, kids, and families. We have to break the Republican supermajority and make sure they don’t have the blanket power to enact whatever harmful policies they choose. **The Indiana Democratic Party is committed to providing a quality education, exceptional maternal healthcare, and better paying jobs for everyone in our state. But we need your support in the coming years to ensure that we turn the tide.** [**Sign our petition today and be a part of the movement working to protect the future of our state.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61586391/400550829/751646702?refcode=230410-FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDg1NGYwMS1kM2Q3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hSFEwjoRRDrW-6k5RWRVPbNjkcAK-B8XlL6JHbVVR98=&emci=a65ef527-9dd7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=10854f01-d3d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) Thanks,
Indiana Democratic Party | | | [Chip in! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61586392/400550830/405560545?refcode=230410-FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDg1NGYwMS1kM2Q3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hSFEwjoRRDrW-6k5RWRVPbNjkcAK-B8XlL6JHbVVR98=)

name: Hannah Menchhoff
subject: What We Achieved in just Five Weeks
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Friends,
In early March, we launched the Rally for Our Rights tour. We knew if we were talking about abortion and activating pro-choice voters, we could help Democrats win big on April 4.
As we had hoped voters rallied behind reproductive freedom and against the years of GOP attacks on our rights. This election unfolded just how elections should , with high turnout across the state and among all backgrounds and ages. The motivation to fight for what's right will only continue as we head towards 2024.
And together, Wisconsin, we did it! Congratulations to (Justice!) Janet Protasiewicz! What an amazing campaign from Janet, her team, the Wisconsin Democratic Party, and advocacy groups across the state that turned out record voters in a spring election.
With your help, Women Win Wisconsin was able to accomplish so much in just five weeks:
✅ Held six rallies in Madison, Milwaukee, Green Bay, Appleton, Eau Claire, and La Crosse.
✅ Brought together 113 speakers and volunteers to put these rallies on.
✅ Traveled 1,454 miles!
✅ Mobilized hundreds of voters of all ages to hear stories about how the 1849 abortion ban has changed their lives.
✅ Earned 30 press clips highlighting the importance of reproductive rights in the spring election. Here are some of our favorites:
*

Sarah Godlewski in Eau Claire.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88285/images/IMG_2426.jpg] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88285/images/IMG_3543.jpg]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88285/images/Shelton-GB.jpg] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88285/images/IMG_2196.jpg]
Top photos: Speakers share their stories in Madison.
Bottom photos: Crowds were enthusiastic in Green Bay and Appleton.
Because of your vote and your support, Wisconsin can finally move forward in history and no longer be dragged down by extremist Republicans holding our rights hostage.
We are proud that women's voices won out in this election. Thank you again.
-Women Win Wisconsin PAC

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: No more professional politicians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
It's going to take an outsider in the White House to deliver the results we need to put America back on track.

| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fc7c95c1ed004dc48371be40fb614717&_e=6di1aXdRoSdRWLJ5c3JQ8-ef47fZgdWIcuI6QuCVGPYMNXGD1wPa5DEhMnIGH5ISJQKdAyo7E6w0J8i9CJ0fdaqKb6i8Iiexb8tRPtG3y6dyYsV_1iGT-UsI_b_PQBMeaX-cnerHmpQZCcd8-MwpjybilNMAbBxRZvOXYAJMIn53YJsRZNO8pXB3UIE0P7kjC80Y561QFVOAm3NO8QMPkzcccWO339R2U9l5FkilvqzlOJ_SDavFQWVWP3RaPgpgH7GVvbIXVWU1Kg69LJKp6KtaHEJeV1JiXtgEBdcNJsnoHcFAUroH9L_uZefBNsdp0ukNcGVE8tDXLBSgdhEVtAY50o0yhxEGGRO1-aS1P3ebB6i6pZUVOYUsdp5jLjuCg7kNsYZ7tUVYKUrAs7njoEnLHYmy1s947t8asFtPWo8%3D)
Fellow American,

A professional politician can't make the changes we need to deliver for America.

We need an outsider with the courage to GUT the managerial bureaucracy that has grown so toxic and corrupt that it undermines American values.

Fellow American, I am that outsider.

I've never held public office. I haven't spent years dialing for dollars from big donors - so I am not beholden to them. I am not beholden to ANYONE.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fc7c95c1ed004dc48371be40fb614717&_e=6di1aXdRoSdRWLJ5c3JQ8-ef47fZgdWIcuI6QuCVGPYMNXGD1wPa5DEhMnIGH5ISJQKdAyo7E6w0J8i9CJ0fdaqKb6i8Iiexb8tRPtG3y6dyYsV_1iGT-UsI_b_PQBMeaX-cnerHmpQZCcd8-MwpjybilNMAbBxRZvOXYAJMIn53YJsRZNO8pXB3UIE0P7kjC80Y561QFVOAm3NO8QMPkzcccWO339R2U9l5FkilvqzlOJ_SDavFQWVWP3RaPgpgXq7pKLfbVi85exEVtvgfsxRL3I1VBx18r6KKDDe2oK-ylrUXR2Dwk85-gCyWj4IolVHFwFBQHqlCvZ-DSPfcHjbTxIyPV_82cETSVvVoQ__NFaw3UGpB5p1h2stNDclKS_Hq-XOvfXtBYnD21AApd0vrGmldUh-elxgsyNKxHj4%3D)
We must change how things are done in Washington - I am ready to take on this fight. I am investing my own money, but I can't do this alone.

I am not asking for a lot - _**[just $1 or even $5 before midnight.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fc7c95c1ed004dc48371be40fb614717&_e=6di1aXdRoSdRWLJ5c3JQ8-ef47fZgdWIcuI6QuCVGPYMNXGD1wPa5DEhMnIGH5ISJQKdAyo7E6w0J8i9CJ0fdaqKb6i8Iiexb8tRPtG3y6dyYsV_1iGT-UsI_b_PQBMeaX-cnerHmpQZCcd8-MwpjybilNMAbBxRZvOXYAJMIn53YJsRZNO8pXB3UIE0P7kjC80Y561QFVOAm3NO8QMPkzcccWO339R2U9l5FkilvqzlOJ_SDavFQWVWP3RaPgpgl7mMMle___5wvfDm4LgsEd6wLbyX5U0REIOdy9LxoPV80-ywaXnjKzdg7jSnXeJWIW6iKGnfwlW8Z7e5H7kHC5nqctmgr7dYVEnU0YHNp5MACILeUx04Tcv67TvB79N4BUb2R3dBFsIkAGygKskru8TWwfZD6cHpDNf2WG_aBtQ%3D)**_

My goal is to boost our number of unique donors in this race, so a little bit from conservatives like you across the country will help us fuel this movement.

Let's do this together, Fellow American.

I am counting on you,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: It's going to take an outsider in the White House to deliver the results we need to put America back on track. | Fellow American, A professional politician can't make the changes we need to deliver for America. We need an outsider with the courage to GUT the managerial bureaucracy that has grown so toxic and corrupt that it undermines American values. Fellow American, I am that outsider. I've never held public office. I haven't spent years dialing for dollars from big donors - so I am not beholden to them. I am not beholden to ANYONE. We must change how things are done in Washington - I am ready to take on this fight. I am investing my own money, but I can't do this alone. I am not asking for a lot - My goal is to boost our number of unique donors in this race, so a little bit from conservatives like you across the country will help us fuel this movement. Let's do this together, Fellow American. I am counting on you, Vivek Ramaswamy | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. In 2022, Pennsylvania’s Senate race gave Democrats our slim, 51-seat majority. That means next year, our opponents are going to do everything they can to flip Pennsylvania red.
Republicans are already targeting this Senate seat and running attack ads. To defeat them, we’re going to earn support from Pennsylvanians from Erie to Scranton.
**Friend, I’m no stranger to hard fights.** I’ve been standing up for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities for my whole career, and I won’t stop now. There’s still more work to do to cut through the gridlock, take on the powerful special interests, and deliver real results for working families and children across our commonwealth.
But it’s going to take all of us. The first 24 hours of fundraising are critical to the success of this campaign.
[**Become a Founding Donor and join our team by splitting a donation between our campaign and Michael Bennet’s today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61587036/400553275/1227103395?refcode=X_041023_Casey_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2E1MDAxNC1kNmQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-mO6U5t6XHP3XUCjgtSPlc-h4rKJGxgpDy3SG4LxmhM=)

Thank you,
Bob Casey

_**FOX NEWS: Forget China. This is America’s greatest challenge**_ By Bobby Jindal
---
While politicians rightfully focus on the pressing threat posed by a rising China, intent to reshape the current liberal rules-based order according to her values and interests, they risk ignoring a more pernicious domestic danger. America’s unique strengths derive from her culture, not simply from abundant natural resources or fortuitous geography. This culture results in the prosperous free market economy, military superiority and functioning democracy that have made her a superpower. This culture is not genetically encoded or automatically passed down but must be renewed with each generation. America’s greatest challenge is not overseas, but comes from liberals at home eroding that cultural heritage. First, liberals are undermining the rule of law that prevents the arbitrary exercise of power and protects law-abiding citizens. While liberal prosecutors refuse to enforce laws against open-air drug markets, retail theft, semi-permanent homeless encampments on public sidewalks and parks, and illegal immigration, liberal politicians propagate restrictive permitting rules and regulations that render unwitting home and business owners vulnerable to selective enforcement. [_**FINISH READING ON FOXNEWS.COM**_](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=818ff17a5b5a4ddbadc27e6580543eed&_e=be2evp6_LuJIzi758yW7teKf-RX3bQqsWLQtZwgTgaMR4xAJAWkmjugvcVAK3TYK-wuFzW3AOT8viRaAB6dlFVD5zz9r4gIr76mtZcNmu9bShrzbTM8ibDhV3pj6RB3iq-1JXR69PDEXarR9sOU8G--9J-SfZOV2MmO5_LTQU4c-rOE_p-TBrhBfQQNnCZgf-ofE-UDMASYIb2-UoPSaKAPHcvUzZVlnnXstCznUciBentIvfUykxiOY9pTdhq-GqjssPVX8Bg2D07nS8wUiqQ%3D%3D)

name: Our Revolution
subject: LIVE Call TONIGHT: Chicago to Philly, building local power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Join our LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

TOPICS: Election Recaps | Brandon Johnson wins Chicago Mayor | St. Louis
Majority w/ Megan Green | Helen Gym for Philly Mayor | Sara Innamorato for
Allegheny Co Exec in PGH | ‘Tax the Rich’ Bernie Sticker | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1011&akid=4190%2E5885482%2EWYouis ][IMG]

Don’t miss our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1012&akid=4190%2E5885482%2EWYouis ]National Organize-to-Win Call focused on building
progressive power in cities nationwide — LIVE this Monday, April 10th at
8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT!

Coming off major victories in Chicago and St. Louis, we’ll dig into how
progressives are forging coalitions and governing majorities with STL
Board President Megan Green.

Then, we’ll turn to the next big races in Pennsylvania, strategizing with
Helen Gym for Philadelphia Mayor and Sara Innamorato for Allegheny County
Executive in Pittsburgh!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1013&akid=4190%2E5885482%2EWYouis ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

BUILD LOCAL POWER

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1014&akid=4190%2E5885482%2EWYouis ][IMG]

Progressives won big this week, electing new Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson
and shoring up our majority in St. Louis — and we’re just getting started!

“It was a momentous win,” said the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8592?t=1015&akid=4190%2E5885482%2EWYouis ]Associated Press. “It comes as
groups like Our Revolution, a powerful progressive advocacy organization,
push to win more local and state offices in upcoming mayoral elections in
Philadelphia and elsewhere.”

We also saw our slates in Kansas City MO and Lincoln NE advance to the
general and won a city council seat with Suzanna Ibarra in Joliet IN!

Thanks to the surge of support from Our Revolution members and volunteers,
we made nearly half a million voter contacts for Tuesday’s races.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1016&akid=4190%2E5885482%2EWYouis ]City by city, our working-class coalition is building power from the
bottom up. Join our organizing call Monday to learn more!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1017&akid=4190%2E5885482%2EWYouis ][IMG]

Brandon won on a vision of co-governance with the people of Chicago, and
that is precisely the inside-outside strategy we need for change.

“The fact Brandon Johnson could go up against the 'defund the police'
slogan and the police union and win is incredibly heartening for
progressives,” OR Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8593?t=1018&akid=4190%2E5885482%2EWYouis ]ABC News.

“We don't have to run away on the issues of crime and public safety,” he
said.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1019&akid=4190%2E5885482%2EWYouis ][IMG]

Tuesday’s victories show that when we organize, we can overpower big money
and reclaim our communities.

“This is the fundamental fault line within the Democratic Party we’re
seeing being played out,” Joseph told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8594?t=1020&akid=4190%2E5885482%2EWYouis ]Vox. “Brandon’s win shows that a
broader message about safety can resonate, and not just a
lock-up-more-people message.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1021&akid=4190%2E5885482%2EWYouis ][IMG]

In St. Louis, we held our progressive majority in the city, electing six
to the Board of Alderman to join Board President Megan Green and Mayor
Tishaura Jones.

It was a good night, Green, a former Bernie delegate, told the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8595?t=1022&akid=4190%2E5885482%2EWYouis ]St.
Louis Post Dispatch. “The future of St. Louis is progressive.”

Local power directly impacts lives. In St. Louis, progressives have
already delivered a basic income pilot program, and next up are tenant's
rights and homelessness initiatives.

★ ★ ★

Coming off major victories in Chicago and St. Louis, we’ll dig into how progressives are forging coalitions and governing majorities with STL Board President Megan Green. Then, we’ll turn to the next big races in Pennsylvania, strategizing with Helen Gym for Philadelphia Mayor and Sara Innamorato for Allegheny County Executive in Pittsburgh! [ ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ BUILD LOCAL POWER [ ][IMG] Progressives won big this week, electing new Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson and shoring up our majority in St. Louis — and we’re just getting started! “It was a momentous win,” said the [ ]Associated Press. “It comes as groups like Our Revolution, a powerful progressive advocacy organization, push to win more local and state offices in upcoming mayoral elections in Philadelphia and elsewhere.” We also saw our slates in Kansas City MO and Lincoln NE advance to the general and won a city council seat with Suzanna Ibarra in Joliet IN! Thanks to the surge of support from Our Revolution members and volunteers, we made nearly half a million voter contacts for Tuesday’s races. [ ]City by city, our working-class coalition is building power from the bottom up. Join our organizing call Monday to learn more! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Brandon won on a vision of co-governance with the people of Chicago, and that is precisely the inside-outside strategy we need for change. “The fact Brandon Johnson could go up against the 'defund the police' slogan and the police union and win is incredibly heartening for progressives,” OR Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ ]ABC News. “We don't have to run away on the issues of crime and public safety,” he said. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Tuesday’s victories show that when we organize, we can overpower big money and reclaim our communities. “This is the fundamental fault line within the Democratic Party we’re seeing being played out,” Joseph told [ ]Vox. “Brandon’s win shows that a broader message about safety can resonate, and not just a lock-up-more-people message.” ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] In St. Louis, we held our progressive majority in the city, electing six to the Board of Alderman to join Board President Megan Green and Mayor Tishaura Jones. name: Adrastos, Campaign Manager for Team Cori
subject: Huge wins for progressives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
This is what democracy looks like!
#
Peter,
While pundits and headlines focused on Trump’s indictment last week, democracy was in action in Chicago, Wisconsin, and right here in St. Louis.
Here’s a quick recap:
* All five of Cori’s endorsements for Alder races in St. Louis won their elections — **Megan Green, Shane Cohn, Daniela Velázquez, Alisha Sonnier, and Rasheen Aldridge** — proving once again that leaders who put the interests of the people before themselves will prevail.
* Progressive **Brandon Johnson** won his election to become the next mayor of Chicago, despite being outspent two-to-one by his more moderate opponent.
* In Wisconsin, **Judge Janet Protasiewicz** beat out her anti-choice, far-right opponent for the State Supreme Court.

Right-wing pundits and talking heads may claim that Cori’s ideals are “too radical,” but these victories prove what we already know — the people support our progressive values.
But progressives like Cori can only win elections when folks know who we are and what we stand for. [**Can you make a gift of $5 today to support Cori and other progressives in future races?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230410.5SBPOt&amount=5&refcode=em20230410-2491&t=1&akid=2491%2E1082990%2Eb13t_0)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230410.5SBPOt&amount=5&refcode=em20230410-2491&t=20&akid=2491%2E1082990%2Eb13t_0)**
Support from folks like you are the reason we saw democracy in action across the midwest last week, and with your continued support, our progressive movement will only get stronger.
In solidarity,
Adrastos, Campaign Manager
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230410?refcode=em20230410-2491-footer&t=21&refcode2=2491_1082990_b13t_0&akid=2491%2E1082990%2Eb13t_0) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.coribush.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.coribush.org/signup/update-your-information?t=22&akid=2491%2E1082990%2Eb13t_0)

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=941d465700634722893d3349b6a3e1bd&_e=6kybKy2ETDSwfPEv1P1pvQxThqRmTQnnESdgDHVlfpEOP5lembZ9BFFeOOi_dC9SokPEpbzRk4avrCJI1XLrXNcAmV4VrkNm3WIiWybZThtVQvAcPzq-FkPqQjg25XtbYWOwE_Sqa2iJiGtgZ3C0Lg-yhhJ12X1sYURfxl2tshfemWeBEljBx5YEYWFkNfYUV_McPO6t50lEd_BQ4o3Tm3iVGIllLVOrBRCYEt1-rncAOpeqkMH-YpbtEimx-Z7dVHkwg4uD_zNmyySqY6H_GTeh8qGRO4YgTN9Z1razf026jE4WehB2nd1nXAfN3qW03y33-G2e3Ng1yVoVTICmaMnag5d4KSnF1SC0NgoY_nmJkoP8nTQ7FduwMHCSCf4VMvZqC-Tuqs_cN54Refz8gA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=941d465700634722893d3349b6a3e1bd&_e=6kybKy2ETDSwfPEv1P1pvQxThqRmTQnnESdgDHVlfpEOP5lembZ9BFFeOOi_dC9SokPEpbzRk4avrCJI1XLrXNcAmV4VrkNm3WIiWybZThtVQvAcPzq-FkPqQjg25XtbYWOwE_Sqa2iJiGtgZ3C0Lg-yhhJ12X1sYURfxl2tshfemWeBEljBx5YEYWFkNfYUV_McPO6t50lEd_BQ4o3Tm3iVGIllLVOrBRCYEt1-rncAOpeqkMH-YpbtEimx-Z7d1-GphplSFHfvQnk9dQMSUx_UJRyC1NSi1LKdvLwncA0oyqjSBy3inMDITdo_vcjeuoB0dNNUZcaftgEq-2j08zd0VuVs7jtkpgKF0cN8vfWr0GSdXnFcVzS8a_E4O1yUtw3-lzaN_n1FVl6TP7ulwg%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=941d465700634722893d3349b6a3e1bd&_e=6kybKy2ETDSwfPEv1P1pvQxThqRmTQnnESdgDHVlfpEOP5lembZ9BFFeOOi_dC9SokPEpbzRk4avrCJI1XLrXNcAmV4VrkNm3WIiWybZThtVQvAcPzq-FkPqQjg25XtbYWOwE_Sqa2iJiGtgZ3C0Lg-yhhJ12X1sYURfxl2tshfemWeBEljBx5YEYWFkNfYUV_McPO6t50lEd_BQ4o3Tm3iVGIllLVOrBRCYEt1-rncAOpeqkMH-YpbtEimx-Z7dVhwYrD5sHhTA416uKPp4ycniiR2160KhL9OLzI-AV_Js8jYbHDxaESO7vtDxWKMwA-Wrd_ehm8rvttf9o_Rd4fqOg2m0BlyMif1amewKgsKlc7XmG6RCOoZm0_RQ8-WaLCyW_2cMGtxVFWBAcPwDiA%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Conservatives Gives
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

body:
---

---
|
---
| Good Friday/ Politics Today
---
| John 3:16
"For God so loved the world, that he gave his only begotten Son, that whosoever believeth in Him should not perish, but have everlasting life."
Jesus didn't come to set up a new political system. He came instead to change our hearts and save us from our sins by His death and resurrection. Jesus said,
> "My kingdom is not of this world. If my kingdom were of this world, my servants would have been fighting, that I might not be delivered over to the Jews. But my kingdom is not from the world." - John 18:36.

The Bible says that Jesus was placed on the cross at 9 a.m. and darkness covered the land from noon until Jesus' death at 3 p.m. (Mark 15:25, 33-38)
---
|
---
| They Had No Godly Or Righteous Motive
---
| Where would Western Civilization be without the Ten Commandments? Thankfully, the principals of the Bible changed the world and gave us order. But, we are still imperfect sinners and capable of great evil. Evil does exist. Without knowing the principles of the Bible, I guess it's easier to understand, or explain the un-explainable, like why a different culture could fly a plane into the World Trade Center, or why some people would want to mutilate children. I heard someone say, "Our country will not be saved by a donkey or an elephant; rather we will be saved by a Lamb."
Our country is in big trouble and we are definitely experiencing spiritual warfare. Today, the media and radical left are trying to convince us what is right is wrong and what is up is down. Church attendance is low, our rule of law has been weakened, and the debauchery with regard to children, marriage, and respect for life seems like the times of Sodom and Gomorrah. I know the truth is the light and God will get the last word. We need to keep the faith and pray.
When reading about the crucifixion, I took the following notes and surmised politics haven't changed much. Politicians still today, bank on gullible voters and use half truths and exaggerations to gain support. Be careful of those who say one thing, but in reality, like the Pharisees, only care about preserving their power.
When Jesus walked this earth, the Pharisees were exposed, and because they were exposed by the true and authentic holiness of Christ, they hated Him, and they couldn't wait to get rid of Him. It wasn't just the Pharisees who wanted Jesus dead - King Herod also saw Jesus as a trouble-maker, who was coming between him and his political ambitions.
Jesus' presentation of Himself as the Messiah was a threat to the Herodians' attempt to make Herod the influential political power in the land.
Both the Herodians and the Pharisees wanted Jesus out of the way because he was a threat to their power. That is why they came together to plot against Jesus (Mark 3:6).
It was not for anything Godly or righteous that the religious leaders wanted to put Jesus to death. It was their pride, arrogance, and hypocrisy that caused them to bring Jesus before Pilate to be crucified. They did not want to hear the truth of God.
Jerusalem was full of Jews who travelled there to celebrate Passover. The religious leaders did not want to arrest Jesus during Passover because they were afraid that the people might riot. But God's timing was different.
Reasons why the religious authorities hated Jesus so much:
They were jealous; they couldn't stand it because they were envious and suspicious of his popularity.
They were upset that he didn't join in with them, but rather publicly rebuked them.
He exposed their phony righteousness for what it was.
They were afraid of losing their power and authority. The Pharisees were judgmental. Jesus said, "You're like dead men's tombs, whitewashed sepulchers that are painted without blemish on the surface, but inside are filled with dead men's bones. You clean the outside of the platter, but the other side, the inner side, is filthy. You do everything possible to hide that impurity, that grime, and that filthiness from public view. You pretend to be righteous, and you major in that pretense of being righteous." -Matthew 23:27
The Pharisees were fake. And nothing reveals a counterfeit like the presence of the genuine.
Jesus died for our sins today 2023 years ago. "Jesus saith unto him, I am the way, the truth, and the life: no man cometh unto the Father, but by me." -John 14:6

| Bob Good is supporting Duane because, when referring to John McGuire in a video, Bob said, "He tried to primary me". But I did not primary him. So let me get this straight, to protect his power Bob is supporting a three-time Democrat who has raised taxes in Louisa County 40% over the last five years, and calls a constituent a coward because I considered my options?
This is a close race, but we will win if all of our delegates show up on May 6 at Buckingham County High School. I'm running for State Senate so we can help Governor Glenn Youngkin un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district!

clean_body: | | | | | | Seventy Plus Endorsement List == | | Good Friday/ Politics Today | John 3:16 "For God so loved the world, that he gave his only begotten Son, that whosoever believeth in Him should not perish, but have everlasting life." Jesus didn't come to set up a new political system. He came instead to change our hearts and save us from our sins by His death and resurrection. Jesus said, "My kingdom is not of this world. If my kingdom were of this world, my servants would have been fighting, that I might not be delivered over to the Jews. But my kingdom is not from the world." - John 18:36. The Bible says that Jesus was placed on the cross at 9 a.m. and darkness covered the land from noon until Jesus' death at 3 p.m. (Mark 15:25, 33-38) | | They Had No Godly Or Righteous Motive | Where would Western Civilization be without the Ten Commandments? Thankfully, the principals of the Bible changed the world and gave us order. But, we are still imperfect sinners and capable of great evil. Evil does exist. Without knowing the principles of the Bible, I guess it's easier to understand, or explain the un-explainable, like why a different culture could fly a plane into the World Trade Center, or why some people would want to mutilate children. I heard someone say, "Our country will not be saved by a donkey or an elephant; rather we will be saved by a Lamb." Our country is in big trouble and we are definitely experiencing spiritual warfare. Today, the media and radical left are trying to convince us what is right is wrong and what is up is down. Church attendance is low, our rule of law has been weakened, and the debauchery with regard to children, marriage, and respect for life seems like the times of Sodom and Gomorrah. I know the truth is the light and God will get the last word. We need to keep the faith and pray. When reading about the crucifixion, I took the following notes and surmised politics haven't changed much. Politicians still today, bank on gullible voters and use half truths and exaggerations to gain support. Be careful of those who say one thing, but in reality, like the Pharisees, only care about preserving their power. When Jesus walked this earth, the Pharisees were exposed, and because they were exposed by the true and authentic holiness of Christ, they hated Him, and they couldn't wait to get rid of Him. It wasn't just the Pharisees who wanted Jesus dead - King Herod also saw Jesus as a trouble-maker, who was coming between him and his political ambitions. Jesus' presentation of Himself as the Messiah was a threat to the Herodians' attempt to make Herod the influential political power in the land. Both the Herodians and the Pharisees wanted Jesus out of the way because he was a threat to their power. That is why they came together to plot against Jesus (Mark 3:6). It was not for anything Godly or righteous that the religious leaders wanted to put Jesus to death. It was their pride, arrogance, and hypocrisy that caused them to bring Jesus before Pilate to be crucified. They did not want to hear the truth of God. Jerusalem was full of Jews who travelled there to celebrate Passover. The religious leaders did not want to arrest Jesus during Passover because they were afraid that the people might riot. But God's timing was different. Reasons why the religious authorities hated Jesus so much: They were jealous; they couldn't stand it because they were envious and suspicious of his popularity. They were upset that he didn't join in with them, but rather publicly rebuked them. He exposed their phony righteousness for what it was. They were afraid of losing their power and authority. The Pharisees were judgmental. Jesus said, "You're like dead men's tombs, whitewashed sepulchers that are painted without blemish on the surface, but inside are filled with dead men's bones. You clean the outside of the platter, but the other side, the inner side, is filthy. You do everything possible to hide that impurity, that grime, and that filthiness from public view. You pretend to be righteous, and you major in that pretense of being righteous." -Matthew 23:27 The Pharisees were fake. And nothing reveals a counterfeit like the presence of the genuine. Jesus died for our sins today 2023 years ago. "Jesus saith unto him, I am the way, the truth, and the life: no man cometh unto the Father, but by me." -John 14:6 | == | == for the opponent mudslinging/ debate meltdown video. == for my response to my opponent, Duane Adams', attack email with just facts. == for the 'Dirty Politics" flyer. My opponent, Duane Adams, bragged about this flyer during our debate. It is costing him and he should be ashamed. | Bob Good is supporting Duane because, when referring to John McGuire in a video, Bob said, "He tried to primary me". But I did not primary him. So let me get this straight, to protect his power Bob is supporting a three-time Democrat who has raised taxes in Louisa County 40% over the last five years, and calls a constituent a coward because I considered my options? This is a close race, but we will win if all of our delegates show up on May 6 at Buckingham County High School. I'm running for State Senate so we can help Governor Glenn Youngkin un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | Seventy Plus Endorsement List == | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life == Pro-Gun America 1st Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 == NFIB 100 Endorsement List == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | Friends of John McGuire | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

name: Senator Heidi Campbell
subject: Will you endorse me, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://8g4sz0xp.paperform.co [https://8g4sz0xp.paperform.co]
Peter,
What happened in the state house chamber was a national embarrassment. The entire nation watched as the TennesseeThree conducted a master-class in defending democracy.
I was proud to stand with them on the floor, and deeply disappointed that our totalitarian state dragged three duly elected representatives and the ~200K Tennesseans they represent through six hours of deliberations that clearly show what a terrible mistake their response to the Covenant shooting has been.
We need a Mayor who has the courage, character, and capability to lead us through the challenges we’ll continue to face in the coming years as we navigate the continued assault on our economy, democracy, and local control.
We have seen an incredible surge in support for our grassroots movement to put Nashville residents first – hundreds of neighbors have already joined our campaign as launch day donors! But to continue building our coalition, we need even more folks to show their early support.
Peter, will you put Nashville residents first by endorsing our campaign for Mayor? [https://8g4sz0xp.paperform.co]
ENDORSE HEIDI [https://8g4sz0xp.paperform.co]
I love our community. I love the people within and I know that with a lot of hard work – and a little bit of grit – we will put Nashville residents first.
I want to use my strong relationships with state leadership, regional mayors, and community groups to work for you as Nashville Mayor.
But I can’t get there alone. Peter, a key part of any people-first campaign is broad support and endorsements from community leaders and working-class folks – and our list is growing by the day!
But there's one endorsement I'm missing, Peter: yours. I'm humbly asking, will you join our team with an endorsement today? >> [https://8g4sz0xp.paperform.co]
JOIN OUR TEAM [https://8g4sz0xp.paperform.co]
I can’t tell you how much your support means to me.
With gratitude,
Heidi
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://8g4sz0xp.paperform.co [https://8g4sz0xp.paperform.co]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Campbell for Mayor
P.O. Box 330302
Nashville, Tennessee 37203
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://8g4sz0xp.paperform.co]
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor, Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Campbell for Mayor
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

name: Team Casey
subject: PA is going to be competitive, so we need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
The GOP and Mitch McConnell are already targeting Bob Casey.
| Folks,

Bob Casey is officially running for re-election to keep representing Pennsylvania in the Senate — and he needs all the support he can get.

The GOP and Mitch McConnell are already targeting Bob, and **PA’s historic competitiveness will make the 2024 Senate race among the most expensive and competitive in the country once again.**

[That’s why we’re coming to you to ask: Can you become a Founding Donor of this campaign by splitting a donation between Bob Casey and Voter Protection Project today? Whatever you can contribute will have a big impact on this race.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43216?t=6&akid=7035%2E878179%2EGaBEmK) | [**CHIP IN $10 »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43216?t=7&akid=7035%2E878179%2EGaBEmK)
---
Bob Casey always stands up for the working families of Pennsylvania in the Senate. He’s spent his life fighting against the ultra-wealthy and the special interests that threaten our hardworking people — and he’s the first and only person to have won six statewide elections in Pennsylvania.

To win again, we’re going to fight for votes in each and every one of PA’s 67 counties. We’ve done it before, and we’ll do it again.

[If you’re with us, split a donation between Voter Protection Project and our campaign to re-elect Bob Casey today.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43216?t=8&akid=7035%2E878179%2EGaBEmK)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Bob Casey and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43217?t=9&akid=7035%2E878179%2EGaBEmK)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43218?t=10&akid=7035%2E878179%2EGaBEmK)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43219?t=11&akid=7035%2E878179%2EGaBEmK)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43220?t=12&akid=7035%2E878179%2EGaBEmK)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43221?t=13&akid=7035%2E878179%2EGaBEmK)
No one knows PA like we do — and together, we’ll win.

Thank you,

Team Casey
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7035%2E878179%2EGaBEmK). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7035%2E878179%2EGaBEmK).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=7035%2E878179%2EGaBEmK) to request fewer emails. clean_body: The GOP and Mitch McConnell are already targeting Bob Casey. | Folks, Bob Casey is officially running for re-election to keep representing Pennsylvania in the Senate — and he needs all the support he can get. The GOP and Mitch McConnell are already targeting Bob, and PA’s historic competitiveness will make the 2024 Senate race among the most expensive and competitive in the country once again. | Bob Casey always stands up for the working families of Pennsylvania in the Senate. He’s spent his life fighting against the ultra-wealthy and the special interests that threaten our hardworking people — and he’s the first and only person to have won six statewide elections in Pennsylvania. To win again, we’re going to fight for votes in each and every one of PA’s 67 counties. We’ve done it before, and we’ll do it again. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Bob Casey and VPP will go through immediately: No one knows PA like we do — and together, we’ll win. | **Duarte Campaign off to "Red Hot" start to 2024,**
******raising $586,000 in Q1**
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
April 10, 2024
---
CONTACT: [Duane Dichiara](mailto:ddichiara@axiomstrategies.com?subject=%5BDuarte%5D)
(916) 997-4784
---
| | (Modesto, CA) — Congressman John Duarte's (R-CA13) 2024 re-election campaign is starting off “Red Hot”, hauling in over **$586,000** in Q1. Coming off the second-closest House victory in 2022, the Duarte campaign is full steam ahead, sending a farmer back to Congress in 2024.

Campaign donations came from a wide coalition of business owners, community leaders, and neighbors. The Duarte campaign is thankful to the hundreds of supporters who share a vision of a better and brighter future for the Valley.

Congressman John Duarte released the following statement regarding the Q1 fundraising numbers:

"High gas prices, soaring inflation, and rising crime are crushing hard-working families. We are thankful for those throughout the Valley and the country who believe in our vision to fight for the American Dream and provide relief for overburdened California families." ###

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: (FOR REVIEW): Peter LCV Annual Fund Status: [PENDING]
body:
__Environmental protection in serious jeopardy. |
---

|
Peter -- we've just kicked off our 2023 Annual Fund Drive at LCV, and it comes at a critical time.

Here's the situation: this summer, the government could go into default and risk a major economic crisis unless Congress agrees to allow the federal government to pay its past debts as they come due. That any members of Congress would even consider not allowing the U.S. to pay expenses already incurred is outrageous, especially given the global economic damage it could wreak.

With Democrats in control of the Senate, normally these extremist House Republican threats to gut environmental enforcement would be dead-on-arrival. But this time is different -- there's _huge_ pressure to reach a deal, and any debt limit or budget deal requires at least _some_ Republican support in both the House and Senate.

**Every indication is that they will attempt to use these negotiations to force deep cuts to environmental protections.** This is truly urgent -- we need to scale up a campaign to ensure they don't succeed. That means pressuring members of Congress all the way until a deal is passed... but the truth is, we don't have the resources to pull that off right now. _So we 're asking:_

[Can you chip in to support our 2023 Annual Fund Drive and bring us closer to our goal? I hope we can count on your support during this critical time. Please make a gift of just $5 to power our campaign to stop Republicans from gutting environmental protections.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/pNy7f7PY_)

Everything is on the table right now. Just a few weeks ago, House Republicans passed H.R.1 -- a bill dubbed the "Polluters Over People Act."

The bill was numbered "1" as a signal that it's **House Republicans ' top legislative priority** -- and it included a massive increase in oil and gas drilling, additional pipelines, gutting the Clean Air Act and other bedrock environmental laws, and sabotages affordable clean energy investments from the historic climate bill passed last year. It would also gut the power of communities to push back on projects that affect them -- while blocking President Biden from being able to intervene.

This bill will not move in the Senate, but with budget negotiations looming, **we expect Republicans to attempt to force many of those same handouts to Big Oil execs into the deal.**

| | **
** **_JUST ANNOUNCED:_
LCV 2023 ANNUAL DRIVE **

Supporter Record: Peter Willis
Campaign Giving Status: [PENDING -- GIVE NOW >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/pNy7f7PY_)

Deadline: April 30, 2023
Fundraising Goal: $45,000

[DONATE TODAY >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/pNy7f7PY_) |
---|---|---

This is a big moment for the environmental movement. In November 2022, we turned out and elected even more environmental champions to the Senate in a surprise victory. But the margins are tight -- **Senate Republicans only need to pull away _two_ votes to pass their anti-environmental agenda.**

We can't let that happen, Peter. **We _need_ to escalate our pressure campaign if we're going to hold the line in the Senate.** The future of our environment and our communities depends on what we do right now.****

[We can't give up now. We're counting on environmentalists like you to step up and stop Republicans' anti-environmental agenda. Please make a gift today to help us reach our 2023 Annual Fund goal. Even $5 helps when you give today.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/pNy7f7PY_)

Thanks so much for your support.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9384157&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcyMDI1MTY0OAS2&spReportId=MTcyMDI1MTY0OAS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9384157&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcyMDI1MTY0OAS2&spReportId=MTcyMDI1MTY0OAS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/ambdFr4KW_) |

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: No more professional politicians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
It's going to take an outsider in the White House to deliver the results we need to put America back on track.

| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d163958921c5447f87d2ba78f258055b&_e=LyP_GeFrq1ZTr0sfDF8wVhHlo6LhohhMQ-wemsCVhWcWICjx5b2F-9nrP2Z_lWQu2Ks8dt4jFRzJO7ipKbaJ2qhn4pp73Bxjwt5aaG4Jo7yvJIgekd6pL_JtZ9yf6X1nsBnsXoooBaxCYQSzgGBEjRozpWZgMAjUu9WzHfZzgU-jjY2GpRFnrv4uJz6SsZH1BbamrTB_bFZZ-P9y3VwdAUzI1e9zlhx11HLAgD4jSsDUaIpMrhQgT14ulD-BA4mFHmZc9RHHO6cARLGocP1RHlTKTJr4TtQ-Vwi52p2l88yn1vLyNKqS3u1iBIEZm4uIvMborNfUGmpUxOjNgIf5bcArJtBaQO1zu4jZXm1ElmxCKpTvaTTBICjVdKlmDKIaQbnlzpfnO30WBV_hRh9TiDgJZ9zW1CtWtfaOu31cx8w%3D)
Fellow American,

A professional politician can't make the changes we need to deliver for America.

We need an outsider with the courage to GUT the managerial bureaucracy that has grown so toxic and corrupt that it undermines American values.

Fellow American, I am that outsider.

I've never held public office. I haven't spent years dialing for dollars from big donors - so I am not beholden to them. I am not beholden to ANYONE.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d163958921c5447f87d2ba78f258055b&_e=LyP_GeFrq1ZTr0sfDF8wVhHlo6LhohhMQ-wemsCVhWcWICjx5b2F-9nrP2Z_lWQu2Ks8dt4jFRzJO7ipKbaJ2qhn4pp73Bxjwt5aaG4Jo7yvJIgekd6pL_JtZ9yf6X1nsBnsXoooBaxCYQSzgGBEjRozpWZgMAjUu9WzHfZzgU-jjY2GpRFnrv4uJz6SsZH1BbamrTB_bFZZ-P9y3VwdAUzI1e9zlhx11HLAgD4jSsDUaIpMrhQgT14ulD-BA4mFkbhZSJWXDG0xGomqcroxEiX6e7DW6pc-5xi40UtRWfoeYqm62F9cU3QTeZ2hdEBhSQ_925VsDWOvr9WbyhGEdW-P30eNHRymo53xX8TdB6MW3XToQlc0zipX64gb65or0OOQ5uQE-z4KhU6jXEgFrAnAwXMxozlmrxSwLBxim6Q%3D)
We must change how things are done in Washington - I am ready to take on this fight. I am investing my own money, but I can't do this alone.

I am not asking for a lot - _**[just $1 or even $5 before midnight.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d163958921c5447f87d2ba78f258055b&_e=LyP_GeFrq1ZTr0sfDF8wVhHlo6LhohhMQ-wemsCVhWcWICjx5b2F-9nrP2Z_lWQu2Ks8dt4jFRzJO7ipKbaJ2qhn4pp73Bxjwt5aaG4Jo7yvJIgekd6pL_JtZ9yf6X1nsBnsXoooBaxCYQSzgGBEjRozpWZgMAjUu9WzHfZzgU-jjY2GpRFnrv4uJz6SsZH1BbamrTB_bFZZ-P9y3VwdAUzI1e9zlhx11HLAgD4jSsDUaIpMrhQgT14ulD-BA4mF0XgZtrzsve02bUnNRh_fi3kfkLsZd7-70zpwYEasXNtVIMdiklArYo9A3sgcr2kLgp9aH7JVv0vptwM7GmzH28rJKFyBUGTi7PsWt29u_t40l6PhNj1cEEj5dg3lDoUK8N74QRAddpsmDiR5xY3RXO7JrhxHGqbvcs1n0QZBS38%3D)**_

My goal is to boost our number of unique donors in this race, so a little bit from conservatives like you across the country will help us fuel this movement.

Let's do this together, Fellow American.

I am counting on you,

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d163958921c5447f87d2ba78f258055b&_e=LyP_GeFrq1ZTr0sfDF8wVhHlo6LhohhMQ-wemsCVhWcWICjx5b2F-9nrP2Z_lWQu2Ks8dt4jFRzJO7ipKbaJ2qhn4pp73Bxjwt5aaG4Jo7yvJIgekd6pL_JtZ9yf6X1nsBnsXoooBaxCYQSzgGBEjRozpWZgMAjUu9WzHfZzgU-jjY2GpRFnrv4uJz6SsZH1BbamrTB_bFZZ-P9y3VwdAUzI1e9zlhx11HLAgD4jSsDUaIpMrhQgT14ulD-BA4mFRpXZAfeUoNDeLEL1WkVZBmPBr9G8s2LCEUpM8XnJMuyMduRAH-7TAHgFg1Dn5-h9dSu1O9XUWw2zPrGpLmjMFGqqJkt4W4LFhssEW4mY9XcT08GFIqhtCcWfnyqHKP4Q6GSesorngWRGg1icLy4iDMbB9E-PBtL34qTH418k2VM%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: It's going to take an outsider in the White House to deliver the results we need to put America back on track. | Fellow American, A professional politician can't make the changes we need to deliver for America. We need an outsider with the courage to GUT the managerial bureaucracy that has grown so toxic and corrupt that it undermines American values. Fellow American, I am that outsider. I've never held public office. I haven't spent years dialing for dollars from big donors - so I am not beholden to them. I am not beholden to ANYONE. We must change how things are done in Washington - I am ready to take on this fight. I am investing my own money, but I can't do this alone. I am not asking for a lot - My goal is to boost our number of unique donors in this race, so a little bit from conservatives like you across the country will help us fuel this movement. Let's do this together, Fellow American. I am counting on you, Vivek Ramaswamy | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. name: Derek Kilmer
subject: A Trump-appointed judge ruled in favor of anti-choice extremists.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
I'll never stop fighting for the right to fundamental reproductive care.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61588981/400562744/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjY3MjM3MGQtZGRkNy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sq5RvgdvoJjtlVAjrXtl987Hy_hTba5f9n5iN3xkeik=&emci=2c20dac4-d3d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f672370d-ddd7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

Peter,

A Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas has ordered the Food and Drug Administration to pull mifepristone, a pill used for medication abortions, off the market. In a contradictory ruling, a federal judge in Washington demanded the FDA keep the pill available in most states that allow abortion.

**Currently, the future of mifepristone is uncertain. If the Texas judge’s ruling goes into effect, it would effectively strip millions of women of their right to safe, non-surgical abortions.**

I want to be clear, Peter: No lawmaker or judge should be allowed to weigh in on women's personal healthcare decisions. And for over 20 years, mifepristone has been used by more than **5 million women** to safely end their pregnancies in the United States since it was first approved by the FDA.

Since the conservative-led Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , anti-choice lawmakers are doing everything they can to try and severely limit abortion care or ban it altogether.**This is unacceptable.**

Peter, I will continue to stand alongside the majority of Washingtonians and Americans who believe that reproductive care IS health care. Personal decisions about reproductive health care — including abortions — are best made by women in consultation with their doctors.

**I'll be proud to vote for the re-introduced Women's Health Protection Act in the House — which would enshrine the right to choose under the law and would prohibit bans, mandatory waiting periods, and other restrictions on a person's reproductive rights.**

**[Join me in supporting the 2023 Women's Health Protection Act by signing my petition. Together, we can urge Congress to codify the right to choose into law and protect the lives of millions of American women.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61588982/400562745/422952498?ms=em23_230410_pillrr_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em23_230410_pillrr_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em23_230410_pillrr_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230410_pillrr_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=ycjZToX4rRDcb5gIjWUFRR1ZWefHxGNr19vayzHYkVjHcl2Ad1DndDS5l+HDslya0rmPgMAv/h4ZQBuZ2Tt3tDldMN+HfxkB64vw5ntwxl1N4VVLN9C/ltga3BUeXlsTH+NRy72HlvexCtMC0QgXhl5uE4kiDmLMg81mB8nbQPQ=&refcode2=f672370d-ddd7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjY3MjM3MGQtZGRkNy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sq5RvgdvoJjtlVAjrXtl987Hy_hTba5f9n5iN3xkeik=&emci=2c20dac4-d3d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f672370d-ddd7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)**

subject: Trump is facing justice…

body:
| | | But that may not stop him. | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xTerfBqG0VHddyZFF79qWDNs30TdVXmBmVR88-88TM7h3TlCh2JsiIl9Xm_O4jYw56ag8cnHJoD2emlAQ06a8UWF4jOuPiUVObNhnLKxn0F1PjIJjpSx9ydNw6ZcWKSb5w8Rvm6hHz-_LaJZ1QrxqalhZyAkrHcc4q_Q_ZKimkrsNw2GBjlQUD0p4ANS-Tr_CP3zDOlZZgCOXKHzpE7xSdtf9YN4IaUJxo7zuIoZxTFeui_8qDHaptrnAjI0c0aBpNL57T53C0pfVGpTPAC2iTeKPtaZ1Jo7tmmwiJfpXGzyzFkYx-X3wQrAP99fZtyxTNoGeCa2GPc6TTzvUw5zWBQaENqmJ6B8kNipepYv9LhB5TFV53iwti7rq4XqZo6zHiOApo384wL5Eg4u1fX40x/3v8/zYo8Cwb4RkusThLPxHkBfQ/h0/U9YfaAqoPD755nEuS-Ox6L_YZOOHplAtSnK53i0I3ms)

---
| Friend, we hope you heard the news on Donald Trump.

Last week, he was arrested and arraigned on **more than 30 counts** of business fraud and conspiracy. He is finally facing justice for all his wrongdoings, and one would hope he would accept that he is not above the law. But we all know that Trump will not accept the truth.

_Trump has made it clear that he doesn't plan to go away and will try to lie his way back into office._

**[So we need to ensure he or his allies cannot get a chance to run and spout more election lies in Arizona.
