| | Here's how we fight back: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61589231/400563349/541775293?sourceid=1048884&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjM4M2VhZS1kZGQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XuvEwOgYwUBlGZSMmrDqY84P22aQeMxRANrzo26BS2U=&emci=281af247-ddd7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1f383eae-ddd7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) In what is sure to be a trendsetting move among Republican-led states, Florida is moving to replace its existing abortion ban with a dramatically more restrictive ban. EMILYs List-endorsed women at the state and local levels are fighting back, but they need support.

**Please donate today to help Democratic pro-choice women STOP Republican anti-choice extremism in its tracks:**

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61589232/400563350/541775293?sourceid=1048884&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjM4M2VhZS1kZGQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XuvEwOgYwUBlGZSMmrDqY84P22aQeMxRANrzo26BS2U=&emci=281af247-ddd7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1f383eae-ddd7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Peter, it's been a week of highs and lows for reproductive rights in America.

_I'll start with the good news_ : last Tuesday, pro-choice champion Judge **Janet Protasiewicz** won her election (with the support of EMILYs List!) and became the deciding vote on the Wisconsin Supreme Court. This is a huge win for abortion rights in the Badger State.

_Now for the bad news_ : a conservative extremist judge in Texas ordered the FDA to reverse its approval of Mifepristone, a safe and essential abortion medication, last Friday night. And, just a couple of days earlier, the Florida state Senate passed a highly restrictive six-week abortion ban.

[**I want to tell you more about what's happening in Florida, but first, will you donate now to help elect pro-choice women who will fight back against attacks on abortion nationwide?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61589233/400563351/541775293?sourceid=1048884&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjM4M2VhZS1kZGQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XuvEwOgYwUBlGZSMmrDqY84P22aQeMxRANrzo26BS2U=&emci=281af247-ddd7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1f383eae-ddd7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)

So, after the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ last summer, a 15-week ban went into effect in Florida in July. And to be clear: this ban is restrictive and dangerous as it is. But, of course, the GOP didn't stop there.

Last week, the state Senate passed legislation restricting abortion at six weeks of pregnancy. This is effectively a total ban: many people don't yet know they're pregnant at six weeks, and even if they do, Florida's legal requirements for obtaining an abortion — two doctor's visits and a 24-hour waiting period in between visits — are nearly impossible to fulfill in that time frame.

The Florida House is expected to pass its version of the six-week ban this week, and Republican Gov. **Ron DeSantis** has already pledged to sign it into law.

This is not only devastating for residents of Florida, the nation's third most populous state, but also for people seeking abortion care across the South. Even with its 15-week ban in place, Florida has provided some access for those in nearby states with even more restrictive laws.

And this has been the Republicans' plan all along. The GOP wants abortion banned outright, no matter what they say and no matter what the (growing!) majority of Americans actually want — which is to keep abortion safe and legal. ****So, how do we fight back? We keep electing pro-choice women, like Janet Protasiewicz, who will work to protect and restore reproductive rights in every corner of the country. Donate now to join the fight:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Help-Women-Win-April23](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61589249/400563367/541775293?sourceid=1048884&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjM4M2VhZS1kZGQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XuvEwOgYwUBlGZSMmrDqY84P22aQeMxRANrzo26BS2U=&emci=281af247-ddd7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1f383eae-ddd7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you,

Sarah Curmi (she/her/hers)
Vice President of State & Local Campaigns, EMILYs List

clean_body: | | | Here's how we fight back: In what is sure to be a trendsetting move among Republican-led states, Florida is moving to replace its existing abortion ban with a dramatically more restrictive ban. EMILYs List-endorsed women at the state and local levels are fighting back, but they need support. Please donate today to help Democratic pro-choice women STOP Republican anti-choice extremism in its tracks: Peter, it's been a week of highs and lows for reproductive rights in America. I'll start with the good news : last Tuesday, pro-choice champion Judge Janet Protasiewicz won her election (with the support of EMILYs List!) and became the deciding vote on the Wisconsin Supreme Court. This is a huge win for abortion rights in the Badger State. Now for the bad news : a conservative extremist judge in Texas ordered the FDA to reverse its approval of Mifepristone, a safe and essential abortion medication, last Friday night. And, just a couple of days earlier, the Florida state Senate passed a highly restrictive six-week abortion ban. So, after the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade last summer, a 15-week ban went into effect in Florida in July. And to be clear: this ban is restrictive and dangerous as it is. But, of course, the GOP didn't stop there. Last week, the state Senate passed legislation restricting abortion at six weeks of pregnancy. This is effectively a total ban: many people don't yet know they're pregnant at six weeks, and even if they do, Florida's legal requirements for obtaining an abortion — two doctor's visits and a 24-hour waiting period in between visits — are nearly impossible to fulfill in that time frame. The Florida House is expected to pass its version of the six-week ban this week, and Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis has already pledged to sign it into law. This is not only devastating for residents of Florida, the nation's third most populous state, but also for people seeking abortion care across the South. Even with its 15-week ban in place, Florida has provided some access for those in nearby states with even more restrictive laws. And this has been the Republicans' plan all along. The GOP wants abortion banned outright, no matter what they say and no matter what the (growing!) majority of Americans actually want — which is to keep abortion safe and legal. **So, how do we fight back? We keep electing pro-choice women, like Janet Protasiewicz, who will work to protect and restore reproductive rights in every corner of the country. Donate now to join the fight: Thank you, Sarah Curmi (she/her/hers) Vice President of State & Local Campaigns, EMILYs List ****** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Byron Donalds
subject: 🚨I’m endorsing Donald J. Trump for President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
He's the ONLY leader who can deliver what America needs.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62542364:6AcQkqGNU:m:1:3331421248:D12E1A1A350F5C2DB3875E3AAA74B399:r)
---
Peter,
---
There's only one leader at this pivotal time in our nation's history who can seize this moment and deliver what we need...
---
_**...Donald J. Trump.**_
---
That's why I'm honored to formally endorse him for President of the United States in 2024.
---
_When he wins back the White House from Joe Biden, he'll provide the strength and resolve we need to END the Left's tyrannical agenda and Make America Great Again!_
---
Now, we just need your endorsement.
---
[**Please split a grassroots contribution between President Trump and my campaign as we work together to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62542364:6AcQkqGNU:m:1:3331421248:D12E1A1A350F5C2DB3875E3AAA74B399:r)
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62542364:6AcQkqGNU:m:1:3331421248:D12E1A1A350F5C2DB3875E3AAA74B399:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62542363:6AcQkqGNU:m:1:3331421248:D12E1A1A350F5C2DB3875E3AAA74B399:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62542362:6AcQkqGNU:m:1:3331421248:D12E1A1A350F5C2DB3875E3AAA74B399:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62542361:6AcQkqGNU:m:1:3331421248:D12E1A1A350F5C2DB3875E3AAA74B399:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250 ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62542360:6AcQkqGNU:m:1:3331421248:D12E1A1A350F5C2DB3875E3AAA74B399:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62542364:6AcQkqGNU:m:1:3331421248:D12E1A1A350F5C2DB3875E3AAA74B399:r)
---

2024 is no ordinary election.
---
The radical Left is on the cusp of completely DESTROYING America forever.
---
**Just look at what's happening to our country right now!**
---
Our borders are wide-open.
---
Inflation has made life unaffordable for millions of hardworking Americans and their families.
---
We're on the brink of WWIII as foreign leaders exploit the weak Biden White House.
---
Our justice system has become the injustice system.
---
We're facing an unprecedented assault on our rights and freedom from left-wing tyrants.
---
Far too many Americans have lost faith in Washington - and our Republic.
---
I REFUSE to accept that this is our future and let our great nation fall apart.
---
**But to get America through these dark times, we need to elect a commander-in-chief who's willing to sacrifice EVERYTHING to save our Republic.**
---
Since he first ran for office in 2016, President Trump's mission has been to drain the swamp and return power to the American people.
---
He's remained committed to that mission even in the face of an unprecedented political indictment, arrest, and arraignment by a Soros-funded District Attorney in New York City.
---
Like President Trump always says, there's a reason he's the corrupt Washington establishment's #1 target...
---
_**...it's because he fights for YOU.**_
---
That's also why a lot of swamp politicians in both parties hate him - but to me, that's just more proof that he's exactly the President we need to lead our country out of this mess.
---
I can't wait to work with President Trump to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN after we successfully defend our House majority and win back the White House in 2024.
---

| | | | | Peter, _Earlier we wrote to you about the unbelievable scandal of Hitler-fetishist, GOP billionaire, Harlan Crow, taking Clarence & Ginni Thomas on millions dollars worth of free luxury vacations aboard Crow's superyacht, to foreign countries, etc. _ **_It turns out Crow's also gave thousands in campaign contributions to former Democrat, full-time traitor to those who got her elected, Kysten Sinema._** _Sinema won't hold town halls to talk to her constituents, but she'll make time for a RW nut who's bouth Clarence Thomas, funds many of the worst Republicans and proudly owns a Hitler signed copy of Mein Kampf._ _**Meanwhile, Ruben Gallego is a veteran (for this country) who's a strong, fearless leader fighting for our values. He's a liberal and charismatic, which is why the latest poll shows him beating the Harlan-Crow-funded Sinema and election attacking nut, Kari Lake, in a three-way race.**_ [**_Whether it's lunatic Lake or Harlan-Crow-puppet, Sinema, we must get Gallego the resources to win! Please join Blue Amp in giving Gallego $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a16a0b8-a9e3-4fd5-87ff-361a6b155020/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for putting a patriot in that Arizona seat in the Senate. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. body:
I have never been more determined than I am right now.

| | | [ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a6ddea9829f435dad87e4ed18d34d38&_e=mYyP9GKK7MQt-lEuB2Mb98BeYfnoCbdsWQpTzxxvmwq2hRZzsSkg4WkjnPmak4iJNhGTzb6vN24-eOGoyFNi0QyuM2kIypPznifkw2YiV-TkaVQ3jf1AOH-2u7BuX6uuxT8VbgbwJBYB9JU3F5BPeITBIWEpIkmkvWd8UG4AgQ6lUwDHgKzK-wtrihMfMebS1gNC2YrMe4HkqN3fa1oFbLw7xfeZcyitAyMa_magUYBzj_M4pvm8119Jv5hxv7FWfBFmaIkFKs_kejpKqZII_jLavV_HlgJfFj2FOC5YpSg-qP56c_iIOU-OKJFQr1-etXBVr8QIZYMZ5gknhHVPQk0dc6tcZ4YsdP-dCmsvlZcn-WepGG2zOH-OhBapxUZtoTYU7naECMBrxIFMMXeCyw%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
I never thought this could happen in America - but it has.
**The travesty you witnessed yesterday was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden 's Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges - even after the statute of limitations had run out.**
_Let me be as clear as possible:**I AM INNOCENT.**_
The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it.
**What we 've witnessed is election interference in the highest order.**
Let me assure you - I have never been more determined than I am right now.
_They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country._
**The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission.**
If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they're allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me.
Their grip will close even tighter around **YOU.**
As I've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way.
But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA.

Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about.
In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they're entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy.
Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission.
They spied on my campaign.
They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier.
**And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice.**
They have crossed one line after another.
They have no shame.
They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense.
**Our country is dying - and we are the only ones who can save it.**
EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt.
These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated.
Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought.
We will be one country again.
Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom.

The travesty you witnessed yesterday was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden 's Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges - even after the statute of limitations had run out. Let me be as clear as possible:I AM INNOCENT. The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it. What we 've witnessed is election interference in the highest order. Let me assure you - I have never been more determined than I am right now. They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country. The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission. If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they're allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me. Their grip will close even tighter around YOU. As I've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way. But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA. | Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about. In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they're entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy. Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission. They spied on my campaign. They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier. And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice. They have crossed one line after another. They have no shame. They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense. Our country is dying - and we are the only ones who can save it. EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt. These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated. Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought. We will be one country again. Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom. Pray for me. Pray for my family. Most importantly, pray for our country. Thank you, | Donald J. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: How much is enough?

body:
As we continue to hear some Republicans assert that there is nothing we can do to save lives, I wanted to share this piece with you.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61590260/400565796/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230410-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzdiNDRiMWEtZTFkNy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=79hORpktyi19__AJRjpQaIwylAnnUoWiQs7xLnf5N28=)
---
| How much is enough?

Last year, I wrote a piece in our local newspaper asserting that fear for our children’s safety should unite Americans behind sensible gun safety legislation. In the past weeks – and even today – more Americans have been murdered and lives forever changed, and I clearly laid out the commonsense solutions I support.

As we continue to hear some Republicans assert that there is nothing we can do to save lives, I wanted to share this piece with you. There are laws we can enact that will save lives and stop the madness that brings families unthinkable heartbreak and causes fear in the hearts of so many Americans and especially our children.

_**Commentary: Fear for our children should unite Americans**_
_By Rep. Abigail Spanberger_
_6/2/22_

_We all watched in horror.

Last week, the tight-knit community of Uvalde, Texas, was ravaged by a mass shooting at an elementary school. Two teachers and 19 children were slaughtered in their fourth-grade classroom at the hands of an 18-year-old armed with an assault-style rifle. Parents received the worst news they will ever hear: “Your baby is gone.”

As a mother, I know the worry American parents feel across the country when we send our children off to school. But it is the reality that countless American children live in fear of being murdered in their classrooms that should unite Americans across the nation in wanting change.

Today, June 3, marks National Gun Violence Awareness Day. As a legislator who believes that no American should live in fear of being murdered, I know that it’s long past time to enact commonsense gun violence prevention legislation.

Since I came to Congress, I have voted twice to pass the Bipartisan Background Checks Act to ensure existing laws meant to keep guns out of the hands of those with a history of violence are being enforced—ensuring that background checks occur for all purchases, including for sales online and at gun shows.

I have also voted twice in support of the Enhanced Background Checks Act, which would extend the amount of time that federal law enforcement has to complete background checks. While 91% of checks are cleared within minutes, law enforcement has three business days to return that last 9%. If this window expires, the background check defaults to an approval—known as a “default proceed.” Now known as the “Charleston Loophole,” this default proceed allowed the man who killed nine congregants at Emanuel AME Church to purchase the pistol he used, despite being prohibited by law from owning a firearm because of his violent history.

Congress has more concrete, data-driven actions to consider. For example, I have repeatedly voiced my support and cosponsored legislation related to Extreme Risk Protection Orders (ERPOs), or “red flag laws,” to give law enforcement the ability to act when friends and family report concerns about armed individuals. These measures can save the lives of those in crisis and those around them—as we have seen in states like Virginia, where they are in place. After the Parkland massacre, we watched a Republican state legislature pass and a Republican governor sign an ERPO measure into law in Florida.

Congress should also enact safe storage laws. In 2020, firearms surpassed car crashes as the leading cause of death for children and teenagers in the United States. Responsible gun storage that prevents children from accessing firearms is vital in preventing unintended shootings, suicides, and intentional violence by minors.

But in the United States, endemic and high-fatality mass shootings are directly tied to unbridled access to assault-style weapons. Both the Uvalde and Buffalo shooters purchased their assault-style rifles at 18 years old.

Americans must be 21 to purchase a handgun from a federally licensed dealer. Yet the minimum federal age to purchase rifles—including semi-automatic, assault-style weapons—is 18. Raising this age to 21 is the first step towards protecting lives.

I also support reinstating the ban on large-capacity magazines. The use of large-capacity magazines in shootings statistically leads to higher fatality rates and the unfortunate reality is that requiring would-be mass murderers to reload saves lives—allowing people to escape and law enforcement to intervene.

As a former federal law enforcement officer, I carried a gun and two extra magazines every day. My mags were stamped with “for law enforcement use only,” because at the time, federal law limited magazine capacity to 10 rounds outside of law enforcement use—and mine held more than 10. That provision was part of the 1994 Federal Assault Weapons Ban, which expired in 2004.

Ultimately, we should move toward reinstating the ban on the manufacturing, sale, and transfer of assault-style weapons. I have twice cosponsored the Assault Weapons Ban, which clearly defines the weapons that would be impacted—firearms manufactured for the quick and efficient massacre of human beings—while exempting more than 2,200 firearms with prominent use for home protection and hunting. When similar provisions were in place under the 1994 ban, mass shootings declined by 37 percent. Once these provisions expired, gun massacres increased by 183 percent.

If we are serious about protecting America’s children—and all Americans—from gun violence, then we need to turn our reactions of horror into action. The problem of gun violence in America is devastatingly pervasive, but we are the country that has demonstrated ingenuity, progress, and strength since our founding. We must rise to the occasion._

_**U.S. Representative Abigail Spanberger is a Democrat representing Virginia’s 7th District in the U.S. House of Representatives. She is a former CIA case officer and former federal agent.**_

Thank you,
Abigail
---

I also support reinstating the ban on large-capacity magazines. The use of large-capacity magazines in shootings statistically leads to higher fatality rates and the unfortunate reality is that requiring would-be mass murderers to reload saves lives—allowing people to escape and law enforcement to intervene. As a former federal law enforcement officer, I carried a gun and two extra magazines every day. My mags were stamped with “for law enforcement use only,” because at the time, federal law limited magazine capacity to 10 rounds outside of law enforcement use—and mine held more than 10. That provision was part of the 1994 Federal Assault Weapons Ban, which expired in 2004. Ultimately, we should move toward reinstating the ban on the manufacturing, sale, and transfer of assault-style weapons. I have twice cosponsored the Assault Weapons Ban, which clearly defines the weapons that would be impacted—firearms manufactured for the quick and efficient massacre of human beings—while exempting more than 2,200 firearms with prominent use for home protection and hunting. When similar provisions were in place under the 1994 ban, mass shootings declined by 37 percent. Once these provisions expired, gun massacres increased by 183 percent. If we are serious about protecting America’s children—and all Americans—from gun violence, then we need to turn our reactions of horror into action. The problem of gun violence in America is devastatingly pervasive, but we are the country that has demonstrated ingenuity, progress, and strength since our founding. We must rise to the occasion. U.S. Representative Abigail Spanberger is a Democrat representing Virginia’s 7th District in the U.S. House of Representatives. She is a former CIA case officer and former federal agent. Thank you, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. body:
This is Chairman James Comer:

| |

---
| | | This is Chairman James Comer.

I can't believe how fast I became public enemy #1 of the Radical Democrats.

Joe Biden's Treasury Department is **STONEWALLING** our oversight investigations... Hunter Biden **LAWYERED UP** when I mentioned the word "subpoena"... The Liberal Media is **SMEARING** my name across the airwaves... Pete Buttigieg just **ATTACKED** me on social media when I discussed a probe into his agency...

_**[After all the corruption, scandals, and cover-ups by Radical Democrats that we're exposing, I won't let them intimidate me into silence. But I need your help to fight back. So I'm personally asking everyone getting this email to stand with House Republicans by chipping in JUST five bucks a piece.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=18ec238a0c3547659198220607f4f2b5&_e=SlZ5jGrAo-BlCrgU7yp7nIBVbOfrvq1zUdNE4SpGzzdxPx87Iiq1nMqB4JR0N4w5kglVhzxQxtOWr1sQtMm__FJFWhAHbrlfWHlIbr27cGqVpmLt3-22-hygYjcoWhC6VNnq4xQmySVPbXmuqyGMJRVEgTXwmY97cPTAloAjnCh6OTZb44rgeoxcXCwddHFhlSCwWBdnzNashiW5neKE1zooHAJLki8g4-LTXI68QhdDfgeRgDctM7rVWvXQIbJ6WUVblCrwuGgVDcL9XUfA0kWHvLYRXTAAEmMs9t60d8hEJLz263h3x2vHnsPWRTJtVDTda80VXjkPQa4uiBWsEh_-M6H2suOYClKLoLi1eBO2bguwQt8XPiv5pjYOibf0p4q88ubOAY9nE6FEEORFphVgMebis0AtqZEINsoQ5nJIddyHazppklc_mXQ9x0wFH0J-QhG9FCAQYFKDBa1iWA%3D%3D "After all the corruption, scandals, and cover-ups by Radical Democrats that we’ve begun exposing, I won’t let them intimidate me into silence. It's no surprise they're desperate to stop our important work...

**As the GOP 's lead investigator, I promise you they will now. **

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Theology 101
body:
I'm writing to let you know about something I think you'll find useful in your learning.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4cf5478dca9a43378b0802e3995be7dd&_e=vJ8fkhu1y4u3keRDn8avld681_GQdgaBwUsMw2NQGJzL7bVYH8g_XbbxHXgOm-cStjIU2mxGDd0mpmsf80O3whDGsuFD5datVCI2xaxa8HHbW_Ip2lvJ6tAisryXFdlQY5d-EzG3a1buwmBJfz3-R6bX8sr2_aaSpnP9B-YKm08jSq8iZkhjFIlzxArkGXiQ09mNZZrlpZZFw3X6ha2Ds4wJ38j6bK6yKMJjfTLvc7JW6VF2cqq89CnsGSFzLR7xyYBU5twMxE64SlRd-5H6L2vcpOKiZeOartgR70TXRje7D9eBiiL2fUNFIw7YZuBQpHM-76PAtEQAu9pOUQPrXSQ0WwSkL5wdMFKV90yJYHjgrqa0Wi1XM6T5C___nn6B6xFFI7FPvydlKvwh_KODn5FaBzGhyw_oGtOV9WdVGPOlmC1b7vUKOXHlUe9u-bgz) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I'm writing to let you know about something I think you'll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4cf5478dca9a43378b0802e3995be7dd&_e=vJ8fkhu1y4u3keRDn8avld681_GQdgaBwUsMw2NQGJzL7bVYH8g_XbbxHXgOm-cStjIU2mxGDd0mpmsf80O3whDGsuFD5datVCI2xaxa8HHbW_Ip2lvJ6tAisryXFdlQY5d-EzG3a1buwmBJfz3-R6bX8sr2_aaSpnP9B-YKm08jSq8iZkhjFIlzxArkGXiQ09mNZZrlpZZFw3X6ha2Ds4wJ38j6bK6yKMJjfTLvc7JW6VF2cqq89CnsGSFzLR7xyYBU5twMxE64SlRd-5H6L2vcpOKiZeOartgR70TXRjdzxkmTrfllBtjthWEITRvS6sp5eQjoUjrg-Qj5aI375T9DafaELdWuiv32bgXgmFCXvN0znWlpUotySOjfZJnCrnhTI4-EYhwj-vvfPqzehAVgm81PIGvbk4x5eP6GvxO7NQB5Uw9frDs6doKKTbhG) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as "theology," has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that's what Hillsdale's **" Theology 101" **online course is about--the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**" Theology 101"** has been a popular course, so I'm pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4cf5478dca9a43378b0802e3995be7dd&_e=vJ8fkhu1y4u3keRDn8avld681_GQdgaBwUsMw2NQGJzL7bVYH8g_XbbxHXgOm-cStjIU2mxGDd0mpmsf80O3whDGsuFD5datVCI2xaxa8HHbW_Ip2lvJ6tAisryXFdlQY5d-EzG3a1buwmBJfz3-R6bX8sr2_aaSpnP9B-YKm08jSq8iZkhjFIlzxArkGXiQ09mNZZrlpZZFw3X6ha2Ds4wJ38j6bK6yKMJjfTLvc7JW6VF2cqq89CnsGSFzLR7xyYBU5twMxE64SlRd-5H6L2vcpOKiZeOartgR70TXRjd9g4TL0-4U2Uc55AqHY7_TnpklXukLRZKOWUPASvJyjOfE3ne4gxAnMHgPazucM9V4BnfKi458IfOwDg791isQQpYYAsXwSo1v-pI12VL3-h1N0bXtlZ1obrSB-mdWLVFzO8fRvEEh7g6PpsQyJHiI). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though--and they go fast--so don't delay in getting your copy of **" Theology 101"** on DVD. clean_body: I'm writing to let you know about something I think you'll find useful in your learning. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I'm writing to let you know about something I think you'll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God. The study of God, also known as "theology," has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that's what Hillsdale's " Theology 101" online course is about--the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century. " Theology 101" has been a popular course, so I'm pleased to let you know that it is . You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative. | This is urgent, Peter.

On Friday, a single far-right judge in Texas ruled to halt the FDA's approval of mifepristone, one of two medications most commonly used in medication abortion in the United States. This ruling is based not in science but in dark ideological motivations to roll back women’s rights. [_**I’ll explain more in a moment, but first, I’m asking you to rush a split contribution to my re-election campaign and Planned Parenthood to protect abortion access nationwide.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61590913/400568263/481886242?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230410-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDUzYWYwZi1lM2Q3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iQgGzKhyitwAd_hOchh5raEPYDNwYGDyty19-F3HRRo=)

Here are the facts:
* Since being approved by the FDA over 20 years ago, mifepristone has been used by more than 5 million people in the United States to safely end their pregnancies.

* Mifepristone is used in more than half of all abortions nationwide.

* This court case is part of ongoing efforts by anti-abortion activists to dismantle reproductive health care nationwide.

When the conservative-majority Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ last year, we knew there were more attacks on abortion access coming soon. We need to take back the House majority for Democrats so that we can make reproductive health care access the law of the land. | | |

I won’t be able to win this reelection fight alone.**
[**If you’re with me, will you split a donation between Sherrod Brown and our campaign today? In 2022, Pennsylvania’s Senate race gave Democrats our slim, 51-seat majority. That means next year, our opponents are going to do everything they can to flip Pennsylvania red.
Republicans are already targeting this Senate seat and running attack ads. To defeat them, we’re going to earn support from Pennsylvanians from Erie to Scranton.
**Folks, I’m no stranger to hard fights**. I’ve been standing up for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities for my whole career, and I won’t stop now. There’s still more work to do to cut through the gridlock, take on the powerful special interests, and deliver real results for working families and children across our commonwealth.
But it’s going to take all of us. The first 24 hours of fundraising are critical to the success of this campaign.

clean_body: I want you to be the first to know. | | | folks, I want you to be the first to know: I’m running for reelection. It’s an honor to represent my fellow Pennsylvanians in the Senate, and it is their trust that drives me to get up every day and fight for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities. But know this: Mitch McConnell and the GOP are already coming for this seat. I won’t be able to win this reelection fight alone. = | | = In 2022, Pennsylvania’s Senate race gave Democrats our slim, 51-seat majority. That means next year, our opponents are going to do everything they can to flip Pennsylvania red. Republicans are already targeting this Senate seat and running attack ads. To defeat them, we’re going to earn support from Pennsylvanians from Erie to Scranton. Folks, I’m no stranger to hard fights. I’ve been standing up for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities for my whole career, and I won’t stop now. There’s still more work to do to cut through the gridlock, take on the powerful special interests, and deliver real results for working families and children across our commonwealth. But it’s going to take all of us. The first 24 hours of fundraising are critical to the success of this campaign. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Bob Casey and Sherrod Brown will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = In a race as important as this one, people like you make all the difference. Thank you, Bob Casey | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Friends of Sherrod Brown 3867 West Market Street Ste. 289 Akron, OH 44333 United States | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61591514/400570212/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzcxYjNmNS1lNWQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o2B7EF6ZOywrSbpXMWdCtR7rFQqshrZgTYBiq0NQgWc=&emci=8205cc90-d2d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1c71b3f5-e5d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15529135) | Hi friends, I hope you all had a great weekend. The news was buried in all the bustle of the holidays, but I’m alarmed by a recent decision by a federal judge in Texas to suspend the abortion medication that was approved by regulators 22 years ago – now one of the most common methods of abortion. This move could lead to an all-out ban on abortion, whether states allow it or not. This is a blatant attack not just on women, but on families everywhere who don’t want the government influencing these personal decisions. This goes against science and against our fundamental rights to make our own choices about our reproductive health. For now, this medication remains protected, but this move shows just how far anti-abortion activists will go to take away our rights. That’s why I’m emailing you today, team. As one of just a few frontline Democrats, it is CRITICAL that we keep my seat blue if we want to defend abortion access across the country. _**2024 is coming sooner than you think, and if we lose this seat, we could lose our chance to flip the House blue and legislate abortion defense once and for all.**_ [**If you can, chip in $100, $50, or even just $10 today to defend one of the most vulnerable seats in the country and fight to defend our most basic freedoms. I’m proud to be a defender of abortion rights and we can’t lose this seat!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61591515/400570213/-576037796?refcode=20230410-abortion&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzcxYjNmNS1lNWQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o2B7EF6ZOywrSbpXMWdCtR7rFQqshrZgTYBiq0NQgWc=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61591516/400570214/-1457537327?refcode=20230410-abortion&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzcxYjNmNS1lNWQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o2B7EF6ZOywrSbpXMWdCtR7rFQqshrZgTYBiq0NQgWc=)

name: Jane Fonda Climate PAC
subject: A new oil drilling project
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
We need to hold President Biden accountable to his campaign promises to act on the science to avoid the worst effects of the climate crisis.

| | | **US puts Italy-sized chunk of Gulf of Mexico up for auction for oil drilling**

_\- The Guardian_
---
| [FIGHT BACK ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61591928/400571480/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230410-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwNTdlODQzLWU3ZDctZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DbedIRvtg-Pc80Yz-zWGzx1Vy90mzJ2F5IGDV8kTkR8=)
---
The Biden administration put an enormous _**73.3 million**_ acres in the Gulf of Mexico up for auction for oil and gas drilling. This project is estimated to extract 1 billion barrels of oil over the next 50 years, according to the U.S. federal government.

This is the second controversial oil and gas drilling project in the span of the last few weeks that President Biden has approved. Willow, a new oil drilling project in Alaska, was approved just two weeks ago and will add dangerous consequences to the ongoing climate crisis.

We need to hold President Biden accountable to his campaign promises to act on the science to avoid the worst effects of the climate crisis. We know that he has the ability to step up and be the kind of leader the American people expect him to be, and we need to send a strong signal that ending the era of fossil fuels is not only good policy, but good politics.

name: Team AOC
subject: It’s time to impeach Clarence Thomas.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
It’s the House of Representatives responsibility to investigate.
#
A new bombshell report last week revealed that Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas has been treated to luxury vacations by a billionaire Republican donor for _over 20 years_ and failed to report or disclose these gifts.1
From private jets, to private resorts, and vacations on his yacht nearly every year — these actions have broken long-standing norms for judges’ conduct and ethics rules.
In a statement, Justice Thomas said the reason and rationale for this exemption was ‘personal hospitality from an old friend of 25 years.’ Justice Thomas has been on the Court for 30 years meaning that **he began this relationship and received these sorts of gifts,****_after_****he was appointed to the Supreme Court of the United States.**
This is not the first time that Clarence Thomas and his family have violated ethics rules. Last year, it was revealed that his wife, Ginni Thomas, personally pressured Trump's White House chief of staff to try to overturn the results of the 2020 presidential election.
Despite his wife's active role in Trump's attempted coup, Justice Thomas failed to recuse himself in a case regarding the release of records related to January 6 and he cast the lone dissenting vote to keep the White House records hidden from the Jan. 6 select committee — including the texts that involved his wife.
In response, Alexandria joined a handful of other Democrats in calling Justice Thomas to resign.
**For all of the Republican talk about a crime wave across the country, the crime wave is in the Republican Party.** We are seeing breaking of the law by conservative members of the court, we are seeing a former President of the United States just indicted in recent days.
If it is Republicans that decide to protect those who are breaking the law, then they are the ones who are responsible for the decision — but we should not be complicit in that. We need to hold our systems accountable, and we should not refuse to do that for political reasons.
**It is the House’s responsibility to pursue an investigation in the form of impeachment.**
Alexandria will continue calling for justice for all and to hold our systems accountable. [If you can, will you please chip in $3 today so that Alexandria can continue to call out corruption and ensure that no one — no matter how rich or powerful — is above the law? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230410.qDfeOW&refcode=em20230410-4110-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4110%2E2526796%2E-mjN4T)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230410.qDfeOW&refcode=em20230410-4110-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4110%2E2526796%2E-mjN4T)**
In solidarity,
Team AOC
1 - [ProPublica](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/17967?t=3&akid=4110%2E2526796%2E-mjN4T)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230410?refcode=em20230410-4110-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=4&refcode2=4110_2526796_-mjN4T&akid=4110%2E2526796%2E-mjN4T)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230410-4110-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=5&akid=4110%2E2526796%2E-mjN4T)**

**That's right, Peter:** Marjorie Taylor-Greene went on _60 Minutes_ and spent the whole time spewing lies and disinformation, such as calling Democrats **“pedophiles”** and claiming she never said that Parkland was a **“false flag.”**

Our question is — **_why do we keep giving this sorry excuse for a lawmaker a platform at all when it’s apparent that she stands for nothing other than hate and ignorance?_** Honestly, it’s despicable.

[In 2024, we’re determined to deplatform Marjorie Taylor-Greene FOR GOOD and elect a Black progressive champion in her place. RUSH $10 OR ANY AMOUNT YOU CAN RIGHT NOW IF YOU’RE WITH US →](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x8Bdi3DJx_tI_BkDTloM8oXtxrpByOksal4o4-OGwKQVtXxEBvshBx2z3yRMu0Z1b-JO6H0WFJf44Epoq7AsUWDQFN1Dgm_i8bYvtOAJ90sAm9g3tIqsWuX81kGgEw8wnhncuBvWGQEj5Pnkw7uc-VbEQNNIt6uRefoEAy6gqlzr5W3PY4_Z0kY3Ap6xZPcHCr8CyWeQwV-Gc3yV1sLgWJS-jRVj41gZ2tFogunf8r40tMnDyxaATL1O9D5lW6PoWbS5fX8XNhXMP6mth2xmAAwam12etemUTNizm49VIJPSmHQt2_TOPHv4QaLvX104FWDUO26COA_IEXzhiQQ_BovT6RkKcBBcfG2R8Rvn0LlSACsUi8IEJLY9zOwHvpLffkBmTEDU1eV1M-7BLwF2yl74BjvXWuM9BbcybeB0V-6ZdyGYoMbqUixo7FWzTKXq0/3v8/8d9verPLR4WXhyysm7y8Fg/h4/HOqxtbtVl1YrINs_i17dadIykleTgy16u0QCKOufRHU)

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Where I come from, a house still means a lot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress **[marcykaptur
body:
I have lived in this district, in the same house, for most of my life. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61592240/400572248/-818894537?refcode=EM_FR_230410FR_N_MK_45DA_8_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTgyNzJhOC1lOGQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W81rsot-dD8Y2uluGaDnlzD7PXII5e1jQ3VsR_YcxWE=)
---
I want to talk to you about my house. No, not the House of Representatives, but my childhood home in Toledo, where I still reside today.

Where I come from, a house still means a lot. It represents family and the stake we hold in our community. My grandparents were Polish immigrants choosing to lay down roots and raise their families in Toledo. They instilled diligence and duty into my parents - mom worked in a spark plug factory where she served on the UAW organizing committee, and dad retired from Jeep and ran a small family grocery store.

As the house was passed down, so too were the values of hard work and community service. Because my parents invested in me, I was the first person in my family to go to college. I worked in urban planning and development, but when my community asked me to step up and run for Congress, I answered the call.

I have lived in this district, in the same house, for most of my life. My constituents are friends and neighbors, and I am honored to serve and fight for them.

Governing is not always glamorous. Crafting, amending, and passing legislation is a grueling process that requires the dedication and patience my parents instilled in me. It involves identifying the needs of a community and then fighting hard to bring back the resources needed to help the region thrive.

From funding for job training in our schools or constructing the World War II Memorial to securing funding for a vegetable garden at a senior housing complex and holding back the Asian carp’s invasion of the Great Lakes, no project can be too daunting.

I love this district like I love my house. Our work is both challenging and fulfilling. It is the highest honor of my life to serve our community. I will always put forth my very best effort for the people of Northern Ohio because they deserve nothing less.

**[I’m asking you to help continue this good work in Ohio. name: Bob Casey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I want you to be the first to know.
#
Hi Derek,
I want you to be the first to know: **I’m running for re-election.**
It’s an honor to represent my fellow Pennsylvanians in the Senate, and it is their trust that drives me to get up every day and fight for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities.
**But know this: Mitch McConnell and the GOP are already coming for this seat. I won’t be able to win this re-election fight alone.**
[**If you’re with me, will you chip in to support our campaign as a Founding Donor? This is poised to be one of the most competitive elections in the country, so your support will make a huge impact on the start of this race.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49695?t=1&akid=8330%2E434096%2E4aWIn2)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49695?t=2&akid=8330%2E434096%2E4aWIn2)**
In 2022, Pennsylvania’s Senate race gave Democrats our slim, 51-seat majority. That means next year, our opponents are going to do everything they can to flip Pennsylvania red.
Republicans are already targeting this Senate seat and running attack ads. To defeat them, we’re going to earn support from Pennsylvanians from Erie to Scranton.
**Derek, I’m no stranger to hard fights. **I’ve been standing up for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities for my whole career, and I won’t stop now. There’s still more work to do to cut through the gridlock, take on the powerful special interests, and deliver real results for working families and children across our commonwealth.
But it’s going to take all of us. The first 24 hours of fundraising are critical to the success of this campaign.
[**Become a Founding Donor and join our team by making a donation of $5 today.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49695?t=3&akid=8330%2E434096%2E4aWIn2)
In a race as important as this one, people like you make all the difference.
Thank you,
Bob Casey

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230410-8330-footer&t=4&refcode2=8330_434096_4aWIn2&akid=8330%2E434096%2E4aWIn2)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=5&akid=8330%2E434096%2E4aWIn2)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=8330%2E434096%2E4aWIn2)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

body:

## Leaked Pentagon documents show **[the US knows more about Russian military operations than Ukraine's](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyxtt-trhiujldw-t/)** \- despite funding Zelensky's fight against Putin to the tune of $200B.
**AOC Urges Biden to Ignore Texas Judge** A sitting**[member of Congress is calling to ignore the rule of law](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyxtt-trhiujldw-i/), **shouldn't that be grounds for expulsion? **Score One for Global Warming** I attended a Colorado Rockies game Saturday night and **[can verify this new study about global warming and home runs is false!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyxtt-trhiujldw-d/)** **What Business Does he Have?** This is concerning! The **[son of George Soros has visited the White House](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyxtt-trhiujldw-h/)** more than a dozen times since Biden took office. **No One Was Arrested** Swimmer Riley**[Gaines threatened to take "legal action" after saying she was assaulted by trans-rights protesters](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyxtt-trhiujldw-k/) **during a speech about protecting women's sports at San Francisco State University. Unbelievably, **[no one was arrested](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyxtt-trhiujldw-u/)** for the attack. **Bud Light Boycott** [**More conservatives are joining in on the boycott of Bud Light** ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyxtt-trhiujldw-o/)after they named Dylan Mulvaney, the man who made millions becoming a woman, as the spokesperson. Meanwhile, **[no one is buying](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyxtt-trhiujldw-x/)** Anheuser-Busch products. **Stand Your Ground** Texas Gov. Greg**[Abbott promised to pardon a US Army sergeant a day after he was convicted of shooting a protester](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyxtt-trhiujldw-m/) **to death during a Black Lives Matter rally.

**Dems Calling for Thomas Impeachment** Justice Thomas is accused of accepting gifts from his good friend and not reporting them. **[Biden does this several times a year, and no one says a word.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyxtt-trhiujldw-c/) **AOC is considering drafting**[articles of impeachment](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyxtt-trhiujldw-q/). **_Didn't AOC get in trouble for accepting a dress?_ **Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyxtt-trhiujldw-a/)!**
* It's going to **[be nuts](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyxtt-trhiujldw-f/)**.
* Be careful on that **[first date](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyxtt-trhiujldw-z/).**
* Everyone**[hates it](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyxtt-trhiujldw-v/).**
* The**[only one](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyxtt-trhiujldw-e/).**

**[We are looking for your feedback](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quyxtt-trhiujldw-s/)** to understand your first impression of our messaging. disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee and authorized by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
Here in Pennsylvania, we know a thing or two about critical races -- and according to Cook Political Report, I’m one of the eight most vulnerable Democrats in the Senate up for re-election next year. | |
---
Hi Derek, it’s Sen. Bob Casey. I have some exciting news to share, and as a valued member of this grassroots team, I want you to be the first to know: **I’m running for re-election!** [This is poised to be one of the most competitive elections in the country, so if you can, split a $10 donation between my campaign and the DNC now.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y2CxEvkMOZ4Qh1H-BJ-4hFIdr1JfjwFdQm3m9bq7HIfyf6U61GSQfZSJ-Q2G2-M9eWbtid8ugo9eRLW54aYmcyLhQZQbQd-O7SODEiG-_uFOSHI1NN7SqjlcrfaADIUhWiPRXRa39I3HOzKjFCnxxk-jAxi1NdfJ5v9eMd5Mf4j2WuNC1udswBGSWK4GOI4iPgGVyDCArZ8ztzoKC9a3gLKnUy6g5UmjCMMYf0piw-TVzdleOwD5xz9Wieda1ekeQHLqwiUPd2m0B9k_LanRfuI-dDPmI_L_CPYxe1poQgOFaxVN-VgMgL_J29Le6MZPe0H4i88OhZHMRPGohmB7lp0CKPfWFD7MB9y0vBnds3JX3-OJNCa2INwoD3MJusjm2IXeJsCeLhjfS83dtsTjeF4rso_iqn4a8KNfQUE9l4LJ09Ae8DFMj9CwyOr8V6ZleAfiOg2Tx5T9H7qll0B_m4/3v8/XOpXsKTeSrmVBGpyslCxUQ/h0/fkQO_x3XGLKQdMf8ATn5kw6SVkw-4ii0uYZNT5IwfyM) Here in Pennsylvania, we know a thing or two about tight races -- and according to _Cook Political Report_ , I’m one of the eight most vulnerable Democrats in the Senate up for re-election next year. clean_body: Here in Pennsylvania, we know a thing or two about critical races -- and according to Cook Political Report, I’m one of the eight most vulnerable Democrats in the Senate up for re-election next year. | | Hi Derek, it’s Sen. Bob Casey. I have some exciting news to share, and as a valued member of this grassroots team, I want you to be the first to know: I’m running for re-election! Here in Pennsylvania, we know a thing or two about tight races -- and according to Cook Political Report , I’m one of the eight most vulnerable Democrats in the Senate up for re-election next year. In 2022, Pennsylvania’s Senate race gave Democrats our slim, 51-seat majority. That means next year, our opponents are going to do everything they can to flip Pennsylvania red. Control of the U.S. Senate could come down to Pennsylvania again. I know you are one of the DNC’s top supporters, so if you can, please split $10 between my re-election campaign and the DNC today. Born and raised in Scranton, I grew up with the belief that "all public service is a trust, given in faith and accepted in honor" -- words inscribed over the front door of the Finance Building in Harrisburg, and I’ve carried those values from the streets of Pennsylvania to the halls of Congress. I’m running for re-election so I can keep fighting for the needs of children, families, and workers across the Commonwealth -- but I need your help. Republicans are as eager as ever to flip the U.S. Senate, and they already have their sights set on this seat. Thank you for all that you do, Bob Bob Casey U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania Paid for by the Democratic National Committee and authorized by Bob Casey for Senate Inc. It’s a big day in Michigan – it’s been 100 days since the Democratic Trifecta has been sworn in!

In the last 100 days, Democrats have wasted no time getting things done for Michiganders. Together, we’ve been able to:
* Deliver the largest tax cut for seniors and working families in a generation
* Bring the supply chain home to Michigan from overseas
* Protect reproductive freedom
* Expand civil rights for LGBTQ+ Michiganders pass common-sense reforms to reduce gun violence
* Make historic investments in affordable housing, community development, and economic opportunity.
* And more!

But here’s the truth, we can’t continue to get things done if we don’t hold on to and expand our slim majorities in the State House and Senate. **That’s why I’m asking for your support to ensure we can keep making progress for the next 100 days and beyond.**

**[Can I count on you to pitch in $5 or whatever you can to help us keep getting things done. Your support will ensure that Michigan stays on the path towards progress and help us fight back from the inevitable right-wing attacks that aim to stall all our hard-fought amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61592874/400574092/-2128640666?refcode=EM_C_230410onehundred_N_TW_90DO_6_NG_N_EBother&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzcvMS85MDA5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWZmN2EwNi1lYmQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xonG7WKOJBvz38r5vmcOzPTKbAMIQssBMS2lIr91Yic=) ** While other GOP-led states are enacting harmful legislation that limits freedoms and raises costs, Democrats in Michigan are lowering costs, expanding fundamental rights, and investing in our people.

The first 100 days have been some of the most productive in Michigan history. But we're just getting started. Looking forward, I’m excited to:
* Pass a bipartisan budget that lowers costs, funds universal pre-K, makes tuition more affordable, saves families money on the purchase of an EV, and more.
* Work with the legislature to expand access to reproductive freedom and reduce harmful barriers to health care.
* Fight for federal resources to lead the future of cars, batteries, chips, and clean energy, creating tens of thousands of jobs and building on our economic momentum.

**[I will keep working with anyone to get things done and build a Michigan where anyone can envision their future, and I’m asking you to join me in building a better Michigan by making a donation of $5 today to support Democrats up and down the ballot.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61592880/400574096/-2128640666?refcode=EM_C_230410onehundred_N_TW_90DO_6_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzcvMS85MDA5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWZmN2EwNi1lYmQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xonG7WKOJBvz38r5vmcOzPTKbAMIQssBMS2lIr91Yic=)**

Let’s keep getting it done,

Gretchen Whitmer

| | Peter, Since the beginning of this year, there have been at least 145 mass shootings in the United States, including the tragic shooting in Louisville, Kentucky this morning. Just last week, two Tennessee State Representatives were expelled by the GOP-led Tennessee House for protesting for gun violence prevention legislation.
We invite you to tune in to a very special Instagram Live tomorrow, **April 11 at 2 p.m. ET** moderated by our President **A’shanti F. Gholar** and featuring Emerge Tennessee alum and TN State Sen. **London** **Lamar** , Emerge Kentucky alum and KY State Rep. **Keturah Herron** , and founder of Moms Demand Action and member of Emerge’s Board of Directors **Shannon Watts**. They’ll talk about the Tennessee Three, the gun violence epidemic, and different ways we can keep our communities safe from gun violence.

clean_body: Since the beginning of this year, there have been at least 145 mass shootings in the United States including the tragic shooting in Louisville, Kentucky this morning.| | | | | Peter, Since the beginning of this year, there have been at least 145 mass shootings in the United States, including the tragic shooting in Louisville, Kentucky this morning. Just last week, two Tennessee State Representatives were expelled by the GOP-led Tennessee House for protesting for gun violence prevention legislation. We invite you to tune in to a very special Instagram Live tomorrow, April 11 at 2 p.m. ET moderated by our President A’shanti F. Gholar and featuring Emerge Tennessee alum and TN State Sen. London Lamar , Emerge Kentucky alum and KY State Rep. Keturah Herron , and founder of Moms Demand Action and member of Emerge’s Board of Directors Shannon Watts. They’ll talk about the Tennessee Three, the gun violence epidemic, and different ways we can keep our communities safe from gun violence. | | | | We look forward to having you at this very important conversation. You can access this live by tuning into our . See you tomorrow! \- Emerge | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Emerge National. Emerge National does not endorse candidates. Contributions to Emerge National are not tax deductible. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Our new article in The Nation →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Hi Peter,

Last cycle, we faced an unprecedented wave of outside spending from
right-wing groups like AIPAC, who is continuing to spend millions of
dollars precisely because they are losing the generational and partisan
battle to progressive Democrats.

In [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133317?t=1001&akid=28420%2E1203867%2E8zx7Kb ]a new op-ed in The Nation, Alexandra Rojas and Waleed Shahid discuss
how progressives should build infrastructure to combat AIPAC’s unlimited
spending in Democratic primaries — even as some “progressive” consultants
and advisors seek to capitulate to the anti-Palestinian lobby.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133318?refcode=em20230410-28420&t=1002&akid=28420%2E1203867%2E8zx7Kb ][IMG]

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133318?refcode=em20230410-28420&t=1003&akid=28420%2E1203867%2E8zx7Kb ]We need to start raising money to fight back on our own
terms, Peter.
Will you make a contribution today to support our ability to speak out
against the AIPAC network and their millions?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133318?refcode=em20230410-28420&t=1022&akid=28420%2E1203867%2E8zx7Kb ]Contribute $3

In the last cycle, AIPAC backed over 100 insurrectionist Republicans and
spent tens of millions against anyone who spoke up for Palestinians in
general elections and primaries. AIPAC spent millions in just nine races,
and defeated nearly every Democrat it opposed — but Justice Democrat
Summer Lee, a working-class progressive from Western Pennsylvania, was one
of the only exceptions.

The progressive movement has to learn from Summer Lee’s victory over
AIPAC. It’s a recent and concrete example of how a strong candidate with a
well-run, community-driven campaign and large progressive coalition can
overcome AIPAC’s multimillion-dollar machine.

If AIPAC is going to spend millions of dollars on misleading attack ads
aimed at progressive Democrats, we have to learn to fight back. Just as
with Medicare for All, the Green New Deal, or criminal justice reform, we
must organize to align the preferences of Democratic legislators with the
voters who elected them.

Justice Democrats like Rashida Tlaib, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush,
Jamaal Bowman, and Summer Lee are leading a generational shift in the
Democratic Party.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133318?refcode=em20230410-28420&t=1023&akid=28420%2E1203867%2E8zx7Kb ]Peter,
please make a contribution to our
movement now to help us elect progressive leaders willing to fight back
and champion solutions to the crisis we’re facing.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=28420%2E1203867%2E8zx7Kb ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=28420%2E1203867%2E8zx7Kb ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230410-28420-footer&t=1026&refcode2=28420_1203867_8zx7Kb&akid=28420%2E1203867%2E8zx7Kb

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=28420%2E1203867%2E8zx7Kb

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Team Helen
subject: Before Helen takes the debate stage tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]
Tomorrow night, Helen and six other candidates will take the stage in the first and only televised debate of this race. It’s one of our last, best chances to make sure Philadelphians know Helen is a teacher and tough Philly mom who will deliver the safe, vibrant, thriving Philadelphia that every person in this city deserves.

We’ve set a critical $5,000 fundraising goal before Helen steps off stage tomorrow night, and we’re counting on your generous support to reach it.

Can you chip in to help Helen raise $5,000 by the end of tomorrow’s debate? Hitting this goal will show this movement’s grassroots power at a pivotal moment in this race:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:

CHIP IN $5 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-debate-em?express_lane=true&amount=5]
CHIP IN $12 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-debate-em?express_lane=true&amount=12]

CHIP IN $20.23 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-debate-em?express_lane=true&amount=20.23]
CHIP IN $50 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-debate-em?express_lane=true&amount=50]

CHIP IN $100 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-debate-em?express_lane=true&amount=100]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-debate-em]

Some of the candidates on the stage tomorrow night will be career politicians and multimillionaire self-funders. Not Helen.

She’s the only candidate with a 30-year track record of taking on this city’s biggest challenges. And she’s been doing it since way before she ever had a formal title or political power.

Thanks for stepping up in advance, and please don’t forget to tune in tomorrow night to FOX 29 at 6:30 PM.

Let’s hit this $5,000 goal!

— Team Helen
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here:
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-feb2023]
Friends of Helen Gym
PO Box 11766
Philadelphia, PA 19101
United States
www.helengym.com [https://www.helengym.com/] | info@helengym.com [info@helengym.com]
Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym

clean_body: I want to end this day on a strong note. Peter, I know our team has sent a lot of emails today, so I’ll keep it quick. Here’s what you need to know: 1. This morning, I announced my re-election campaign for U.S. Senate. 2. Pennsylvania is already shaping up to be one of the most competitive and expensive races of the 2024 election cycle. 3. There are only a few hours left to become a Day One Founding Donor of this campaign, and I really need your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, we'll process your donation to Bob Casey immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = If the last few elections have taught us anything, it’s that we can’t underestimate what Republicans will do — or how much they’ll spend — to win this seat. We need to be prepared for anything, which is why I’m asking for your support one last time before midnight. Thank you for being on this team, Bob Casey PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC. Bob Casey for Senate PO Box 58746 Philadelphia, PA 19102 United States

Soros thought he could get away with spending $1,000,000 to elect a prosecutor to do his dirty work.
But Soros yet again underestimated the strength of our movement.

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene’s transphobic rant
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Marjorie Taylor Greene went on a transphobic rant after Pramila reintroduced our Trans Bill of Rights in Congress.
#
Peter,
This morning, **Marjorie Taylor Greene went on a transphobic rant** on Twitter after Pramila reintroduced our Trans Bill of Rights in Congress.
We know that trans people, and trans people of color in particular, face some of the greatest barriers in access to opportunity, services and resources, and face some of the worst discrimination. And now, we’re seeing devastating attacks against trans youth by Republican state lawmakers — not because it’s what the people want, but because they have no plan to deliver for working families and want to drum up hate and transphobia as a distraction instead.
**Peter, all Americans deserve the freedom to live their lives with dignity. The passage of our Trans Bill of Rights would be a clear message to the trans community that we see you, we stand with you, and we will ensure you are protected and given the respect every person should have.**
[**Will you stand with our movement and show your support for the Trans Bill of Rights with a $3 contribution today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20230410.l1uiiP&refcode=em20230410-2358&t=1&akid=2358%2E420207%2EJjGdm4)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20230410.l1uiiP&refcode=em20230410-2358&t=20&akid=2358%2E420207%2EJjGdm4)**
The GOP argues that by granting equality and rights to one vulnerable group, it infringes on the rights of another. We know that is not true. In fact, our nation has a history of righting the short-comings of the original Bill of Rights to include protections and liberties for women and people of color.1
**Instead, the Trans Bill of Rights would:**
* Ensure that transgender and nonbinary people have equal access to services and public accommodations by making the Civil Rights Act of 1964 and federal education laws inclusive.
* Recognize the right to bodily autonomy and ethical healthcare by expanding access to gender-affirming medical care and other healthcare services for trans and nonbinary people.
* Promote the safety of trans and nonbinary people by investing in community services to prevent violence against trans and nonbinary people and expand services for survivors.

And much, much more to defend and support those who just want to live as their authentic selves.
This is an urgently needed set of protections, as Republicans and an extremist Supreme Court attack and roll back the fundamental rights of trans people across our country. And, right-wing media and GOP-led state legislatures continue to target our trans community with hateful, bigoted, and transphobic attacks.
[Show your support for our Trans Bill of Rights by donating $3 to our campaign fighting to protect our trans siblings now.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20230410.l1uiiP&refcode=em20230410-2358&t=21&akid=2358%2E420207%2EJjGdm4)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

* * *
1 - [ACLU](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41519?t=22&akid=2358%2E420207%2EJjGdm4)

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230410-2358-footer&t=23&refcode2=2358_420207_JjGdm4&akid=2358%2E420207%2EJjGdm4)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Peter, This morning, Marjorie Taylor Greene went on a transphobic rant on Twitter after Pramila reintroduced our Trans Bill of Rights in Congress. We know that trans people, and trans people of color in particular, face some of the greatest barriers in access to opportunity, services and resources, and face some of the worst discrimination. And now, we’re seeing devastating attacks against trans youth by Republican state lawmakers — not because it’s what the people want, but because they have no plan to deliver for working families and want to drum up hate and transphobia as a distraction instead. Peter, all Americans deserve the freedom to live their lives with dignity. The passage of our Trans Bill of Rights would be a clear message to the trans community that we see you, we stand with you, and we will ensure you are protected and given the respect every person should have. The GOP argues that by granting equality and rights to one vulnerable group, it infringes on the rights of another. We know that is not true. In fact, our nation has a history of righting the short-comings of the original Bill of Rights to include protections and liberties for women and people of color.1 Instead, the Trans Bill of Rights would: Ensure that transgender and nonbinary people have equal access to services and public accommodations by making the Civil Rights Act of 1964 and federal education laws inclusive. Recognize the right to bodily autonomy and ethical healthcare by expanding access to gender-affirming medical care and other healthcare services for trans and nonbinary people. Promote the safety of trans and nonbinary people by investing in community services to prevent violence against trans and nonbinary people and expand services for survivors. And much, much more to defend and support those who just want to live as their authentic selves. This is an urgently needed set of protections, as Republicans and an extremist Supreme Court attack and roll back the fundamental rights of trans people across our country. And, right-wing media and GOP-led state legislatures continue to target our trans community with hateful, bigoted, and transphobic attacks. In solidarity, Team Jayapal 1 - | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: KatiePorter.com
subject: [Sign Your Name] Regulate Wall Street
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Katie’s bill will help prevent additional bank collapses. Sign your name to show your support
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=20960%2E3422442%2ELGYrVQ)
Derek,
We wanted to provide an update on the legislation Katie introduced after the Silicon Valley Bank collapse.
**But first, here’s some context:** After the 2008 financial crisis, Congress passed legislation to require banks to hold onto more liquid cash. This thicker cushion lowered the risk for consumers—but it wasn’t ideal for the banks, which want to invest as much as possible to earn more profit.
Wall Street has been working to reverse these consumer protections ever since. When Trump was elected in 2016, a group of Senators pushed to allow medium-sized banks, like Silicon Valley Bank, to hold onto less liquid cash. Katie wasn’t yet in Congress, but as a consumer protection attorney she sounded the alarm that this was a dangerous move that put people’s money at risk. But in the end, Congress—in a bipartisan vote—caved to Wall Street and loosened our nation’s banking laws.
Less than 5 years later, we saw the aftermath of that bill when Silicon Valley Bank went under.
**That’s why Katie and Sen. Elizabeth Warren introduced the Secure Viable Banking Act (get it, SVB), to repeal that law and reign in Wall Street and Big Banks by reinstating guardrails that help prevent collapses like the ones we just saw.**
[**Can you sign on today to show that you support regulating Big Banks and standing up to Wall Street?**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_svb/?source=EMAG10_1_PET_20230410_V1_F&t=2&akid=20960%2E3422442%2ELGYrVQ)
**[Sign your name ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_svb/?source=EMAG10_1_PET_20230410_V1_F&t=3&akid=20960%2E3422442%2ELGYrVQ)**
Thank you,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAG10_1_PET_20230410_V1_F&t=4&refcode2=20960_3422442_LGYrVQ&akid=20960%2E3422442%2ELGYrVQ)**
