name: California Conservatives
subject: This is utter nonsense
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Republican Party
body:
We’re reaching our limits here.| | | We’re getting extremely frustrated, Peter. California is suffering huge crime waves, surging gas prices, rising homelessness and all Gavin Newsom wants to do is start a PAC to attack conservatives in other states. **[Take a look at the latest headline. >>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=dc5f7475c67f424db191b11232286216&_e=qj2w9ivE0x8W08vxYwMKci-GDk0VSyATePhysUvUkd8sz2rkC8Vpgxp4L4rdKnEUD0KRFoO7xqH2RxYN54xzmP4KyES0SJuKzVLwV_6X-socNTBA1CpMk2VCo4qrsWwiNC3wmlIbmpqtk_Y_rxBCRcz1N3UAGVjEly15mpVmv00cGzyZvSuo4DjZH1-fOcA0_royczYQNUqZdlFc9XIC0t_PURZ_qYWW-rV5skCWcuHVdkC7KVvY4WUWZr6AA10OSHw75H0nCukLtMvxhGuMScI_PbDG2o7sL92O8PxGxO7sJVN5IDtaiEtkeobOqnlJRhn7CiR14eSaOVLWEgvX0TUNqlI6D1thiccDtxeXHd8brgTmlft3IQtSfz8pkDFv "Take a look at the latest headline.>>")**

It’s getting to be unbearable; his home state has DIRE problems but all he can think about are his national aspirations...we’ve had enough. Californians DESPERATELY need TRUE leadership, not someone who’s constantly grasping for more and more power. How do we make that change? name: Adam Schiff
subject: Stop me if this sounds familiar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2091%2E5257348%2Ed_EwMA ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, stop me if this starts sounding familiar:

A global pandemic wreaks havoc on the United States, with little help or
leadership from a grossly unprepared and disastrously organized Republican
administration.

Senate Republicans block desperately needed economic relief, leading to
higher rates of food insecurity, child hunger, and child poverty.

Republican governors push to restart everything too soon, increase
COVID-19 transmission and accelerate the pandemic beyond our control.

The “essential workers” — who are paid lip service, but not a $15 per hour
federal minimum wage or adequate unemployment insurance — have to go back
to work, exposing themselves to COVID-19.

Hundreds of thousands die, leading to a shortage of workers in
high-mortality professions like cooks, bakers, package workers, and
agricultural workers.

And the same kids forced back into poverty and hunger when Republicans let
the expanded Child Tax Credit expire, and who may have lost a parent or
guardian due to this pandemic — are now the ones Republicans are pushing
to enter the labor force.

It’s one of the most cynical, disgusting manipulations of an economic and
health care crisis to exploit the labor market that I have seen in over 20
years in Congress.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230410-child-labor.HFsg4a&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC30_20230410_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2091%2E5257348%2Ed_EwMA ]Derek, the Senate must pass federal labor law legislation
that addresses child labor law violations. Add your name if you agree:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230410-child-labor.HFsg4a&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC30_20230410_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2091%2E5257348%2Ed_EwMA ]SIGN ON

Here’s how bad things are getting:

Former Trump White House press secretary and current Arkansas governor
Sarah Huckabee Sanders just signed a law allowing kids as young as 14 to
work with no work permit required. The kids don’t look too happy.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230410-child-labor.HFsg4a&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC30_20230410_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2091%2E5257348%2Ed_EwMA ]Arkansas governor Sarah Huckabee Sanders just signed a law allowing
kids as young as 14 to work with no work permit required

The New York Times interviewed over 100 migrant child workers in 20 states
working in violation of federal labor law — children as young as 12 that
have dropped out of school to work full-time, overnight, in factories, on
construction sites, or on assembly lines.

And GOP presidential candidate Nikki Haley is saying we need to raise the
retirement age for Medicare and Social Security for people in their 20s,
“so that it matches life expectancy.”

Start ‘em early, and don’t stop until you drop. That seems to be the
Republican mantra. No childhood, no retirement — just a lifetime of
working to pad their corporate donors’ bottom lines.

While Republicans attempt to ban books, erase the LGBTQ+ community, and
crusade against Democrats in an attempt to “protect children,” they are
exploiting those very children in ways this country hasn’t seen since the
era of the robber barons over a century ago.

We have to act.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230410-child-labor.HFsg4a&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC30_20230410_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2091%2E5257348%2Ed_EwMA ]Add your name to my petition calling on Senate Democrats to take the
lead on fighting back against Republicans exploiting child labor. When we
make it to the United States Senate, we are going to protect our kids —
once and for all.

Thanks for taking the time to read this message and stay updated on this
emerging crisis. Together, we have the power to create an economy that is
more just, where kids can be kids, and workers have the power to determine
their own destiny.

— Adam

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Derek, stop me if this starts sounding familiar: A global pandemic wreaks havoc on the United States, with little help or leadership from a grossly unprepared and disastrously organized Republican administration. Senate Republicans block desperately needed economic relief, leading to higher rates of food insecurity, child hunger, and child poverty. Republican governors push to restart everything too soon, increase COVID-19 transmission and accelerate the pandemic beyond our control. The “essential workers” — who are paid lip service, but not a $15 per hour federal minimum wage or adequate unemployment insurance — have to go back to work, exposing themselves to COVID-19. Hundreds of thousands die, leading to a shortage of workers in high-mortality professions like cooks, bakers, package workers, and agricultural workers. And the same kids forced back into poverty and hunger when Republicans let the expanded Child Tax Credit expire, and who may have lost a parent or guardian due to this pandemic — are now the ones Republicans are pushing to enter the labor force. It’s one of the most cynical, disgusting manipulations of an economic and health care crisis to exploit the labor market that I have seen in over 20 years in Congress. [ ]Derek, the Senate must pass federal labor law legislation that addresses child labor law violations. Add your name if you agree: [ ]SIGN ON Here’s how bad things are getting: Former Trump White House press secretary and current Arkansas governor Sarah Huckabee Sanders just signed a law allowing kids as young as 14 to work with no work permit required. The kids don’t look too happy. [ ]Arkansas governor Sarah Huckabee Sanders just signed a law allowing kids as young as 14 to work with no work permit required The New York Times interviewed over 100 migrant child workers in 20 states working in violation of federal labor law — children as young as 12 that have dropped out of school to work full-time, overnight, in factories, on construction sites, or on assembly lines. And GOP presidential candidate Nikki Haley is saying we need to raise the retirement age for Medicare and Social Security for people in their 20s, “so that it matches life expectancy.” Start ‘em early, and don’t stop until you drop. That seems to be the Republican mantra. No childhood, no retirement — just a lifetime of working to pad their corporate donors’ bottom lines. While Republicans attempt to ban books, erase the LGBTQ+ community, and crusade against Democrats in an attempt to “protect children,” they are exploiting those very children in ways this country hasn’t seen since the era of the robber barons over a century ago. We have to act. [ ]Add your name to my petition calling on Senate Democrats to take the lead on fighting back against Republicans exploiting child labor. When we make it to the United States Senate, we are going to protect our kids — once and for all. Thanks for taking the time to read this message and stay updated on this emerging crisis. Together, we have the power to create an economy that is more just, where kids can be kids, and workers have the power to determine their own destiny. — Adam [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner [ ]DONATE MONTHLY 150 E. name: Julia DeGraw
subject: Help us defend against Major Threats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61598410/400579762/-1698714710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ2YzA2YjAwLWYyZDctZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LwMDIVNbdH7eqeEUMDvFyebQZjsZs8vm007bVTLhwIg=&emci=ce03cc0a-79d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=d6c06b00-f2d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) | | | Hello Peter, Last week, three Major Threats had hearings in Salem. We need your help now to stop bad bills from rolling back our progress and putting our health, communities, wildlife, and land use laws at risk. **[That’s why I’m writing you today. We need your help to ensure that we’re ready to stop Major Threats now and through the rest of session. Will you make an urgent contribution today to help?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61598412/400579764/-1698714710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ2YzA2YjAwLWYyZDctZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LwMDIVNbdH7eqeEUMDvFyebQZjsZs8vm007bVTLhwIg=&emci=ce03cc0a-79d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=d6c06b00-f2d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) ** Every session we face threats to our health, communities, wildlife, and natural resources. Right now we are actively defending against several Major Threats:
* **HB 2631** proposes a seven-time fair market value multiplier for any livestock or working dogs killed by wolves. **That means a living cow valued at $2000 would skyrocket in value to $14,000 if it is killed by a wolf.** Amendments to this bill propose a five-time multiplier, which still fails to resolve the issues in the original bill.
* **HB 3086** would change how appointments to the Fish and Wildlife Commission are made, creating a Commission based on geography, not population. This model would result in the overrepresentation of some people while potentially erasing others. If we care about our land, wildlife, and how they are managed and enjoyed, we need a diversity of people and interests to be represented on the Commission watching over ODFW.
* **HB 2659** would repeal and delay implementation of the Climate Friendly & Equitable Communities (CFEC) program, established by Governor Brown’s executive order on climate. It would transform eight urban areas, making neighborhoods more pedestrian and bike friendly, improving air quality and livability for us all. A rollback of this program would **allow continued climate pollution, prioritization of cars over people, and inequitable access to housing options.**
* **HB 3382** would exempt port expansion projects from local and state land use laws for our deepwater ports in Astoria, Coos Bay, Newport, Portland, and St. Helens. In addition to eliminating public input on port expansion projects, **this bill poses a serious threat to Oregon’s largest estuaries, and ecologically vital habitat areas** where careful land use review is especially important.

These bills all share one thing in common. They pose major threats to some of the issues we care about most—protecting our democracy and land use laws, addressing climate change, and protecting vulnerable wildlife and their habitats. **Your help now is critical to ensure that we have the resources we need to stop these bills from advancing.** **[Please make an urgent contribution today of whatever amount is right for you. Every dollar makes a difference.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61598414/400579766/-1698714710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ2YzA2YjAwLWYyZDctZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LwMDIVNbdH7eqeEUMDvFyebQZjsZs8vm007bVTLhwIg=&emci=ce03cc0a-79d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=d6c06b00-f2d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) ** We are over halfway through the legislative session and the coming weeks are a dangerous time when our priorities will be at risk of being used as trade bait during negotiations. We cannot let that happen. **Let’s keep the pressure up and make sure that we are prepared to defend against threats and continue making progress for Oregon’s environment. ** Thank you for your support, Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV | |
---|---|---

|

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lwfaa/bourbon-and-blazers?e=cb396c52a2)
---
| |
---
| | Friend,

Please join us on Thursday, May 4th, as we gather to celebrate a classic American tradition, the Kentucky Derby! So grab your derby gear (dresses, hats, or whatever you’d like) and get ready for an evening of all things Kentucky Derby as we raise money to create tremendous growth in the Republican Party here in Georgia. Guests can view races, sip cocktails, and enjoy each other’s company at the beautiful Cherokee Country Club. Grab your spots while they are available!

To purchase tickets, visit the link [HERE](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=ca6509a83e&e=cb396c52a2) or go to [lwfaa.com/events](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=de63807e8d&e=cb396c52a2).

If you're interested in one of the sponsorship levels, visit the link [HERE](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=fb50d42b1c&e=cb396c52a2) or contact Mallory Whitfield at (404) 583-6081 or [info@lwfaa.com](mailto:info@lwfaa.com).

If you can't attend but would still like to support the organization, you can donate [here](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=4ee8342491&e=cb396c52a2).

God Bless,

Kelvin & Janelle King
Co-Chairs | Let’s Win for America Action

| | Peter,

Bob Casey is officially running for re-election to keep representing Pennsylvania in the Senate — and he needs all the support he can get.

subject: Book bans, defunding libraries, and more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026

---
Peter, growing up, my local library was a safe haven for me.
It's where I could escape the oppressive heat of Brooklyn summers and instead spend the day wandering between stacks of well-worn books, comforted by the scent of old pages. It's where I read my first book about the fight for progress, and where I began to envision myself as someone who could make change.
**But tragically, far-right lawmakers across the nation have chosen libraries as the next battleground for their culture wars**. And, through book bans, attempts to defund libraries, and the suggestion that libraries should be replaced with _church-owned alternatives_ , this fight is getting ugly – quickly.
**I suppose the GOP has chosen libraries to target because they stand for everything the GOP is attempting to eradicate: the free exchange of ideas and ideologies, the opportunity to walk a mile in someone else's shoes, and the power of knowledge.**
Peter, I've always been committed to the fight for progress, but this time, the attack on libraries feels _personal_. My local library made me the person I am today – and taking away this valuable community institution would only put yet another obstacle in front of the voiceless and vulnerable.
**That's why I'm committed to the fight for our public libraries, but I need to know if you're in this fight with me. So please, let me know:**
| | **Do you support****your local****library?**
---
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61600551/400582069/-1611178378?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1032-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDdlMTgxZi1mNGQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l8M98p1hbEwE_MbmaDQzEwsWwQOFp8OrdiiaYb0QVyw=&emci=0eba9394-b1d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=807e181f-f4d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)

Hi Peter,

I want you to be the first to know: I’m running for re-election

It’s an honor to represent my fellow Pennsylvanians in the Senate, and it
is their trust that drives me to get up every day and fight for
Pennsylvania’s working families and communities.

But know this: Mitch McConnell and the GOP are already coming for this
seat. I won’t be able to win this re-election fight alone.

our campaign today? This is poised to be one of the most competitive

name: Grassroots Opinions (via DLCC)
subject: re: SCOTUS ethical code >>
body:
Congress members AND the American Bar Association are calling for a code of ethics for Supreme Court Justices so they can be held accountable... | | |
---
| | It’s clear that the Supreme Court is no longer an impartial, fair branch of government. For over 20 years, Justice Thomas has accepted luxury trips nearly every year from Harlan Crowe, a GOP mega-donor – never disclosing them. But that’s not all: Reporting from _The Washington Post_ recently revealed that Clarence Thomas’s wife, Ginni Thomas, collected over half a million dollars to fund a right-wing activist group while she spread the Big Lie. Not to mention that the Supreme Court bowed down to right-wing pressure campaigns to reverse _Roe v. Wade_ – instead of upholding legal precedent. Members of Congress AND the American Bar Association are calling for a code of ethics for Supreme Court Justices so they can be held accountable for conflicts of interest. It’s time we make sure that our justices decide cases for us – not special interest groups. [_**So, what do you think? Take our poll now to share with us if you support a code of ethics for the highest justices in the land >>**_](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0gVmqLBk4ptk_P_GMRx-1TZFbbg9F02kk7hrszsXJHqV9LtDlWjIo0UfJOePhn1rmU1BToN6-WYrw40nHLjzPv0GR2CvaNG1AwBko5zBlj8EL9HjsztI8ASuQQ1DuXgf4hdX5bHODNnblkBpPiCGbjzoWBegCeR_TihHamftCnYnEXoFDkG0SH0hsTt_YnyWGg1PfzOXyaZLOIyWp4-BDMkFJ0K8IeB_m6IkDrblGJptrHSOkC7njx8a9bPdDPTScCZ-QaVMPw02IlEZ-nkC_iltSkQce3NNrOOhi5uxws57dv_l_KtJHKtPpLLt8gl3mBF0g8Q6thiftWvLBCb6HoAoDMa4aFUvmZm4scOmGjBd/3v8/7hoEHT10T_OO77Dk1fcIzw/h0/ih0Qn7HJ4H5pqAEFCzhMK3QLNJY1d1JbGTq-VTp1VPI) | **Do you support a code of ethics for Supreme Court justices?**

Yes
No
Unsure
**[Answer now →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0gVmqLBk4ptk_P_GMRx-1TZFbbg9F02kk7hrszsXJHqV9LtDlWjIo0UfJOePhn1rmU1BToN6-WYrw40nHLjzPv0GR2CvaNG1AwBko5zBlj8EL9HjsztI8ASuQQ1DuXgf4hdX5bHODNnblkBpPiCGbjzoWBegCeR_TihHamftCnYnmoX6rYYVDabK48j3JLWxjAxSTVbT8Pacn1HI5y4b3w4_1S_PpedJMOxNMqzRnHfM_tphVUWAnxUSfQFYgW-xkoCXYZtwwwFrozj1jIR8RkhEC11io8F4P6rweUqiBpPmmw6otijLgKYRH_7QQuzdVd2Wyvgyg6tFOrEAn5BOpUQ/3v8/7hoEHT10T_OO77Dk1fcIzw/h1/CtXYBh6a4rIloHGK9VX59BJYDh9omj-jTVloFcQ-zjo)**
---
The other two branches of the federal government have ethical standards they must adhere to – the Supreme Court should too.
Our nine justices serve for _life_ – giving them a lot of power for a long time in determining the rights and freedoms of Americans. That’s why it’s imperative that we trust them to adhere to the Constitution and put the laws of this country first.
Anyone making legal decisions that affect hundreds of millions of people should never have a conflict of interest, and that’s why Congress is considering a law that would create a code of ethics for Supreme Court justices.
**But before it makes its way through the legislature, we at the DLCC want to get an accurate read on what our grassroots supporters think about instituting this code.** [_**What do you say – can you answer our poll?**_](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0gVmqLBk4ptk_P_GMRx-1TZFbbg9F02kk7hrszsXJHqV9LtDlWjIo0UfJOePhn1rmU1BToN6-WYrw40nHLjzPv0GR2CvaNG1AwBko5zBlj8EL9HjsztI8ASuQQ1DuXgf4hdX5bHODNnblkBpPiCGbjzoWBegCeR_TihHamftCnYnEXoFDkG0SH0hsTt_YnyWGkVwEgsVaPdrn-VKSuv2grPYLx0aD0sMN_fBSN8r6xDjxeEBvOBLuFF0ymlHQ6APyzvm3apZWhNVcVo8aKKDnPeFV21l5pshk2avp_DSVNlIpRDYAYxmRUzqul27msXNzpINi-4-Ln4Gm1sYLwLbtYfcCpIyVQ_KyD1OsdNiXaan/3v8/7hoEHT10T_OO77Dk1fcIzw/h2/7RioVEtG0caeWFMdgmpg6OPrNLdsCTwReMMeyvNRjv0)

clean_body: Congress members AND the American Bar Association are calling for a code of ethics for Supreme Court Justices so they can be held accountable... | | | | | It’s clear that the Supreme Court is no longer an impartial, fair branch of government. For over 20 years, Justice Thomas has accepted luxury trips nearly every year from Harlan Crowe, a GOP mega-donor – never disclosing them. But that’s not all: Reporting from The Washington Post recently revealed that Clarence Thomas’s wife, Ginni Thomas, collected over half a million dollars to fund a right-wing activist group while she spread the Big Lie. Not to mention that the Supreme Court bowed down to right-wing pressure campaigns to reverse Roe v. Wade – instead of upholding legal precedent. Members of Congress AND the American Bar Association are calling for a code of ethics for Supreme Court Justices so they can be held accountable for conflicts of interest. It’s time we make sure that our justices decide cases for us – not special interest groups. | Do you support a code of ethics for Supreme Court justices? Yes No Unsure The other two branches of the federal government have ethical standards they must adhere to – the Supreme Court should too. Our nine justices serve for life – giving them a lot of power for a long time in determining the rights and freedoms of Americans. That’s why it’s imperative that we trust them to adhere to the Constitution and put the laws of this country first. Anyone making legal decisions that affect hundreds of millions of people should never have a conflict of interest, and that’s why Congress is considering a law that would create a code of ethics for Supreme Court justices. But before it makes its way through the legislature, we at the DLCC want to get an accurate read on what our grassroots supporters think about instituting this code. Thanks, -Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Kim Bernice Nguyen
subject: Mifepristone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
| | A Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas has suspended the FDA’s approval of mifepristone, a medication abortion pill used in more than half of all abortions in the United States.

This ruling is dangerous, cruel, and extreme. Mifepristone has been on the market for over two decades and has been used by millions of American women. Reversing the FDA’s judgment has no basis in law or fact – this decision is completely unprecedented.

**If this ruling stands, it won’t just impact those living in anti-choice states. This could ban access to medication abortion in all fifty states, including California.**

For the far right, overturning _Roe_ was just the beginning. Republicans told us that they wanted decisions about abortion rights to be left to the states. Let’s be clear: that was all a lie. **They want a nationwide ban on abortion – and they’ll do whatever it takes to roll back our rights and freedoms. It’s time to fight back.**

[When I’m in Congress, I will ALWAYS vote to protect abortion rights nationwide – no ifs, ands, or buts. Will you pitch in to help me defeat an anti-choice, pro-Trump incumbent and flip CA-45 blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61604771/400584192/762321513?contactdata=mB7hDctAZ1RhJoeDE0uCQtsMnFhP7iKYB3g+9KRyHNBLNeYz0n263w7rhCpXMC8vezhl1sbRtPmjiu+mRHW4FGCwlngdFNPsVG1eeHhodLw=&amount=10&refcode=KBN_EM_FR_WL_230410_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDhiNjhlZGYtZjhkNy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UHMFvWjF4xlk6Fb_WWUy35rkSTXJrm3t671LsI0541c=) | | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61604772/400584193/762321513?contactdata=mB7hDctAZ1RhJoeDE0uCQtsMnFhP7iKYB3g+9KRyHNBLNeYz0n263w7rhCpXMC8vezhl1sbRtPmjiu+mRHW4FGCwlngdFNPsVG1eeHhodLw=&amount=10&refcode=KBN_EM_FR_WL_230410_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDhiNjhlZGYtZjhkNy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UHMFvWjF4xlk6Fb_WWUy35rkSTXJrm3t671LsI0541c=)**

When unborn lives were on the line, Mississippi stepped up.

And now, thanks to our great state, the mass-murder decision of Roe V. Wade is no longer the law of the land in America.

I’m so proud of all the Mississippi conservatives who put in the incredible work to save millions of unborn lives.

_But now, we have a new challenge on our hands._

**Because Mississippi led the charge to overturn Roe, we have a target on our back - and liberal money is aimed right at our state.**

clean_body: | = BREAKING NEWS, team: Today, our former far-right opponent Yvette Herrell announced she’s officially running against Gabe in a 2024 rematch for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. And she was joined by none other than House Speaker Kevin McCarthy. This isn’t just any old race for Congress: McCarthy came to Las Cruces because he knows how important NM-02 is to keeping the House red or flipping it blue next year. He and Herrell are desperate to kick Gabe out of office, take this seat back, and move our district (and country) backward — we can’t let them. Not with reproductive choice, affordable healthcare and housing, environmental protection, and so much more on the line. Today’s announcement is a wake-up call: the race to 2024 begins NOW. This is a top-target of the NRCC as well as a DCCC Frontline seat. Gabe needs all the grassroots support he can get to go up against extremist Herrell and her far-right backers like McCarthy and Trump. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you for anything you can contribute to help us keep the most competitive seat in the House in the hands of a true representative of the people. — Team Vasquez | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement.
